## Cycle 459 вАФ 2026-06-17 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (459 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **DEEP** (one concept вАФ *the live global GitHub public-events firehose = the planet's act of creation, as a living ambient score* вАФ attacked via 3 renderer/metaphor approaches; 456 WIDE вЖТ 457 DEEP вЖТ 458 WIDE вЖТ 459 DEEP alternates cleanly, and JURY 2026-06-17 #4 "extend the ceiling builds, don't start a sixth tonal-tension toy" wants ONE big concept best explored by competing approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `699-world-forge` вАФ **"World Forge": the lab's directest answer to JURY 2026-06-17 #4 вАФ "683's WebSocket engine could sonify a NON-MARKET live stream (transit, seismic, language-usage) for free."** Extends 683's live-data engine into a fresh, keyless, free firehose the lab had never touched: the worldwide act of *making*. The browser polls `https://api.github.com/events` (unauthenticated, keyless, CORS-open read-only GET вАФ no api route, no guard, no secret) at most once/~78s, meters each batch of recent events out gently, and turns each into one grain вАФ **event TYPE вЖТ timbre** (push=soft bell, star=bright shimmer, PR=warm swell, issue=muted tom, fork/create=low bloom), **repo-hash вЖТ pitch in a drifting D-Dorian mode** (same repo вЖТ same note), **rolling 12s rate вЖТ drone density/brightness + planet glow**. A three.js auto-rotating dark Earth (procedural graticule + land-ish dots, NO external textures) blooms an additive light at each event's deterministic pseudo geo-location (hashed repo+actor вАФ texture, not GIS), panned by longitude. **A living planetary texture, emphatically NOT a harmonic-event/cadence.**

**Orient / git sync.** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated/diverged** again (local stale, 50/50 vs origin, new tags + `dream/sandbox`/connect branches) вЖТ `--ff-only` aborted вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `029e50d` = cycle 458 = `696-kids-mouth-band`; **max committed folder 696**). ## Cycle 454 вАФ 2026-06-17 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (454 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **WIDE** (3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers, each a DIFFERENT harmonic *event* √Ч input √Ч renderer √Ч vibe; 452 WIDE вЖТ 453 DEEP вЖТ 454 WIDE alternates cleanly, and JURY 2026-06-16 banned a *combo* [the pentatonic crutch] вЖТ the manual's "ban the combo вЖТ go WIDE with fresh tags") ¬Ј SHIPS `684-kids-every-note` вАФ **"Every Note": the lab's directest answer to JURY #1's spirit вАФ the INVERSE of the pentatonic crutch.** Instead of *restricting* a 4yo to five safe pads, hand over the WHOLE **12-note chromatic palette** and let the **harmony chase the note**: a real-time **reharmonizer** retrieves a candidate chord under every tap so a "wrong" note becomes the color of a new chord вАФ the pre-verbal lesson that *consonance is contextual*. Touch 12 big petals вЖТ 3вАУ4 pad voices glide to a freshly chosen chord + a Canvas2D aurora re-tints to its hue + a soft bell pings the literal note. Directly continues JURY 2026-06-16 #1 ("kill the pentatonic crutch вАФ let a kid meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary"); realizes/upgrades the ¬І452-banked `681-kids-every-note` (re-skinned off the hot WebGL2 onto the cold Canvas2D).

**Orient.** Synced main вАФ remote was again a **forced/diverged update** (50/50 vs stale local), `git reset --hard origin/main` to HEAD `1624a2b` (cycle 453 = adult, shipped `683-world-pulse`; **max committed folder 683**). `npm ci` (node_modules absent in fresh container; exit 0, lockfile untouched). No blocker, no in-progress work. 454 % 2 == 0 вЖТ **kids**. Love signal (37 loves via `/api/dream/votes`, exit 0): the kids draw/paint/loop cluster (`100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, `160-kids-paint-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `111-kids-shape-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `152-kids-star-paint`вЭ§пЄП) вАФ soft bias only to a calm luminous-garden vibe; gates governed the pick.

**Research-first.** Dive вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І454 (two WebSearches + one WebFetch, dates verified). Headline: a fresh **<30-day** chord-generation paper describes, almost line for line, the architecture a "no wrong note, ever" kids instrument needs вАФ **He/Li/Sun/Huang, "A Decomposed Retrieval-Edit-Rerank Framework for Chord Generation," arXiv:2605.07489, submitted 2026-05-08** (verified on arxiv.org/abs/2605.07489, ICMR '26): decompose chord choice into RETRIEVE (plausible candidates) вЖТ EDIT (enforce theory by minimal adjustment) вЖТ RERANK (pick among feasible). That maps exactly onto the ¬І452 idea (consonance is contextual вЖТ let harmony chase the note): the child's tapped pitch class is the hard constraint; retrieve candidate chords that frame it; edit/score by fit; rerank by voice-leading. Chain `today's research вЖТ today's build` is **same-day** and visible (684's `harmony.ts` IS the retrieve-edit-rerank loop). **#5 IS claimed** here (the lead paper is a genuine <30-day drop), distinct from the last several cycles where refs were foundational.

## Cycle 450 вАФ 2026-06-16 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (450 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **WIDE** (3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers, orchestrated) ¬Ј SHIPS `675-kids-deep` вАФ **"Deep Drum": a 4yo taps six big glowing stones over a deep glowing abyss while a sustained drone slowly MIGRATES its tonal center (i вЖТ вЩ≠VI вЖТ вЩ≠VII вЖТ i, ~18s/step).** Because the stones are FIXED pitches and the root moves, each tap's harmonic *function* changes over time вАФ a note that sounded *home* drifts to *tense* then *resolves* вАФ so the child hears harmony move under a constant action (**functional recontextualization**, NOT pentatonic scale-snap). Raw WebGL2 abyss retints with the key (amber only at home). The directest hit on JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1 ("kill the pentatonic/no-wrong-notes crutch вАФ let a kid HEAR a real harmonic event: a drone that shifts under them") and the freshest concept vs the recent kids stream.

Found **arXiv:2602.22813 (Ye/Shang/Ma/Zhang, CHI 2026): "Input-Envelope-Output: Auditable Generative Music Rewards in Sensory-Sensitive Contexts"** вАФ a constraint-first framework that applies hard sensory ENVELOPES (loudness ceiling, forbidden bands, bounded dynamics) *before* generating, so harmonic tension can be introduced while guaranteed never to become harsh/startling. Hook: this is the engineering of the jury's "meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary" вАФ the kid-safe master chain is the *enabler* of un-scary harmonic risk, not a safety afterthought. Carried-forward anchor (¬І448 `[older, foundational]`): 3вАУ4yos don't reliably map minorвЖТsad until ~age 7вАУ8; the perceptible events at that age are (a) *change itself / a moving drone* and (b) *closure & its denial*. вЖТ ordered curation: drone (675) + cadence (676) sit on firmer 4yo ground than the mode-flip (674). **Research-first.** Dive вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І447. Found **arXiv:2606.16412 (De Roure, dated 2026-06-16 вАФ *today*, verified on arxiv.org/list/cs.SD/recent): "An Asymmetric Formula for Interval Consonance and its Relation to Harmonic Coincidence."** Hook: a continuous *asymmetric* consonance score is the principled alternative to pentatonic scale-snap (the jury's named local minimum) вАФ let a generative process *choose* the next note by weighting candidates by consonance against what's ringing, with a small flat/sharp asymmetric lean. вЖТ became the harmonic brain (`consonance.ts`) of all three explorers. ResearchвЖТbuild chain is **same-day**.

All three returned demoable; each self-reported `tsc --noEmit` + `eslint` clean in isolation:

- `661-murmur-engine` (the EMERGENCE explorer) вАФ `page.tsx`+`boids.ts`+`synth.ts`+`README.md`. Banked IDEAS ¬І445.

**Curate вАФ why 659 won.** (1) **Highest-leverage register fill вАФ the jury's single most-named structural gap.** JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 is explicit: the adult side bifurcated into doom-vs-warm, and "the missing register is the whole middle: ecstatic, joyful, danceable/groove вАФ nobody is building it"; worse, every ecstatic *candidate* (`650`, `653-endless-lift`) gets banked and abandoned. 659 **finally ships** the ecstatic register вАФ the directest possible answer. (2) **It doubles as a standing Karel directive** вАФ care #4 asks for "EDM build-and-drop вА¶ as alternate journey arcs," which is **still 0√Ч**; 659 is a journey-engine alternative (build/drop arc) on top of the register fill. (3) **Cleanest diversity** вАФ WebGL2 is the scarcest *screen* renderer (off banned WebGPU, off BOTH hot three.js & Canvas2D), keyboard/autonomous input dodges banned touch + recent mic/camera, and ecstatic dodges BOTH banned vibe poles (doom AND cozy). 660 (tender, lovely) is the runner-up but lower-leverage (tender is missing but the jury named ecstatic first) and lower ambition (2/5, no #1) with cozy-adjacency risk; 661 (boids) lands on **Canvas2D which is HOT (3√ЧвЖТ4√Ч)** and has **no #1** (537/8 already flock in the corpus), the weakest diversity + novelty. (4) **Most ambitious of the three + a genuine "huh"** вАФ the sidechain pump rendered *visible* as the cathedral's brightness duck-and-bloom is a real audioвЖФvisual binding, and the Shepard-folded forever-climbing bass is the research's "never-landing stream" made literal. (5) **Bulletproof for an unattended auto-deploy** вАФ pure Web Audio + WebGL2, Canvas2D fallback, ~2.5s idle auto-demo runs the arc hands-free, zero network/key/mic/GPU-compute surface. **Trade-offs flagged:** 660 is the bulletproof beautiful tender-register resurrect (the lab's intimacy gap) вАФ **banked IDEAS ¬І445**; 661 is the emergence reach вАФ **banked IDEAS ¬І445** with a note to resurrect on a *scarce* renderer (WebGL2 GPU-instancing) + a sharper sonification to earn a #1. **Re-materialization safety:** removed 660/661 ONLY after ALL THREE builders' completion notifications confirmed, then re-verified only 659 remained in the `65x`/`66x` range before the authoritative build.

**Validate.** Winner pre-checked (greps): `"use client"` present; **no API route / no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2 вАФ no network/secret/mic/camera); no `: any`/`as any` (only the standard `as unknown as {webkitAudioContext}` cast); no `function use*`/`const use*` helpers (uses `step*/apply*/createArc/createRenderer/draw*`); rAF/setInterval/event-listeners/AudioNodes/AudioContext all torn down on unmount (3 teardown sites in page.tsx + engine/renderer dispose). Removed both losers, `rm -rf .next`, authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вЖТ **exit 0, "вЬУ Compiled successfully in 77s", "вЬУ Generating static pages (481/481)"** (480 from cycle 444 + 659 = 481, confirming 660/661 absent), `/dream/659-pulse-cathedral` prerendered static вЧЛ (7.65 kB / 110 kB First Load). `git status`: only `659-pulse-cathedral/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified; **package.json / package-lock.json / next.config confirmed UNTOUCHED**. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified by ear** (no real audio/GPU in sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: (a) the actual mix/loudness of the kick/bass/supersaw through the capped master (gains tuned by reasoning, not heard; builder flagged), (b) whether the sidechain pump *feels* like a pump and the drop *hits* on real speakers, (c) whether the Shepard-fold reads as a forever-climb by ear, (d) the autonomous-demo visual kick is an approximation (not the real scheduled kick) so its beat may drift slightly from the shader pulse, (e) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock + WebGL2 on the device. The ~2.5s idle auto-demo runs the BUILDвЖТDROPвЖТSUSTAIN arc autonomously and the WebGL2 nave animates before audio unlocks (Canvas2D fallback if no WebGL2), so a silent 06:30 glance shows the cathedral pulsing + dropping with zero hardware/interaction.

**Gates cleared (cited):** **ambition floor** 2вАУ3/5 via **#2** (вЙ•3 subsystems вЖТ 4: look-ahead scheduler ¬Ј sidechain-pumped layered bed ¬Ј build-drop arc state machine ¬Ј WebGL2 nave + Canvas2D fallback) + **#3** (named refs that drive it вАФ EDM build-drop form ¬Ј Prydz sidechain-pumping ¬Ј Shepard 1964 ¬Ј LiveBand/Lyria causal-stream frame); #1 SOFT, #5 NOT hard-claimed (said plainly). **diversity audit** clean on every binding JURY 2026-06-15 ban вАФ `picked=[keyboard/autonomous INPUT (off banned touch) ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest screen; off banned WebGPU + off BOTH hot three.js & Canvas2D) ¬Ј build-drop+sidechain+Shepard TECH ¬Ј ecstatic VIBE (the 0√Ч-shipped missing middle; off both banned poles)]`. **research-first** chain visible: RESEARCH ¬І445 вАФ reactive-accompaniment headline KILLED by corpus grep (251/256) вЖТ surviving value = LiveBand's continuous never-landing causal stream + the jury's "ship the ecstatic register you keep banking" вЖТ a euphoric EDM arc that climbs forever (Shepard-folded), path (a)/(c).

**Next.** Cycle 446 is **kids** (even). **Mode watch:** 443 WIDE, 444 DEEP, 445 WIDE вЖТ a kids DEEP or fresh-concept fire alternates cleanly; honor the touch ban (tilt/voice/camera/mic/gamepad/MIDI вАФ or touch is now FREE again, 0√Ч in the window, if a touch concept is strongest). **Kids openings:** **his-music-for-kids is a live spine** вАФ `658-kids-piano-garden` is its cycle-1; a real **cycle-2** (his recording's onset/phrase structure shaping where flowers bloom, or two-source granular blending two Paths tracks) is a clean #4 toward a kids 4/5; plus the ¬І442-banked `651-kids-choir-leader` (mic voiceвЖТin-key choir, tender) and this-spine's `657-kids-piano-garden` (firefly WIND). **Adult-side watch (cycle 447):** **`660-glasswork`** (this fire's tender resurrect вАФ the lab's intimacy gap), **`654-latent-chain`** (the 0√Ч AI-pipeline-chain + Karel's top "AI image INSIDE an AV piece" directive вАФ needs Karel awake + a live `FAL_KEY`), **`653-endless-lift`** (now superseded by 659 as the ecstatic fill вАФ deprioritize). **Renderer watch:** WebGL2 (now 658+659) + audio-only (626/655) remain scarcest; **three.js (632/643/645) AND Canvas2D (636/640/652) both HOT at 3√Ч** вАФ avoid both for the next winner without re-auditing. **The 4/5 ceiling (still corrected):** `630-piano-refract` is an honest 4/5 cycle-2; 659 is a clean honest 2вАУ3/5 whose value is a 0√Ч-shipped register + a Karel-named journey arc, not a ceiling-break. **mode: DEEP** вАФ three folder-isolated parallel builders, numbers pre-allocated 606/607/608, each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route (READ the existing `/api/audio/[id]` only). ALL share: fetch Karel's real piano (`549fc519-вА¶`, 4s AbortController, JSON-`{url}`-or-raw-bytes) with a synthesized solo-piano OfflineAudioContext fallback so decomposition ALWAYS has content; ~9s mono @22kHz slice; STFT Hann 1024/hop 256 keeping complex bins; phase-preserving soft-mask ISTFT overlap-add; chunked decompose with a progress bar (no UI freeze); WebGL2 (off Canvas2D) spectral viz; off-glass keyboard + iOS-gated device-tilt control with secondary on-screen faders; `gain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; graceful `text-rose-300` degradation; ~2.5s idle auto-demo. Briefs (ONE concept, three techniques):
- **`606-piano-vivisection`** вАФ median-filter **HPSS**: split his piano into sustained harmonic strings (time-median) vs transient percussive hammers (freq-median), soft Wiener masks, morph the balance. Refs: Fitzgerald DAFx 2010.
- **`607-piano-prism`** вАФ **NMF**: factor SвЙИW¬ЈH into 6 learned spectral components √Ч activations (KL multiplicative updates), solo/mute/re-mix each. Refs: Lee & Seung 1999; Smaragdis & Brown 2003.
- **`608-piano-sieve`** вАФ **sinusoidal+residual (SMS)**: peak-pick deterministic tonal partials vs the stochastic residual (hammer/breath/room), sift + freeze + stretch. Refs: Serra & Smith 1990.

**Act вАФ DEEP 3-technique fan-out (all returned demoable + clean tsc+ESLint in isolation; all share the his-piano fetch+fallback, ~9s STFT pipeline, phase-preserving mask ISTFT, WebGL2 viz, off-glass keyboard/tilt, gentle limiter, auto-demo):**
- **`606-piano-vivisection` (WINNER, shipped)** вАФ median-filter HPSS strings-vs-hammers. Files: `page.tsx` (576), `hpss.ts` (384), `gl.ts` (301), `audio.ts` (142), `README.md`. WebGL2 field draws harmonic as cyan/steel horizontal streaks + percussive as magenta/white vertical strikes, balance-weighted, sweeping playhead. R32F texture w/ 8-bit fallback.
- **`607-piano-prism`** (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І425) вАФ NMF 6-component prism, KL updates, per-component looping buffers behind per-component gains, colored bands + activation lanes. Files: `page.tsx` (633), `gl.ts` (265), `nmf.ts` (202), `audio.ts` (362), `README.md`.
- **`608-piano-sieve`** (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І425) вАФ SMS tonal-vs-residual sieve + freeze + stretch, gold/white partial lines vs grey-blue noise cloud. Files: `page.tsx` (778), `gl.ts` (320), `audio.ts` (416), `README.md`.

**Curate вЖТ WINNER `606-piano-vivisection`.** All three are honest 3/5 (#1+#2+#3) and dodge every banned tag (WebGL2 off-Canvas2D, keyboard/tilt off-glass, no warm-JI bed, dissective-not-cozy), so the deciding axes were: (1) **most legible result for the 06:30 glance** вАФ "his strings ringing vs. his hammers knocking" is instantly graspable; **607's NMF components are unsupervised spectral clusters, not nameable** (the builder flagged this вАФ abstract bands), and 608's tonal-vs-noise-cloud is subtler. (2) **most reliable** вАФ median-filter HPSS near-always yields a clean audible split on any piano; NMF quality depends on random-init convergence and 608's freeze/stretch are explicitly approximate (its `playbackRate` stretch slightly pitch-shifts вАФ builder-flagged). (3) **most personal + surprising for a pianist** вАФ isolating the two physical mechanisms of his OWN piano (string vs hammer) is a genuine "huh!" and emotionally resonant, the way 557/583 won. (4) **fewest failure points** вАФ the simplest, most robust DSP of the trio. **607 banked** (the most technically ambitious + the gorgeous prism metaphor вАФ the strongest cycle-2 deepening, or fuse: HPSS pre-split вЖТ NMF the harmonic layer) + **608 banked** (tonal-vs-noise + freeze/stretch playground вАФ resurrect for a dedicated spectral-freeze/phase-vocoder fire) IDEAS ¬І425.

**Validate:** Grep-scanned the winner: **0** helper functions named `use[A-Z]` (only legit React hooks), the `as any` casts (`webkitAudioContext`, GL) each carry `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`, **0** ts-ignore/nocheck, no `api/` folder вЖТ **no guard needed**, `"use client"` present, README link `/dream/606-piano-vivisection/README.md` (sibling pattern). Banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І425 вЖТ `rm -rf` 607/608 with absolute paths вЖТ `git status` confirmed ONLY `606-piano-vivisection/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 101s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (461/461)`** (the one new route), `/dream/606-piano-vivisection 8.35 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ. **Clean first run вАФ no fix attempt needed.** `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. Scope clean. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/GPU in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (606):** (a) **not run in a live browser** вАФ verified by the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **the perceptual quality of the HPSS split** вАФ the median-filter math + soft Wiener masks + phase-preserving ISTFT are coded to spec and correct-looking, but only real speakers confirm the strings/hammers separation sounds clean (median kernels 17/17 + power-2 masks are eye-tuned; real piano may want adjustment). **mode: WIDE** вАФ three folder-isolated parallel builders, numbers pre-allocated 603/604/605, each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route. Briefs:
- **`603-kids-yell-blob`** вАФ mic-voice (yell/roar/sing) вЖТ a giant wobbly **soft-body blob** (spring-mass / metaball, **raw WebGL2**, robust no-CDN) that squash-stretch INFLATES with loudness and **honks your voice back** exaggerated (comic formant/pitch DSP). INPUT mic-voice ¬Ј OUTPUT WebGL2 ¬Ј TECH soft-body-squish + comic-vocal-DSP ¬Ј VIBE silly-monster. Refs: Disney squash-&-stretch (Preston Blair *Cartoon Animation*); holtsetio softbody (2026).
- **`604-kids-stomp-band`** вАФ device-motion (SHAKE/STOMP, accel-spike detection) вЖТ a cartoon **junkyard one-toy-band**: each shake flings a googly spring/boing/clatter object into a **three.js** 3D physics pile that bonks and clangs with **cartoon foley** (boings, slide-whistles, springs, clatters вАФ pitched silly, NOT warm-JI). INPUT device-motion ¬Ј OUTPUT three.js ¬Ј TECH rigid-physics-pile + cartoon-foley ¬Ј VIBE chaotic-junkyard. Refs: Carl Stalling / Raymond Scott; one-man-band.
- **`605-kids-blow-parade`** вАФ mic-BLOW (breath/wind broadband detection) вЖТ a **parade of balloon-creatures** that INFLATE as you blow and **raspberry/squeak-deflate** when you stop, bobbling across a **WebGPU** scene (Canvas2D fallback). INPUT mic-blow ¬Ј OUTPUT WebGPU ¬Ј TECH breath-energy + balloon-physics + raspberry-synth ¬Ј VIBE giggly-parade. Refs: party-blower / whoopee-cushion foley; balloon physics.

- **`603-kids-yell-blob` (WINNER, shipped)** вАФ mic-voice (yell/roar) вЖТ a giant 40-point spring-mass **soft-body blob** (raw WebGL2, hand-written GLSL, googly eyes, squash-and-stretch overshoot) that inflates + jiggles with loudness and **HONKS the kid's voice back** exaggerated (detuned saw+square вЖТ ring-mod вЖТ WaveShaper вЖТ swept bandpass, pitched/tinted by spectral centroid). Files: `page.tsx` (403), `blob.ts` (163), `gl.ts` (156), `audio.ts` (217), `README.md` (99). Files: `page.tsx` (344), `audio.ts` (317), `physics.ts` (191), `scene.ts` (184), `README.md` (87). Refs: Stalling/Scott/Brown; one-man-band.

**Curate вЖТ WINNER `603-kids-yell-blob`.** All three are honest 2/5 (#2+#3) and dodge every banned tag (off Canvas2D, non-fingertip, anti-cozy, no warm-JI), so the deciding axes were: (1) **instrument, not a reactive toy** вАФ 603 *transforms the kid's own yell into the honk* (voice вЖТ comic resynthesis), the directest kids translation of why `601-feedback-howl` won its fire ("a new instrument paradigm, not a visualizer"); 604 is a trigger-pile and 605's blow is a binary energy GATE (the balloons make their own sounds). (2) **strongest single-glance hero + most immediate causeвЖТeffect for the youngest hands** вАФ one giant wobbling googly blob filling the screen; yellвЖТit instantly inflates+honks, with no aiming, no sensor, no detection threshold to satisfy. (3) **funny + personal** вАФ hearing your *own* voice honked back is the most repeatable 4yo giggle and the strongest "huh!" for Karel. (4) **fewest failure points at the 06:30 glance** вАФ mic + WebGL2 (вЙИ98% support) + auto-demo + tap/key fallback. **604 banked** (IDEAS ¬І424; most phone-native but closest to the existing `566-kids-shake-band` shakeвЖТthree.js, and a more diffuse reward вАФ resurrect once 566 ages out) + **605 banked** (IDEAS ¬І424; funniest single payoff + freshest INPUT sub-modality [breath] + safest render fallback, but a reactive toy not an instrument and the blow-detection thresholds are the trickiest unverified surface вАФ resurrect for a breath-input fire).

**Validate:** Grep-scanned the winner: **0** `use[A-Z]` helpers, **0** styled-jsx, **0** `as any`, **0** ts-ignore/nocheck, no `api/` folder вЖТ **no guard needed**, `"use client"` present. Banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І424 вЖТ `rm -rf` 604/605 with absolute paths вЖТ `git status` confirmed ONLY `603-kids-yell-blob/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 45s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (460/460)`** (the one new route), `/dream/603-kids-yell-blob 5.7 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ. **Clean first run вАФ no fix attempt needed.** (The 603-builder's earlier `pages-manifest.json` ENOENT was confirmed a sandbox artifact вАФ the authoritative build here was clean.) `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. Scope clean. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no real mic/audio/GPU in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (603):** (a) **not run in a live browser with a real mic** вАФ verified by the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **the blob actually reads as a goofy honking monster + the honk is funny-not-annoying** вАФ the spring-mass overshoot, the kid-safe chain, and the comic DSP are coded to spec, but only real speakers + a real yell confirm the loudness scaling (`rms*6`), centroidвЖТhue tint, and honk tuning land (they're eye-tuned; a noisy/quiet room may want adjustment вАФ `autoGainControl` is off so a quiet room needs a louder yell). (c) **pitch is a spectral centroid, not true f0** (deliberate robustness; tints bright/dark, not a real tracker). (d) **no Canvas2D fallback if WebGL2 is absent** вАФ only a `text-rose-300` notice (WebGL2 is ~98% incl. iOS Safari 15+, so low risk on Karel's review device). (e) the live-voice echo bus is held low (0.18) to avoid speaker feedback. The ~2.5s idle auto-demo + tap/keyboard fake-yell mean the hands-free 06:30 glance always shows a wobbling, honking blob, and Karel can yell at it himself at his desk/phone.

**Act вАФ WIDE 3-explorer adult fire (3 folder-isolated parallel builders; numbers pre-allocated 600/601/602; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; all shared: WebGPU + real Canvas2D fallback, final DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter, graceful `text-rose-300` degradation, ~2вАУ3s idle auto-demo for the silent glance). Refs: Merzbow; SRL; Krueger *Videoplace* (inverted). 5 subsystems.

**Curate вЖТ WINNER `601-feedback-howl`.** All three dodged every banned tag and chase edges, so the deciding axes were (1) **highest ambition** вАФ 601 is the only honest 3/5 with a real **lab-first synthesis primitive** (no-input self-oscillation); 600 is 2/5 (#2+#3) and 602 is 2/5 (#2+#3, soft #1). (2) **freshest non-fingertip INPUT** вАФ 601's keyboard+device-tilt is genuinely off-glass and fresh, where mic is 2√Ч in the rolling-10 (600) and camera/motion is the most-mined input family in the lab (602). (3) **a new INSTRUMENT PARADIGM, not a visualizer** вАФ 601's sound *is* its own feedback (the jury's recurring "renderer flex in search of a concept" critique cuts against 600/602, which are both audio-reactive strobe *visualizers* with a harsh skin); 601 is the directest hit on the jury's "felt-tension, not a puzzle" praise of 594. (4) **most surprising** вАФ "an instrument that is only its own scream, ridden on the brink of runaway" is the strongest "huh, we can do that?" of the trio. 600 banked (strongest silent-glance + the new datamatics aesthetic вАФ resurrect as the lead of a cold/clinical Ikeda fire) + 602 banked (most subsystems + a real violent register вАФ resurrect once camera is out of the window) IDEAS ¬І423.

**Validate:** `node_modules` was missing вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Grep-scanned the winner: no `use[A-Z]` helpers; no styled-jsx (plain inline style); no `api/` folder вЖТ **no guard needed**; `"use client"` present; the GPU/audio `as any` casts each carry `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`. Banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І423 вЖТ `rm -rf` 600/602 with absolute paths вЖТ `git status` confirmed ONLY `601-feedback-howl/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 44s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (459/459)`** (the one new route), `/dream/601-feedback-howl 6.66 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ. **Clean first run вАФ no fix attempt needed.** `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. Scope clean. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/tilt/keyboard hardware in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (601):** (a) **not run in a real browser** вАФ verified by the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **the feedback actually self-oscillates + sounds abrasive** вАФ the ring + seed + loop-gain<1.0 are coded to spec and the math is sound, but only real speakers confirm it howls (and that the safety clamps tame it without killing the sound) вАФ there is a genuine risk the loop gain is mistuned (too low = it dies, too high = limiter clamps it to mush); the PANIC + mute + sane-start mean it can't hurt anyone while Karel tunes it by ear. (c) **device-tilt** is feature-detected + iOS-permission-gated but never exercised on hardware; keyboard is the always-present fallback. (d) **the WGSL spectrum shader** is type/lint-clean but never hit a real `navigator.gpu`; the Canvas2D fallback is the safety net. (e) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock coded to spec, untested. The ~2.5s idle auto-demo + keyboard + Canvas2D fallback mean the hands-free 06:30 glance always shows a writhing field, and Karel can plug in at his desk and ride the brink himself.

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 424 (kids, even):** alternation says **DEEP** next (423 was WIDE). Run the diversity audit fresh вАФ Canvas2D/touch/warm-JI/cozy were the jury bans; WebGPU is now refreshed (601). Avoid a creature (jury-FROZEN). The jury named no kids piece to extend, so a fresh DEEP concept; consider whether the abrasive register can be made *kid-joyful* (loud вЙ† scary вАФ a "make a big silly racket" toy) rather than reverting to the warm wash the jury just banned.
- **601 cycle-2 (the Feedback spine, if Karel loves it):** a **multi-node feedback NETWORK** (several rings cross-coupled вАФ a David Tudor *Rainforest* ecosystem you conduct) for a long-form evolving piece that's different at minute 5; or a **two-player** version (two browsers each driving half the loop). The 4/5 path: first cross-coupled feedback ecosystem + the off-glass spine + named refs.
- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ¬І423):** `600-data-scream` (voice вЖТ Ikeda datamatics WebGPU strobe) + `602-motion-thrash` (camera motion вЖТ violent industrial noise + WebGPU strobe). Both real, build-clean, ready to resurrect.

Ember/creature (569) jury-FROZEN.

- **582 wins** вАФ the lab's **first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument** (568 was hands, 576 head; soft #1), most subsystems (5: pose tracking + spreadвЖТJI-chord-openness + arms-raisedвЖТbrightness + feetвЖТbass + Canvas2D aura render), and the most *legible* kids mapping вАФ "raise your arms вЖТ the sky brightens; spread wide вЖТ the chord opens" is instantly graspable by a 4-year-old. ## Cycle 411 вАФ 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (411 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `570-spoken-spell` вАФ **Speak, and your live words become a self-layering musical incantation: Resonance hears your speech (real Web Speech API recognition), turns each word into a D-pentatonic pitch (lettersвЖТhash), vowel-ratio into duration, punctuation into phrasing вАФ and freezes each finished phrase into a looping ostinato, so the longer you speak the denser the canon grows and you can hear your own sentence woven inside it.**

**Orient:** main had a forced update on origin (local diverged 50/50); origin/main is source of truth вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` to HEAD `4954703` (cycle 410, `569-kids-ember-keeper`). `npm ci` needed (fresh container, no node_modules). STATE.md is now newest-first; INDEX.md retains the verbose recent entries (older pruned). Love signal fetched (`/api/dream/votes`): no loved slug directly applicable to the language/voice lane (Karel's loves cluster on kids/paint/particle/splat) вАФ the ambition + diversity + research gates governed.

**Research dive (research-first rule) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І411:** the **2026 in-browser ASR wave** вАФ Hugging Face transformers.js now runs automatic speech recognition fully **client-side** via ONNX Runtime + WASM/WebGPU (no server), and recent drops вАФ **LiteASR / LiteWhisper** (Univ. of Washington + Kotoba Technologies, "Efficient ASR with Low-Rank Approximation," surfaced in transformers.js docs Mar 2026) and **Cohere Transcribe** ("new SOTA open-source speech recognition") вАФ make live speechвЖТtext a browser-native primitive. **Honest date caveat:** ~3 months, not <14 days вЖТ bound as a *soft* finding (the production upgrade path beyond the zero-dependency Web Speech API), **#5 NOT claimed as a clean 5**. Also logged: SIGGRAPH 2026 "The Creative Complexities of Translation" Art Papers theme (PRNewswire 2026-05-21) вАФ thematic inspiration for the cross-modal *translation* framing.

**Decide:** Action = **Build new (adult, odd cycle 411).** No blocker, no in-progress spine whose output isn't over-represented. Mode = **WIDE** (deliberate alternation: 410 was DEEP via the jury-#6 override; JURY 2026-06-12 names no single adult piece to extend that hasn't already had cycle 2 вАФ 514вЖТ545/568, 538вЖТ552 вАФ so divergent exploration on fresh tags). VIBE вАФ kids 5 (structural; adult cycle naturally avoids), cosmic 2, cerebral 2. **Act вАФ WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (orchestrated; 3 folder-isolated sonnet builders spawned concurrently in one message; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; numbers pre-allocated 570/571/572):

## Cycle 410 вАФ 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (410 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `569-kids-ember-keeper` вАФ **The lab's FIRST cross-session persistent state: a glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped BODY each day a child returns вАФ and never resets. The directest literal answer to the jury's standing #6: "a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow."**

**The build (winner `569`):** five subsystems + the cross-day persistence spine. (1) **Cross-session persistence** (`genome.ts`) вАФ a JSON genome in `localStorage` (`resonance.ember-keeper.v1`) that ONLY accumulates: `visits`, `distinctDays`, `totalHumSeconds`, a learned pentatonic `palette`, and an **append-only `tokens` list** (body parts). No decrement, no reset path anywhere вАФ the immutable-growth invariant is the soul. (2) **Day-aware growth** вАФ on load, stored `lastVisitDay` vs `new Date().toDateString()`; a NEW calendar day appends one big **"day" limb** on a golden-angle (phyllotaxis) spiral around the core, so today's body is visibly bigger than yesterday's. Within a day, a hummed note or a pet appends a small permanent **"hum" frond** + brightens the ember. (3) **Deterministic regrowth** (`makeBody`) вАФ each token carries a stable `id`; a `mulberry32` PRNG seeded from the id means the same genome ALWAYS regrows the same body (limbs never jump between loads вАФ D'Arcy Thompson's "growth as rule-based addition of parts" made literal). (4) **Analysis-only voice feeding** вАФ mic вЖТ `AnalyserNode` float buffer вЖТ autocorrelation pitch detection (Chris Wilson method, `pitch.ts`) вЖТ quantized to C-major pentatonic (nothing ever wrong) вЖТ echoed back softly + the integer degree added to the palette. The **analyser is a dead-end node** (never connected to destination); samples read per-frame + discarded; only the derived degree persists вАФ mic is genuinely never recorded/stored/transmitted. (5) **three.js render + Web Audio** вАФ emissive core + per-token limbs/fronds, the newest part scale+emissive-pops into place over ~2.6 s on wake; kids-safe `gain вЖТ BiquadFilter lowpass(8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter, all gains `setTargetAtTime`; AudioContext built inside the Wake gesture (`window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext`, eslint-disabled). **For the 06:30 hands-free review** (can't wait a real day): empty storage вЖТ `makeDemoGenome()` seeds a believable history (**5 visits / 4 days / 5-note palette / 10 tokens = 4 day-limbs + 6 fronds**), so the glance always shows a rich many-limbed creature breathing from frame one + singing on wake; a clearly-secondary **рЯМЩ next-day** button (top-right, outside the play area) TIME-TRAVELS so Karel watches a brand-new limb sparkle in on demand. **Graceful degradation both axes:** mic-denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-to-pet still grows; WebGL-fail вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a **DOM/CSS** orb (one petal per token) that still glows/grows/sings (NOT Canvas2D, per brief). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic + Web Audio + three.js вАФ no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three` already in package.json).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted вАФ the recurring container-drift, same as 404вАУ409); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `62abff3` = cycle 409 `568-conductor-hands` вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **568**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **569/570/571** to three builders (verified free as FOLDERS; NOTE the ¬І409 banked text-seeds `569-conductor-batons`/`570-conductor-baton-motion` are stale number-labels вАФ those slugs now belong to this cycle's Ember pieces; the conductor seeds renumber on revival, per the banking convention).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І410):** two WebSearches вАФ (a) persistent/evolving generative creatures & pets across days in the browser, 2026; (b) arxiv cs.SD June 2026 memory/long-form/stateful generative music. Most on-theme: **Niantic's "Peridot generative-AI virtual creatures"** + the broader **AI-pets wave** (rctAI, Loona) вАФ *a companion that is genuinely different when you return* is a current commercial frontier. cs.SD remains server-ML/latent-diffusion (long-form latent-diffusion; SMDIM Feb 2026; concept-steering Mar 2026) вАФ none client-buildable, none <14-days вЖТ **#5 NOT claimable, said plainly** (the carried honesty, per the jury's own #5 call-out). **Chain visible:** dive (persistent generative companions are the live worth-mining lane; the lab has NEVER persisted anything across sessions in 569 prototypes) вЖТ today's build consumes the jury's #6 with the dive as validation.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** вАФ the JURY-naming-a-piece-to-extend override fires: JURY 2026-06-12 **#6 explicitly names `518-living-ember`** ("the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days вАФ extend THAT: a creature a child finds genuinely changed *tomorrow*"). Per AGENT.md ("if JURY says 'prototype X is exceptional, extend it,' go DEEP on X") this overrides the 409-DEEPвЖТ410-WIDE alternation. Three approaches attacked ONE concept (*a creature genuinely different each day you return; it never resets*) via three things that can evolve across days: BODY (569) / SONG (570) / WORLD (571).
- **Action = Build new (kids, even cycle).** No blocker, no in-progress kids thread. NOTE: 549-kids-song-friend (cycle 402) earlier touched the companion lane, but the jury вАФ reviewing a window that includes 549 вАФ STILL names 518/#6 as undelivered; cross-DAY-difference (a creature you find changed *tomorrow*) had never been built, because **the lab has never persisted state across sessions at all**. That gap is the headline.
- **Ambition floor (winner `569`): honest 4/5** вАФ `ambition: #1 cross-session persistent state (grep-verified lab-FIRST вАФ no prior dream piece writes to localStorage + reloads across visits/days; this is the genuinely-new technique, not a reskin) + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (autocorrelation pitch + accumulating-genome persistence engine + deterministic phyllotaxis morphology + three.js render + Web Audio = 5) + #3 named refs that DRIVE it (Tamagotchi [Maita/Bandai 1996] вАФ lives in the device & rewards returning, the soul; Steve Grand *Creatures* [1996] вАФ accumulating internal state drives outward FORM; D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form* [1917] вАФ golden-angle limb placement taken directly) + #4 multi-cycle Ember spine cycle 1`. **#5 NOT claimed** (no <14-day bind; cs.SD server-ML вАФ honesty over a phantom score; the dive validates the lane not a result). The clean 4/5 (not the contestable 3/5 of recent cycles) вАФ #1 is a real grep-verified lab-first this time.
- **Diversity audit (last 10 prototypes 568/566/564/559/557/553/552/549/545/541):** OUTPUT: SVG = 3√Ч (559/552/549 вАФ 538 rolled out as 568 rolled in, so SVG fell BELOW the 4√Ч ban but is nudging it); three.js = 2√Ч (568/566); WebGL2 = 2√Ч (564/557). No output вЙ•4 вЖТ no fresh audit ban this cycle. INPUT: camera-hands 568, shake 566, audio-file 564/557, mic 559, tilt 553, touch/drag 541 вАФ none вЙ•4. TECH: none вЙ•4. VIBE: kids structural. Standing JURY rolling-15 bans honored: WebGPU-compute OUTPUT, Canvas2D OUTPUT, GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH, finger-on-glass-default INPUT, calm-sensory-kids VIBE. `banned = [the standing jury set; SVG fell to 3√Ч so not freshly banned but deliberately AVOIDED to not push it to 4√Ч] ¬Ј picked(569) = [**mic-voice + tap INPUT** (off-glass core вАФ NOT the finger-on-glass default; mic at 1√Ч in last-10) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [avoided at 3√Ч], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]; three.js at 2√Ч) ¬Ј **cross-session-persistent procedural-morphology TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвЖТdrone вАФ the banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **companion/relationship/growth VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вАФ it rewards RETURNING; the jury's exact #6 ask to break the 90-second-glow-toy autopilot)]` вАФ clean on every standing jury ban; deliberately dodged the SVG edge. The DEEP trio spread OUTPUT three.js / WebGL2 / SVG so the loser-bank covers all three renderers.
- **Love-aware bias:** the loved companion/creature/embodied cluster (`234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП a hand-creature, `217-dance-avatar`вЭ§пЄП a body-creature, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `98-kids-drum-circle`вЭ§пЄП) softly backs a persistent companion creature; additive вАФ the jury #6 + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act вАФ DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated general-purpose builders, ONE concept вАФ *a creature genuinely different each day you return; never resets* вАФ via what evolves; numbers pre-allocated 569/570/571; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; all shared the cross-session-persistence spine + day-aware growth + analysis-only mic + kids-safe limiter + fresh-device seed + рЯМЩ time-travel):**
- **`569-kids-ember-keeper` (WINNER, shipped)** вАФ the BODY evolves: a three.js creature regrown from an append-only genome; a new calendar day adds a phyllotaxis limb.
- **`570-kids-ember-song` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І410, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ the SONG evolves: hummed phrases append to a persistent library, woven (Eno-style generative recombination) into a longer/richer piece each return; WebGL2 luminous orbiting strands, one per remembered phrase. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx`, `weave.ts`, `render.ts`, `song-memory.ts`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **The biggest CONCEPT of the trio** (the music itself grows across sessions вАФ a true lab-first nobody else has). **Lost on glance-legibility, not quality** вАФ its cross-day payoff is *audible* (a longer song), so at a SILENT 06:30 glance the abstract strands read less clearly than 569's visibly-bigger body. Resurrect for a music-forward kids fire, or fold in as 569's cycle-2 "it also sings your grown song."
- **`571-kids-ember-nest` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І410, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ the WORLD evolves: each visit plants a permanent SVG cut-paper flower/star/friend, each a sustained pentatonic voice вЖТ a fuller world = a denser, warmer always-consonant additive chord (`0.16/вИЪn` per-voice keeps it kids-safe). Removes Tamagotchi's death/punishment loop (returning is always rewarded, never guilt). Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx`, `scene.ts`, `shapes.ts`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **The warmest + most-legible-to-a-4yo** (a busy nest reads instantly). **Lost:** thematically closest to the existing `116-kids-bloom-garden` (self-seeding singing garden вАФ the "too similar" risk) AND another SVG output nudges the rolling-10 SVG toward the 4√Ч ban (it sat at 3√Ч). Resurrect when SVG is clear; add non-overlapping placement + a voice cap for months-old worlds.

**Curate вАФ why 569 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (4/5: #1 shared cross-session persistence + #2 + #3 + #4; #5 honestly unavailable), so the deciding axes were (1) **jury-#6 literalness** вАФ #6 asks for "a *creature* a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow"; 569's body visibly growing new limbs is the directest read (the CREATURE itself is changed), vs 570's changed *song* or 571's changed *world*; (2) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** вАФ a bigger many-limbed creature reads "it grew!" instantly at a silent glance, where 570's payoff must be *heard*; (3) **diversity vs the existing kids set + the SVG edge** вАФ a persistent-morphology creature is genuinely lab-first, whereas 571's filling-world echoes `116-kids-bloom-garden` and another SVG nudges the 4√Ч ban; (4) **surprise (Karel's #2)** вАФ the lab has never persisted anything across sessions; a creature that is literally a bigger, different organism each day is Tamagotchi-grade emotional pull the lab has never had. 570 (the biggest concept вАФ resurrect for a music fire / as 569's cycle-2 song layer) + 571 (the warmest, most-legible вАФ resurrect when SVG clears) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І410 вЖТ `rm -rf` 570/571 with ABSOLUTE paths (heeding ¬І408's persisted-cwd no-op trap) вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `569-kids-ember-keeper/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED вАФ status `completed` вАФ before removal, heeding ¬І399/¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson; 571's builder also self-removed two stray `nest-*.ts` scaffolding files it didn't import) вЖТ grep-scanned the winner for ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; the one `as any` [`webkitAudioContext`, audio.ts:25] carries `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` on the line above; no `ts-nocheck`/`ts-ignore`; no api route; README `./README.md` link present; README opens `**For**: kids (4+)` for dashboard tagging) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 101s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (446/446)`** (445вЖТ446 = the one new route), `/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper 6.03 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js). **Clean first run вАФ no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; zero referencing the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio/WebGL in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (569):** (a) **not run in a real browser** вАФ verified by the builder's `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint + the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **real multi-day behaviour** (waiting actual calendar days) is exercised only via the рЯМЩ time-travel control + `loadAndVisit`'s `toDateString` comparison вАФ never observed across real wall-clock days; **DST / timezone hops** around the day-boundary could mis-count a day (the рЯМЩ button exists precisely so growth demos without trusting the clock). (c) **pitch detection** tuned for humming in a quiet room; very noisy rooms / very low/high voices may quantize oddly (can never sound "wrong", but the *learned* note may not match intent). (d) **unbounded growth** вАФ the genome is append-only by design; after hundreds of parts the scene crowds/slows, no cap or LOD yet (a real returning child accumulates slowly, so this is a far-future concern; a months-old creature is the stress case). (e) **iOS Safari** mic + AudioContext-in-gesture unlock coded to spec, untested on hardware; `webkitAudioContext` path untested on old Safari. (f) **localStorage blocked / private mode** вЖТ save fails silently, creature still plays for the session (no error shown вАФ deliberate, no fail state for kids). The fresh-device demo seed + рЯМЩ time-travel are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a rich, clearly-grown creature with zero setup; and since Karel reviews on a device, he can grant the mic and actually hum to it.

## Cycle 409 вАФ 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (409 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `568-conductor-hands` вАФ **Cycle 2 of the polytempo spine, made EMBODIED: raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi вАФ your left hand beats one voice, your right beats another; the system snaps the two tempi to the nearest irrational ratio (вИЪ2, ѕЖ, e/2, ѕА/2) so the two consonant voices drift through every phase relationship and can NEVER share a downbeat. Metric dissonance you feel in your own arms вАФ the jury's exact #1+#4 ask.**

**The build (winner `568`):** three subsystems + the embodied conducting layer. (1) **MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction** (`tracking.ts`) вАФ `HandLandmarker` loaded via CDN ESM dynamic import (the 419/258 pattern, NOT an npm dep) + `getUserMedia({video})`; each hand's wrist (landmark 0) vertical position tracked per frame; a downbeat fires at the *bottom of a conducting stroke* (velocity zero-crossing downwardвЖТupward, 150 ms debounce); the last-3 inter-beat-interval average вЖТ that hand's tempo, clamped 200вАУ1600 ms (вЙИ37вАУ300 BPM). Left hand = voice A, right hand = voice B (handedness mirror-mapped). (2) **The incommensurability lock** (`snapToIrrational`, the soul) вАФ voice A plays the gestured base period; `desiredRatio = gestured ratio folded вЙ•1`, then SNAP to the irrational *nearest in log-space* from {вИЪ2вЙИ1.414, ѕЖвЙИ1.618, e/2вЙИ1.359, ѕА/2вЙИ1.571}; voice B is forced to `periodA / ratio`. The human chooses the neighbourhood, the math guarantees non-periodicity вАФ the two pulses can never re-share a downbeat. Active ratio + name shown live. (3) **Web Audio** (`audio.ts`) вАФ `PolytempoEngine`: two warm pluck voices (triangle fundamental + soft octave-sine partial, fast pluck envelope) playing the same rising/falling D-pentatonic cell, voice B up a perfect fifth (√Ч1.5) вАФ consonant + distinguishable; each voice has its OWN sample-accurate **"Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms `setInterval` pump scheduling `osc.start(t)` ~120 ms ahead, never setTimeout-per-note); master `gain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built inside the Start click (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js phase-space** (`render.ts`) вАФ two emissive markers orbit their rings (one revolution per beat-period); a **Lissajous ribbon (x=voice-A phase, y=voice-B phase) that NEVER closes** because the ratio is irrational вАФ the geometric signature of a Nancarrow tempo canon, the *visible* proof the pulses never realign; each marker flashes (emissive bump + halo) on its scheduled beat; dark indigo field, violet=A / amber=B. (5) **Frame-one silent auto-demo** вАФ the phase-space animates two synthetic conductors at a default ѕЖ from load, audio silent until the Start gesture (autoplay rules), so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the two-pulse drift. **Camera-denied / MediaPipe-fail вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + two tap pads ("Beat A"/"Beat B")** (fully playable, tap-interval вЖТ tempo). Camera + landmark data **local only** (never recorded/uploaded/networked). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client camera + Web Audio + three.js вАФ no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three` already in package.json; MediaPipe via CDN).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted вАФ the recurring container-drift, same as 404вАУ408); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `0294624` = cycle 408 `566-kids-shake-band` вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **566**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **568/569/570** to three builders (verified free; the ¬І408 banked-seed slugs 565/567 left untouched as text).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І409):** two WebSearches вАФ (a) arxiv cs.SD recent + beat-tracking/polytempo/metric-structure June 2026, (b) browser audio-visual / WebGPU creative-coding MayвАУJune 2026 вАФ + a direct fetch of `arxiv.org/list/cs.SD/recent` (June 8вАУ12). Most on-topic: **S√° Pinto/Bernardes/Davies "Challenging Beat Tracking: Polyrhythm, Polymetre, Polytempo with Human-in-the-Loop Adaptation"** (covers Reich *Piano Phase*, Candombe, Bambuco) вАФ **but it's 2023 work, a named *reference* not a <14-day bind.** cs.SD recent (verified June 8вАУ12) had ZERO beat-tracking/rhythm/interactive-performance papers (server-ML read carried since ¬І386). **#5 NOT claimable, said plainly** (the jury's own #5 flagged the decayed research rule вАФ honesty is the point). The dive DID confirm the concept's live pedigree (human-in-the-loop polytempo beat-tracking is an active thread), validating the embodied-conducting framing. **Chain visible:** dive (no <14-day bind; jury #1 names 514 for the 4/5 chase + #4 names the embodied-polytempo seam directly) вЖТ today's build makes the 514 loom embodied.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** вАФ JURY 2026-06-12 **#1 explicitly names `514-polytempo-loom`** ("take it to cycle 2 AND chase a 4/5") вАФ the jury-naming-a-piece-to-extend rule fires вЖТ DEEP on the polytempo spine (also satisfies the 408 WIDE вЖТ 409 DEEP alternation). Splat cycle-3 stays banked.

The DEEP trio spread INPUT camera-hands / multitouch-tap-tempo / device-motion-baton √Ч OUTPUT three.js / WebGL2 / three.js вАФ three embodiment forms of the one concept.

**Act вАФ DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated general-purpose builders, ONE concept вАФ *the human conducts two incommensurable tempi with their body* вАФ via three embodiment forms; numbers pre-allocated 568/569/570; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**
- **`568-conductor-hands` (WINNER, shipped)** вАФ camera MediaPipe-Hands: each hand conducts a voice, tempi snapped to irrational ratios; three.js never-closing-Lissajous phase-space.
- **`569-conductor-batons` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І409, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ two-thumb multitouch tap-tempo вЖТ raw WebGL2 hand-written-GLSL scrolling **Nancarrow player-piano-roll**, two columns fanning apart forever + moir√© interference band. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~22kB, `render.ts` GLSL roll, `audio.ts`). **The cleanest + most LEGIBLE of the three** (literal scrolling roll reads incommensurability at a glance). **Lost on the DIVERSITY gate, not quality** вАФ its input is finger-on-glass, the jury's flagged 7√Ч default-reflex lane, and tap-tempo is the LEAST *embodied* of the trio (vs jury #4's "embodied gestures"). The strongest cycle-3 viz to fold into 568 (swap the abstract Lissajous for a scrolling roll); resurrect standalone when finger-input clears the audit.
- **`570-conductor-baton-motion` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І409, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ DeviceMotion baton (high-pass + adaptive-threshold peak detector, 180 ms debounce, median-of-3) вЖТ three.js never-closing Lissajous; iOS `requestPermission()` synchronous in the Start click; tap-tempo desktop fallback. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~18kB; builder fixed a ring-buffer trail bug in `render.ts`). **Lost:** device-motion repeats the *immediately prior* cycle's input (`566-kids-shake-band`, cycle 408) вАФ the "too similar" cross-cycle trap (the same reasoning that sank ¬І408's mic sibling). The most phone-native вАФ resurrect when device-motion clears the recent window, or as 568's mobile companion mode.

**Curate вАФ why 568 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (#2+#3+#4, #1 contestable, #5 honestly unavailable) and dodged the SVG ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **diversity / the "too similar" mandate** вАФ 570's device-motion repeats cycle 408's exact input; 569's tap is finger-on-glass (jury's flagged lane); 568's camera hand-tracking is the freshest input vs the last 4 cycles AND the directest dodge of the 7√Ч finger ban; (2) **the jury-#4 literal answer** вАФ "two gestures set incommensurable tempi" is *exactly* 568 (each hand a conductor of one voice), the single-user form of the jury's "two people's gestures"; (3) **embodiment + surprise (Karel's #2)** вАФ conducting two tempi with two hands in the air is the most viscerally embodied of the three (metric dissonance you feel in your arms), the lab has never shipped a gesture-conducted instrument; (4) **glance-robustness** вАФ all three auto-demo silently from frame one, but 568 also lets Karel grant the camera and *actually conduct* at his 06:30 review. 569 (the cleanest + most legible вАФ the cycle-3 viz to borrow) + 570 (the phone-native companion) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І409 вЖТ `rm -rf 569 570` with ABSOLUTE paths (heeding ¬І408's persisted-cwd no-op trap) вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `568-conductor-hands/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED вАФ status `completed` вАФ before removal, heeding ¬І399/¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson) вЖТ grep-scanned the winner for ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; the one `as any` [`webkitAudioContext`] carries an `eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`; no `ts-nocheck`; no api route; README link present) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 71s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (445/445)`** (444вЖТ445 = the one new route), `/dream/568-conductor-hands 5.5 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js + MediaPipe). **Clean first run вАФ no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; **zero** errors/warnings referencing the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio/GPU in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (568):** (a) **not run in a real browser** вАФ verified by the builder's `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint + the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **MediaPipe handedness вЖТ user-hand mapping** вАФ the "Right" label is mapped to the user's left hand (mirror convention); unconfirmed live, worst case the two voices swap which hand drives them (harmless). (c) **beat-apex tuning** вАФ the velocity threshold (`0.002` normalized/frame) + 150 ms debounce are reasoned defaults, untuned against real conducting gestures / varying frame rates. (d) **GPU-delegate fallback** вАФ MediaPipe requested with `delegate:"GPU"`; on devices without WebGL2 for the delegate it may throw вЖТ falls back to tap pads rather than retrying `"CPU"`. (e) **visual phase vs audible beat** вАФ markers integrate phase on the rAF clock while audio schedules on the AudioContext clock; the beat *flashes* are scheduler-driven (stay aligned) but the orbiting markers can drift tens of ms over long sessions, uncorrected. (f) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; the README `<Link>` to the GitHub README is an external link (no 404 route, unlike the lab-wide `./README.md` pattern). The frame-one silent auto-demo + tap-pad fallback are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the perpetual drift; and since Karel reviews on a device with a camera, he can actually conduct it.

## Cycle 408 вАФ 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (408 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **WIDE** (3 orthogonal off-glass explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `566-kids-shake-band` вАФ **Shake the tablet like a maraca and a whole Brazilian batucada band dances and plays back in time: gentle jiggles ring the chocalho shimmer, big arm-swings bring in the surdo bass drum, and five glowing 3D characters bounce + flash on a darkened stage, one per instrument. The child's whole arm is the instrument вАФ off-glass, embodied, joyful.**

**The build (winner `566`):** off-glass shake input + three.js stage + synthesized percussion ensemble + always-on groove bed. (1) **DeviceMotion shake-onset detection** (`motion.ts`) вАФ `accelerationIncludingGravity` magnitude вЖТ adaptive threshold (1.4√Ч rolling average, 3.5 m/s¬≤ floor) with an 80 ms refractory; intensity tiers (вЙИ3/9/18 m/s¬≤) select which instrument fires; iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` called synchronously inside the Start click (the `await` after). (2) **Pointer-drag-velocity fallback** вАФ drag speed in px/ms drives the same magnitudeвЖТhit mapping so it's playable on a laptop/denied-permission. (3) **Web Audio batucada voice pool** (`audio.ts`) вАФ five from-scratch synth voices (surdo = sine 130вЖТ42 Hz pitch-drop, caixa = bandpass noise + triangle snap, repique = sine + noise transient, agog√і = three sine partials, chocalho = soft bandpass-noise grain); master `gain вЖТ lowpass(7.5 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10 dB, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter so even a hard slam can't spike a child's ears. (4) **Groove-bed scheduler** вАФ a look-ahead loop at 92 BPM plays a 16-step batucada pattern (surdo 1+3, caixa 2+4, repique fills, agog√і accent on 1, chocalho off-beats) always-on, so the child's shakes layer ON TOP of a musical bed and it always sounds good. (5) **three.js stage** (`page.tsx`) вАФ five glowing `IcosahedronGeometry` characters (`MeshStandardMaterial` emissive) with per-character `PointLight` flash + spring-physics bounce (exp ~50 ms decay вЖТ feels immediate), gentle camera sway. (6) **Zero-permission auto-demo:** CSS-animated colored orbs bounce from frame one (audio waits for the Start gesture for autoplay rules), and the groove bed plays itself once started вАФ so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a dancing band. **Motion denied/unsupported вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + drag fallback active.** **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client DeviceMotion [local sensor, never recorded/uploaded] + Web Audio + three.js вАФ no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three@^0.182.0` already in package.json).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted вАФ the recurring container-drift, same as 404/405/406/407); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `8efb487` = cycle 407 `564-piano-splat-cathedral` вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **564**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **565/566/567** to three builders (verified free; the ¬І407 banked-seed slugs 562/563 left untouched as text).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І408):** WebSearch across real-time browser audio-visual + kids face/expression interaction, June 2026. Surfaced **Aalap Davjekar, "I Turned My Browser into a Visual Synthesizer" (Medium, May 2026)** вАФ a full in-browser visual synth at 60 fps driving MediaPipe selfie-segmentation silhouette + spring-physics typography off live FFT mic data; current-month, client-buildable, genuinely surprising as an *architecture* (segmentation + audio + physics composited per-frame in a browser). **But it binds cleanly to a camera-BODY/silhouette piece вАФ the exact lane the jury flagged as trodden (and the lane this kids cycle deliberately avoided)** вАФ so I do NOT claim #5 for today's build; logged honestly as a future-prototype seed (a "your shadow is a creature painted by your own voice's spectrum" piece). Also confirmed **MediaPipe Face is NOT a lab-first** (grep: `258-kids-mirror-pets`, `423-kids-face-beat` already use it), which killed a face-creature explorer's novelty edge before spawning. **Chain visible:** dive (no kids-appropriate <14-day technique that dodges the trodden camera-body lane) вЖТ today's build leans on the diversity menu's *cross-modal off-glass* lane instead (accelerometer вЖТ percussion), honestly NOT a research-bind cycle.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: WIDE** вАФ alternation (407 DEEP вЖТ 408 WIDE) + Karel's standing "too similar" complaint вЖТ three unrelated off-glass directions in one fire. JURY 2026-06-12 names NO kids spine to DEEP-extend (its kids note #6 = `518-living-ember`, already extended by `549` in cycle 402) вЖТ the jury-naming-overrides-alternation rule does not fire вЖТ WIDE stands.
- **Action = Build new (kids, even cycle).** No blocker, no in-progress kids thread; a fresh WIDE kids fire.
- **Ambition floor (winner `566`): honest 3/5** вАФ `ambition: #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (DeviceMotion onset detection + Web Audio percussion pool + groove scheduler + three.js character stage + drag fallback = 5) + #3 named reference that DRIVES the build (Brazilian batucada bloco вАФ the shake-intensity tiers ARE the ensemble's dynamic hierarchy: chocalho shimmer on top, surdo as the heavy bottom; the 16-step bed is a real batucada pattern; also Evelyn Glennie's whole-body-rhythm philosophy)`. **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ accelerometer input (417-cradle, 553-tilt) and synth percussion both exist; the fresh element is *shake-acceleration вЖТ percussion ensemble*, an interaction not a lab-first technique, framed honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** (the dive's bind is to the avoided camera-body lane; said plainly). All three explorers cleared the floor identically (#2+#3); curation decided on cross-cycle diversity + surprise + glance-robustness, not floor height.
- **Diversity audit (last 10 prototypes 564/559/557/553/552/549/545/541/538/537):** OUTPUT **SVG = 4√Ч** (559/552/549/538) вЖТ **BANNED**. INPUT: finger-on-glass family 3√Ч (541/537/538), not вЙ•4; audio-file 2√Ч (564/557). TECH: no core вЙ•4 (Gaussian-splat 2√Ч). VIBE: kids 5√Ч (structural, alternation); within-kids calm-sensory only 1√Ч (541), not banned. Standing JURY rolling-15 bans also honored: WebGPU-compute OUTPUT, Canvas2D OUTPUT, GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH, finger-on-glass-default INPUT, calm-sensory-kids VIBE. `banned = [SVG OUTPUT (rolling-10 4√Ч) + the standing jury set] ¬Ј picked(566) = [**device-motion / shake INPUT** (off-glass вАФ distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs: mic @406, tilt/orientation @404; the directest dodge of the finger reflex) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [4√Ч], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]; three.js sat at 2√Ч) ¬Ј **accelerometer-onset вЖТ percussion-pool TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field GPU drone вАФ the banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **energetic/celebratory/embodied VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вАФ a dancing band you drive with your arm; the directest answer to jury #6 "break the calm-sensory autopilot")]` вАФ clean on the live SVG ban and every standing jury ban. The WIDE trio spread INPUT mic-sing/shake/camera-color √Ч OUTPUT WebGL2/three.js/WebGL2 √Ч TECH harmonizer/percussion-pool/hue-sonification вАФ three genuinely orthogonal off-glass directions.
- **Love-aware bias:** the loved kids rhythm/embodied cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`вЭ§пЄП вАФ rhythm play; `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП, `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП вАФ device/physics play) softly backs a shake-driven percussion instrument; additive вАФ the diversity + ambition gates governed.

**Act вАФ WIDE fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, three orthogonal off-glass inputs √Ч non-banned renderers; numbers pre-allocated 565/566/567; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**
- **`566-kids-shake-band` (WINNER, shipped)** вАФ SHAKE (DeviceMotion) вЖТ three.js вЖТ Brazilian batucada dancing band.
- **`565-kids-sing-choir` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І408, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ MIC-sing live pitch вЖТ raw-WebGL2 particle creatures вЖТ Jacob Collier-style 4-voice live vocal harmonizer (you become the lead of a chord). Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~746, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **Lost on the DIVERSITY gate, not quality** вАФ its input is **mic**, exactly what the *immediately prior* kids cycle (406 clap-canon) used; repeating the previous kids cycle's primary modality is the "too similar" trap. Also the riskiest unverified surface (pitch detection on a breathy 4yo voice). The biggest *concept* of the trio вАФ resurrect the next time the diversity audit clears mic.
- **`567-kids-color-garden` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І408, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ rear CAMERA dominant-color вЖТ raw-WebGL2 instanced glowing plants вЖТ Scriabin hueвЖТpitch garden the real world grows. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~517, `audio.ts`, `vision.ts`, `render.ts` ~392). **Lost:** camera-color is thematically adjacent to the existing `368-kids-rainbow-quest` (foraging quest) and camera is the jury-flagged trodden input lane; also the most lighting-fragile for the hands-free glance.

**Curate вАФ why 566 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (3/5, #2+#3; no #5 bind honestly available for a kids cycle) and dodged the SVG ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **cross-cycle diversity / the "too similar" mandate** вАФ 565's mic input repeats cycle 406's exact modality, where 566's shake/accelerometer is distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs (mic @406, tilt @404); (2) **surprise + embodiment** (Karel's #2) вАФ the lab has never shipped a shake-driven percussion ensemble; the child's whole arm is the instrument, the most embodied of the three; (3) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** вАФ Karel reviews *on his phone*, so he can **literally shake it to play**, and the zero-permission auto-demo groove + bouncing orbs show a dancing band even with no sensor grant, where 565 needs the child to sing sustained pitch and 567 needs a rear camera + good lighting + colorful objects; (4) **answers jury #6 directly** вАФ an energetic dancing band breaks the calm-sensory-kids autopilot the jury flagged. 565 (the biggest concept вАФ resurrect when mic clears) + 567 (the off-the-couch explorer) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І408 вЖТ `rm -rf 565 567` (note: first `rm` attempt silently no-op'd because a prior `cd` into the 566 subfolder had persisted the shell cwd вАФ re-ran with absolute paths and confirmed via `git status`) вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `566-kids-shake-band/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED вАФ status `completed` вАФ before removal, heeding ¬І399/¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson) вЖТ grep-scanned the winner for known ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; both `as any` casts carry `eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`; all `let`s genuinely reassigned; no `ts-nocheck`) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 92s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (444/444)`** (443вЖТ444 = the one new route), `/dream/566-kids-shake-band 5.07 kB / 293 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js). **Clean first run вАФ no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; **zero** errors in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no accelerometer/audio/WebGL in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (566):** (a) **iOS motion-permission timing** вАФ `requestPermission()` must fire synchronously inside the click handler before the `await`; the code does this, but it's untested on real iOS hardware. (b) **accelerometer calibration** вАФ the magnitude tiers (3/9/18 m/s¬≤) are heuristic; the adaptive threshold (1.4√Ч rolling avg, 3.5 floor) should compensate but a very calm phone sensor may need tuning (over/under-fire). (c) the groove scheduler is **`setTimeout`-based look-ahead, not the tightest sample-accurate `setInterval`+scheduleAhead** вАФ at 92 BPM it's fine for a demo but may drift slightly under heavy main-thread load. (d) **60 fps on low-end Android** вАФ the scene is light (5 meshes + 5 lights) but unprofiled on entry-level tablets. (e) `webkitAudioContext` path untested on old Safari; the README `<Link>` to `./README.md` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The zero-permission CSS auto-demo + always-on groove are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a dancing band; **and since Karel reviews on his phone, he can shake it to actually play.**

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 409 (adult, odd):** alternation says DEEP next (408 was WIDE), unless the next jury names a piece. The standing highest-value adult move remains a SECOND honest **4/5** вАФ cycle 405 landed the first (557 splat-galaxy). **564 cycle-3 (the splat spine)** is the obvious DEEP candidate: swap the cathedral's two-axis anisotropy for `563`'s full EWA covariance projection (banked IDEAS ¬І407) + load a REAL captured `.splat` scene вЖТ the reconstruction-grade cathedral (the clean 5/5 path).
- **566 cycle-2 (if Karel loves it):** add shake-DIRECTION вЖТ instrument selection (left/right/forward picks a different drum), a two-kid mode (two phones each a section of the band), tune the magnitude tiers from real-device data, swap the `setTimeout` bed for a sample-accurate scheduler.
- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ¬І408):** `565-kids-sing-choir` (Jacob Collier live vocal harmonizer вАФ resurrect when mic clears the diversity audit) + `567-kids-color-garden` (Scriabin world-grows-a-garden вАФ resurrect when the camera lane is clear).
- **Carried open spines:** Splat (557вЖТ564, the strongest 4/5 lineage), Xenharmonic Drone (538вЖТ552), Companion/Presence kids (518вЖТ549), Polytempo/conducted-canon (514вЖТ545), Living Earth (463вЖТ471), Resonant Room (475вЖТ486), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532вЖТ557), Living-flock (537), Liquid-light kids (541), Tilt-fountain kids (553), Clap-canon kids (559), Shake-band kids (566, NEW).

**Notes:**
- **Jury alignment (2026-06-12):** answers provocation **#6** (break the calm-sensory-kids autopilot вАФ an energetic dancing band, active embodied rhythm, not a 90-second glow toy) AND **#3** (off-glass input вАФ accelerometer shake, not a finger on glass). Did NOT hit headline **#1** (a 4/5) вАФ honestly reported the floor at 3/5 (no <14-day #5 bind available for a kids cycle that dodges the trodden camera-body lane) rather than gaming a phantom score; the 4/5 chase is the adult-cycle target (409).
- One commit, prefix `dream: cycle 408:`.
