## Cycle 407 вАФ 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (407 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `564-piano-splat-cathedral` вАФ **Cycle 2 of the splat spine, the "massively bigger concept": Karel's real Welcome Home piano doesn't just make a cloud вАФ it BUILDS A CATHEDRAL. A luminous Gothic nave of anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian splats вАФ floor вЖТ columns вЖТ arches вЖТ transept вЖТ vault вЖТ rose window вАФ raised element-by-element by the music's onsets, lit by pitch, that you fly down the centre of. Stateful, not a loop: a floor + one column pair at second 10; the full vault and a blooming rose window by minute 3.**

**The build (winner `564`):** three subsystems + long-form state. (1) **Audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch detection** (`audio.ts`) вАФ on the Begin gesture, `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, `decodeAudioData`, 4 s timeout, looped) вЖТ an always-on **synth-piano fallback** (warm partials, hammer envelopes, diatonic/lydian arpeggios with clear onsets) so it ALWAYS sounds offline; master chain ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Per frame: spectral flux vs adaptive EMA вЖТ onset; spectral peak вЖТ pitch вЖТ hue; energy вЖТ loudness. (2) **Procedural cathedral geometry + build sequencer** (`cathedral.ts`) вАФ the nave is pre-generated at startup as typed-array splat positions/axes/radii for an ordered element list (floor 160 ¬Ј 5 column pairs 120 ea ¬Ј 5 arches 80 ea ¬Ј 2 transept arms 140 ea ¬Ј 4 vault bays 200 ea ¬Ј rose window 240 ¬Ј ambient 80); onsets raise the next element **in architectural order** (floor up, columns before arches before vault), permanent once raised, re-lit by later onsets вАФ so the piece is demonstrably different at minute 3 than second 10 (long-form state/memory, not a loop). (3) **Anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian-splat rasterizer (the cycle-2 technique leap)** вАФ each splat is an **oriented ellipse**, not 557's isotropic circle: per-splat world axes (`axisA/axisB`) aligned to its surface (column shaft = vertical flakes, arch = tangent flakes, vault = flat ceiling patches, rose = radial petals); the vertex shader projects the axis tips to screen space (EWA-style tip-projection, Zwicker 2001 вАФ a two-axis approximation, NOT full covariance) вЖТ an oriented stretched quad; the fragment evaluates an elliptical Gaussian + a small additive emissive core for glow. **Every frame the live splats are depth-SORTED back-to-front by view-Z and composited with `gl.blendFunc(SRC_ALPHA, ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA)`, depth-test OFF** вАФ real alpha-over occlusion (a near column genuinely hides a far one), the correctness leap 557's additive-no-sort renderer lacked. Camera slowly flies forward down the nave + auto-rotate; orbit-on-drag + wheel zoom. **Pre-Begin auto-demo:** synthetic onsets build + light the cathedral from frame one, zero permission (the 06:30 hands-free phone-glance safety net); audio waits for the Begin gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET вАФ no side effects, no secrets, same pattern as 557/532/283). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted вАФ the recurring container-drift, same as 403/404/405/406); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `3c19de8` = cycle 406 `559-kids-clap-canon` вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **559**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **562/563/564** to three builders (verified free; the ¬І405/¬І406 banked-seed slugs 556/558/560/561 left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І407) вАФ a genuinely current-month well:** WebSearch across browser/real-time Gaussian splatting, June 2026. Found the consistent 2026 signal that **real-time, depth-SORTED, anisotropic (EWA-projected) 3DGS is now a phone-grade browser commodity** вАФ **SparseStreet** (arXiv 2606.03909, June 2026; ICMR '26 Jun 16вАУ19), **MOBILE-GS** (ICLR 2026, 116 FPS sorted 3DGS on a phone), **WebSplatter** (arXiv 2602.03207, Feb 2026), Visionary (WebGPU full-GPU sort), antimatter15/splat (canonical CPU-sort WebGL). The bindable hook: 557 (cycle 1) deliberately took the cheap path вАФ **isotropic** billboards, **additive**, **no sort** (flat glow, no occlusion); the wave says the honest renderer is now affordable, so cycle 2's job is the **correctness leap to anisotropic + per-frame sorted alpha-over**. **Chain visible:** dive (2026 = sorted anisotropic 3DGS is browser-commodity; 557 took the cheap path) вЖТ today's build leaps to the honest renderer AND arranges it into a buildable architecture.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** вАФ alternation (406 WIDE вЖТ 407 DEEP) + the orchestration guide's "one massive concept via parallel approaches." JURY 2026-06-12 #1 (the headline, 8 juries running) = "chase a 4/5 вАФ take a piece to cycle 2 AND bind a <14-day finding." 557 (¬І405) landed the lab's FIRST honest 4/5 on the splat technique; the highest-value adult move is to make it *bigger*, not merely more correct вЖТ DEEP cycle-2 of the splat spine. Three approaches attacked one concept (*his real piano sculpts a real anisotropic depth-sorted splat field*) via three forms/renderers.
- **Action = Build new (adult, odd cycle), advancing the splat spine to cycle 2.** No blocker, no in-progress adult thread whose output is over-represented.
- **Ambition floor (winner `564`): honest 3/5, 4/5 arguable** вАФ `ambition: #1 anisotropic + depth-SORTED alpha-over Gaussian-splat rendering (a technique the lab has NEVER rendered вАФ 557 was explicitly isotropic + additive + UNSORTED; contestable only because 564's anisotropy is a two-axis approximation, not full covariance вАФ discounted honestly) + #4 multi-cycle splat spine (cycle 2; cycle 3 = swap in 563's full EWA covariance) + #3 named refs that DRIVE it (Kerbl 3DGS SIGGRAPH 2023; Zwicker EWA 2001; antimatter15 CPU-sort; James Turrell architectural-light; Refik Anadol)`. **#5 soft/contestable** (the dive is genuinely current-month вАФ SparseStreet June 2026, MOBILE-GS вАФ and motivates the leap, but the rendering MATH is foundational, so I do NOT hard-claim it). **Plus a real extra signal the others lacked: long-form STATEFUL evolution** (the cathedral builds + is different at min 3 than sec 10 вАФ the jury's "long-form generative with state/memory" menu lane). Floor rests cleanly on **#1 + #3 + #4 = 3/5**, honestly reported (no phantom 4/5). All three explorers cleared the floor identically; curation decided on surprise + concept-size + glance-robustness.
- **Diversity audit (last 10 prototypes 559/557/553/552/549/545/541/538/537/532):** OUTPUT **SVG = 4√Ч** (559/552/549/538) вЖТ **BANNED**. INPUT: finger-on-glass family 3√Ч (541/538/537), not вЙ•4; audio-file 2√Ч (557/532). TECH: no core вЙ•4 (Gaussian-splat only 557 in the last 10). VIBE: kids structural (alternation), no adult vibe вЙ•4. Standing JURY rolling-15 bans also honored: WebGPU-compute, Canvas2D, GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone, finger-on-glass-default, calm-sensory-kids. `banned = [SVG OUTPUT (rolling-10 4√Ч) + the standing jury set] ¬Ј picked(564) = [**audio-file INPUT** (his real piano вАФ off-glass, NOT a finger; the inverse of every banned input) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [4√Ч], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned], NOT three.js; WebGL2 sat at 2√Ч вАФ 557/532) ¬Ј **anisotropic depth-sorted Gaussian-splat TECH** (renders his RECORDED music вАФ the exact INVERSE of the banned "simulate a physical medium, sonify its field statistics" drone) ¬Ј **architectural/sacred/Turrell-Anadol VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids, NOT the cerebral-meditative-drone cluster вАФ a vivid built spectacle you fly through)]` вАФ clean on the live SVG ban and every standing jury ban.
- **Love-aware bias:** the loved piano-visualizer cluster (`163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП pattern reused by 283/532/557) softly backs feeding his real Welcome Home piano; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act вАФ DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, ONE concept вАФ *his real piano sculpts a real anisotropic, depth-sorted Gaussian-splat field* вАФ via three forms/renderers; numbers pre-allocated 562/563/564; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**
- **`564-piano-splat-cathedral` (WINNER, shipped)** вАФ splats arranged into a Gothic cathedral the music BUILDS + you fly through; anisotropic two-axis + depth-sorted alpha-over; long-form stateful build.
- **`563-piano-splat-ewa` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І407, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ the reconstruction-grade renderer: full EWA covariance projection (quaternion вЖТ ќ£ вЖТ Jacobian вЖТ conic вЖТ eigenvalue-bounded quad) + premultiplied alpha-over + per-frame sort. Complete + build-reviewed (`splat-renderer.ts` ~28kB, all math hand-rolled). **Lost:** the cleanest #1-technique, but the *experience* is another orbitable glowing cloud (adjacent to 557's galaxy) where 564 is a categorically new experience. **The cycle-3 path: swap 564's two-axis approx for 563's full covariance вЖТ a reconstruction-grade cathedral.**
- **`562-piano-splat-aurora` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І407, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ anisotropic splats stretched into flowing aurora ribbons (axis вЖТ screen ќЄ + ѕГMajor/ѕГMinor; bright=thin sharp, dark=fat puff), depth-sorted alpha-over + emissive core, Anadol palette. Complete + build-reviewed (`splat.ts` ~22kB). **Lost:** also a "cloud you orbit," conceptually adjacent to 557; the *anisotropy-from-flow-tangent* trick is the keeper for any future ribbon splat piece.

**Curate вАФ why 564 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (#1+#3+#4, #5 soft) and dodged every ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **the "massively bigger CONCEPT" + Karel's standing "too similar in design and theme" complaint** вАФ 557 was already a glowing cloud you orbit; 562 (ribbons) and 563 (EWA cloud) both advance the RENDERER but keep the same cloud EXPERIENCE, while 564 is a categorically different experience (a *building* his music raises, that you fly through) вАФ the directest answer to "stop shipping variants, ship massively bigger concepts"; (2) **an extra ambition axis the others lack вАФ long-form STATEFUL evolution** (the jury's "long-form generative with state/memory" menu): the cathedral assembles floorвЖТvaultвЖТrose-window over minutes and is genuinely different at min 3 than sec 10; (3) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** вАФ a recognizable cathedral assembling itself reads instantly at a 10-s glance where an abstract splat cloud is ambiguous, and 564's deterministic pre-generated geometry is the least numerically fragile (563's full-EWA conics carry degenerate-splat risk). 563 (the reconstruction-grade renderer) + 562 (the ribbon renderer) banked as the splat-spine's alternate renderers + the explicit cycle-3 path.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І407 вЖТ `rm -rf 562 563` вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `564-piano-splat-cathedral/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED вАФ status `completed`, not running вАФ before removal, heeding ¬І399/¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson) вЖТ grep-scanned the winner for the known ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers, no `WebGL2RenderingContext | null` narrowing trap, no api route, README link present) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 45s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (443/443)`** (442вЖТ443 = the one new route), `/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral 8.48 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static. **Clean first run вАФ no fix attempt needed** (the builder reported zero TS errors on its own pass). **Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (564):** (a) **the real-piano fetch** (`/api/audio/549fc519-вА¶`) JSON-vs-bytes shape, CORS, and `decodeAudioData` codec are unconfirmed here вАФ the synth fallback is the guaranteed path. ## Cycle 406 вАФ 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (406 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **WIDE** (3 orthogonal off-glass explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `559-kids-clap-canon` вАФ **Steve Reich's phasing, for a 4-year-old: clap a rhythm into the mic, two friendly blobs clap it back, then one drifts ~1.8% faster so the patterns slide unison вЖТ shimmering interlock вЖТ unison over ~30вАУ40 s; a big phase-wheel with two chasing dots makes the drift VISIBLE. The jury's #4 "time-tension piece вАФ but it had no children" answered literally.**

**The build (winner `559`):** four subsystems. (1) **mic clap/onset detection** вАФ `getUserMedia({audio})` вЖТ `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); per-rAF time-domain RMS vs a fast-attack/slow-decay EMA background; onset fires when `rms > max(0.015, ema¬Ј2.5)` with a 120 ms refractory; 2вАУ6 detected claps вЖТ an inter-onset-interval array (a ~2 s silence commits; <2 claps вЖТ a default Reich-style 6-clap pattern so it ALWAYS works). (2) **phase-canon scheduler** вАФ two voices share the IOI array; voice B's interval √Ч `(1вИТ0.018)` = ~1.8% shorter loop; a 25 ms `setInterval` schedules sample-accurate `start(t)` 120 ms ahead (look-ahead, no `setTimeout`-per-note). Voice A = warm bandpass-noise clap + low sine body; voice B = bright highpass woodblock + triangle tone. (3) **SVG render via direct rAF attribute mutation** (no per-frame React `setState`) вАФ the phase-wheel dots, character body-scale, glow opacity, hand positions all `setAttribute`'d each frame; React state only for discrete UI (clap count, phase word). (4) **character animation** вАФ two cute SVG blob-creatures (ellipses + eyes + hands) flash/scale on each scheduled clap (decay 6√Ч/s), `feGaussianBlur` glow pulse. Master `gain(0.75) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10 dBFS, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). **Hands-free auto-demo:** the phase-wheel + blobs animate from frame one with a built-in pattern (sin-driven flashes) at zero clicks (audio waits for the Start gesture); cancels on interaction, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Mic-denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-anywhere clap fallback** (fully playable). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + Web Audio + SVG вАФ no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted вАФ the recurring container-drift, same as 385/399/403/404/405); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `8bea2f4` = cycle 405 `557-piano-splat-galaxy` вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **557**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). ## Cycle 405 вАФ 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (405 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `557-piano-splat-galaxy` вАФ **THE FIRST HONEST 4/5 IN ~8 JURIES. The lab's FIRST Gaussian-splatting renderer: every note of Karel's real Welcome Home piano BIRTHS a bloom of glowing Gaussian splats, so his performance accretes into a living galaxy of light you orbit вАФ onsets are bursts, sustained notes drift into nebula, pitch paints the color, phrasing draws the arms.**

**The build (winner `557`):** three subsystems. (1) **Audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch detection** (`audio.ts`) вАФ on the Begin gesture, `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode: JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, `decodeAudioData`, looped) with a 4 s timeout вЖТ an always-on **synth-piano fallback** (warm partials, soft hammer envelopes, overlapping C-lydian arpeggios with clear onsets) so it ALWAYS sounds offline; master chain ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Per frame: **spectral flux** (positive bin-to-bin increases) vs an adaptive EMA threshold вЖТ onset; spectral peak вЖТ dominant pitch вЖТ hue; energy вЖТ loudness; centroid вЖТ brightness. (2) **Generative bloom particle system** (`splat.ts`, CPU pool) вАФ an onset spawns ~80вАУ300 splats from a point on a slowly-growing ring (arms, not a blob) with outward shell velocities; loudness вЖТ count+size, brightness вЖТ tight core vs diffuse; a ~13k-splat typed-array pool integrates each frame (Euler + drag + cheap curl-noise turbulence + differential galactic shear) and recycles oldest. (3) **Raw WebGL2 additive Gaussian-splat rasterizer + orbit cam** (`splat.ts`, GPU) вАФ one unit quad via `drawArraysInstanced`; per-instance pos/color/size/alpha via `bufferSubData`; vertex shader billboards each quad to face the camera; fragment shader radial Gaussian `alpha = exp(-4¬Јdot(uv,uv))`; **additive blending** (`SRC_ALPHA, ONE`), depth test OFF вЖТ order-independent (no depth sort вЖТ robust + glowing); hand-rolled `mat4` perspective+lookAt, slow auto-rotate. Pre-Begin, synthetic blooms keep the galaxy alive and turning (the 06:30 hands-off safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET вАФ no side effects, no secrets, the same pattern as 283/532/165). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted вАФ the recurring container-drift, same as 363/368/371/376/385/399/403/404); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `a3e7810` = cycle 404 `553-kids-tilt-fountain` вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **553**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **556/557/558** to three builders (verified free; banked-seed slugs 550/551/554/555 left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І405) вАФ the streak breaks:** since ¬І386 the dive has written "cs.SD is server-ML, #5 unclaimable" **nine times**; JURY 2026-06-12 #5 called the decay out explicitly and named the *other* wells (graphics/WebGPU, TouchDesigner, AV-artist show news). This dive went there and found a real one: **BrightCoding "Run Gaussian Splatting in Your Browser with WebGPU," 2026-06-05 (7 days old)** вАФ 3DGS radiance-field rendering is now a browser commodity (WebGPU + WebGL2 rasterization, no plugins). Corroborated by **arxiv cs.GR June 8вАУ12 2026** (2606.11529 XPR cross-platform point renderer, 2606.11390 multi-GPU GS, 2606.09606 path-traced GS вАФ point-based radiance fields dominate cs.GR this week) and the **DNE√ЧGracia 4D-Gaussian-splatting performance of singer Amy May (2026)** вАФ a musical performer rendered as a streamable in-browser volumetric splat scene. **Chain visible:** dive (browser-splatting wave + a music performer as a splat scene) вЖТ today's build (his real piano sculpts a splat galaxy).

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** вАФ alternation (404 WIDE вЖТ 405 DEEP) + the orchestration guide's "one massive concept via parallel approaches." JURY #1 (the loudest, 8 juries running) = "chase a 4/5 вАФ bind a <14-day finding in the same fire." It suggested *paths* (extend 514 or 520); I rejected both вАФ **520-singing-dune is in the jury's own BANNED GPU-physicsвЖТdrone family** (extending it re-triggers the ban), and **514-polytempo-loom already got cycle 2** (545-motion-loom, cycle 401). The goal is the 4/5 itself; a brand-new #1-technique piece that also binds the fresh finding hits the headline more directly than re-extending. Documented openly.
- **Action = Build new (adult, odd cycle), opening the Gaussian-splat spine.** No blocker, no in-progress adult thread whose output isn't over-represented.
- **Ambition floor (winner `557`): honest 4/5 вАФ the first since the window the jury mourns** вАФ `ambition: #1 never-used technique (Gaussian-splat / point-based radiance-field rasterization; grep-verified вАФ the only prior "splat" in 553 prototypes is fluid-force injection in 119-poem-fluid, a categorically different thing) + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (real-audio fetch+FFT+onset/pitch detection / generative bloom particle system / WebGL2 additive splat rasterizer + orbit cam = 4) + #3 named refs (Kerbl/Kopanas/Leimk√Љhler/Drettakis SIGGRAPH 2023 3DGS; the 2026 in-browser-splatting wave; Refik Anadol volumetric data sculptures; DNE√ЧGracia 4DGS Amy May 2026) + #5 binds a genuinely <14-day finding (BrightCoding 2026-06-05, 7 days; arxiv cs.GR June 8вАУ12; the Amy May 4DGS performance)`. **#4 multi-cycle is the spine intent** (cycle 2 = load a real captured `.splat`/4DGS scene + depth-sorted compositing; cycle 3 = a 4D animated performance synced to his music) вАФ declared, so 4/5 is conservative and could be argued 5/5; I claim **4/5** honestly. All three explorers cleared 4/5 identically; curation decided on surprise + non-redundancy + glance-spectacle.
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH (4√Ч) ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT (7√Ч) ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked(557) = [**audio-file INPUT** (his real piano вАФ off-glass, the directest dodge of the 7√Ч finger reflex) ¬Ј **WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU вАФ both banned at 4√Ч; a wholly new rendering paradigm for the lab; WebGL2 sat at 3√Ч, not banned) ¬Ј **Gaussian-splat radiance-field TECH** (the sound source is his RECORDED music driving a renderer вАФ the exact INVERSE of the banned "simulate a physical medium, sonify its field statistics" move) ¬Ј **volumetric/immersive/Anadol VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids; NOT the cerebral-meditative-drone single-presence cluster вАФ 557 is a vivid expressive accreting spectacle, not a leave-it-running drone)]` вАФ **clean on every jury ban**, and answers #1 (a 4/5 with a fresh bind) + #5 (revive the research-first rule from a non-cs.SD well).
- **Love-aware bias:** the loved piano-visualizer cluster (`163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП pattern reused by 283/532) softly backs feeding his real Welcome Home piano; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act вАФ DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated builders, ONE concept вАФ *his real piano sculpts a navigable cloud of glowing Gaussian splats* вАФ via three render attacks; numbers pre-allocated 556/557/558; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**

- **`556-piano-splat-spectrogram` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І405, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ 3D scrolling spectrogram solid (X=96 log bands, Z=time, Y/brightness=amplitude; ~7,680 splats). Complete + build-reviewed. **Lost:** the most *legible/analytical* but the least *surprising* вАФ a "3D spectrogram" is a familiar AV trope.
- **`558-piano-splat-body` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І405, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ a coherent breathing "body of light," ~20k splats over a parametric Fibonacci-sphere torso, surface displaced in the **vertex shader** by 24 FFT band-lobes (the tightest bind to the Amy May 4DGS performer). Complete + build-reviewed. **Lost:** conceptually adjacent to the existing `283-piano-isosurface` ("piano deforms a breathing 3D volume") вАФ the novelty was mostly the splat *technique*, not the behavior. Strong cycle-2 path: load a REAL captured `.splat` scene instead of a procedural torso.

**Curate вАФ why 557 won:** all three cleared 4/5 identically (#1+#2+#3+#5) and dodged every jury ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **surprise / non-redundancy** (Karel's #2 + his "too similar" complaint) вАФ 557's accretive onset-galaxy has **no sibling in the lab**, where 556 (3D spectrogram) is a familiar trope and 558 (breathing piano-volume) is adjacent to 283-piano-isosurface; (2) **glance-spectacle + robustness** вАФ the additive, CPU-pooled, no-sort galaxy is the biggest visual wow AND the most self-contained/robust path; (3) **the "massively bigger concept"** reads instantly at a 10-s phone glance (a galaxy growing arms from his music). 556 + 558 banked as the alternate renderers for the new splat spine.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І405 вЖТ `rm -rf 556 558` вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `557-piano-splat-galaxy/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; both loser agents had COMPLETED вАФ status `completed`, not running вАФ before removal, heeding ¬І399/¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner. **First run failed** on trivial sequential lint/type errors in `splat.ts`; **ONE fix pass** cleared all three (same triviality class): `prefer-const` on `zl` (line 48), `prefer-const` reported next at 291's block, and a `gl` null-narrowing issue (the explicit `WebGL2RenderingContext | null` annotation defeated narrowing inside the nested `frame` closure вЖТ captured a non-null `const gl = glRaw` after the guard). Rebuild вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 87s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (441/441)`** (440вЖТ441 = the one new route), `/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy 5.96 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static. Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; **zero** errors remain in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (557):** (a) **the real-piano fetch** (`/api/audio/549fc519-вА¶`) JSON-vs-bytes shape, CORS behind a CDN, and `decodeAudioData` on its codec are unconfirmed here вАФ the synth fallback is the guaranteed path. (b) **onset thresholds** (flux EMA + ~1.5ѕГ, 4-frame cooldown) and loudness/centroid scalings are ear-estimated, not tuned against the real recording вАФ dense passages may over-/under-fire. (c) **~13k CPU-integrated splats + per-frame `bufferSubData`** target 60 fps on a laptop GPU; weaker integrated GPUs / high-DPI phones may dip (no adaptive cap yet). (d) **the splats are isotropic additive billboards, NOT true anisotropic covariance-projected depth-sorted 3DGS** вАФ radiance-field-*like*, not photoreal reconstruction (honest; cycle 2's job). ## Cycle 404 вАФ 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (404 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `553-kids-tilt-fountain` вАФ **A 4-year-old TIPS the whole tablet to pour a stream of glowing orbs down through a 3D vertical garden of chimes, bells, and strings вАФ composing a singing waterfall by where they aim the flow. Tilt left/right/forward steers the cascade; each instrument-zone the orbs fall through rings a warm pentatonic note. Active, constructive play вАФ you AIM and BUILD a tune вАФ not another calm glow toy.**

**The build (winner `553`):** four interlocked subsystems + auto-demo. (1) **Tilt input + gravity model** вАФ `deviceorientation` (gamma=left/right, beta=front/back) вЖТ a smoothed (EMA ќ±вЙИ0.08) 2D gravity vector applied to every orb; gravity never reverses (gy stays down). iOS 13+ permission via `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` on the Start gesture; desktop fallback = pointer X/Y вЖТ gravity + arrow keys вЖТ incremental steer; denied/absent вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + pointer fallback auto-activated. (2) **Orb physics + emitter** (`physics.ts`) вАФ a continuous emitter drips one orb / 100 ms from the top; Euler integration under the tilt-gravity; per-orb **AABB collision** against 5 instrument zones; **hard cap 180 live orbs**, retire at >12 s or below the floor, pool recycled each frame (no unbounded growth), slight drag (0.985) prevents runaway. *Discrete rigid orbs that trigger notes on contact вАФ NOT a simulated fluid/field whose statistics are sonified (the jury-banned GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone move).* (3) **Zone-based spatial pentatonic synth** (`audio.ts`) вАФ 5 zones each a distinct timbre (bell = sine+partials; string = Karplus-ish noise-burst+resonant bandpass; chime = triangle√Ч1.5+overtone; marimba; low-bell); pitch varies by horizontal hit position; all C-major-pentatonic (always consonant, kid-safe); per-zone rate-limiting; master `gain вЖТ lowpass(8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10 dBFS, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter; `setTargetAtTime` envelopes; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js render** вАФ additive-emissive glowing orbs, 5 luminous zone-panels that flash when struck, dark Resonance background, glow via additive blending (no postprocessing dep); geometries/materials/renderer disposed on unmount. **Ghost-tilt auto-demo** вАФ a figure-8 synthetic tilt pours orbs + sings from frame one with zero permission/zero taps; cancels on real tilt/pointer; resumes after ~4 s idle (the 06:30 hands-free glance safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted вАФ the recurring container-drift, same as 363/368/371/376/385/403); local stale at an alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `1046d84` = cycle 403 `552-dream-house` вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **552**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **553/554/555** to three builders (verified free; 550/551 are banked-seed slugs from cycle 403, left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І404):** WebSearch across (a) **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker/blendshapes for realtime browser** вАФ mature/foundational (52 blendshapes, `@mediapipe/tasks-vision`), NOT <14 days, and **grep-verified already used twice** (`258-kids-mirror-pets` melody, `423-kids-face-beat` percussion) вЖТ face/expression music is the kids *autopilot* the jury warned against, so it was **dropped**; (b) **Bileam Tschepe/elekktronaut TouchDesigner** вАФ freshest uploads are POPs tutorials Jan-2026 (~5 months), nothing <14 days and TD-POPs don't port to a 4yo's iPad. **#5 NOT claimable** (no <14-day kid-appropriate client-buildable finding; cs.SD still server-ML, carried since ¬І386) вАФ said plainly, the ninth jury running. **The honest structural read:** at ~360+ kids prototypes the easy kids lab-firsts are spent (Hands 524, Face 258/423, Pose 419/268/295, voiceвЖТpitch 549, tilt-marble 169/184, echo-canon 142, boids 537, GPU-fluid 541) вАФ so a kids cycle competes on **ambition + diversity + execution** (the 537/549 precedent: clear the floor via #2+#3, ship a BIGGER/more orthogonal concept), not a thin first-X. **Chain visible:** dive (face = kids autopilot вЖТ drop it; easy #1s spent вЖТ compete on ambition+diversity) вЖТ a WIDE three-explorer kids fire dodging every jury ban.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: WIDE** вАФ alternation: cycles 402 & 403 were BOTH DEEP, and Karel's standing "too similar in design and theme" complaint вЖТ go WIDE (three unrelated directions in one fire). JURY 2026-06-12 names NO kids spine to DEEP-extend (its #6 named `518-living-ember`, but `549` already extended that as Companion/Presence cycle 2 last cycle), so the jury-naming-overrides-alternation rule does not fire вЖТ WIDE stands.

- **Love-aware bias:** the loved kids embodied/mark-making cluster (`83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП вАФ tilt; `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП/`158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП вАФ a child's action becoming a visible/audible thing) softly backs a tilt-driven constructive instrument; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act вАФ WIDE fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, three orthogonal off-glass√Чnon-banned-renderer directions):** `553-kids-tilt-fountain` (TILT вЖТ three.js; pour orbs through a singing chime-garden вАФ **WINNER**) ¬Ј `554-kids-giant-shadow` (CAMERA full-body Pose вЖТ raw WebGL2 GLSL metaball aura вЖТ continuous choir; "your body becomes a giant glowing creature"; Krueger *Videoplace*/Theremin вАФ complete, the biggest *visual/technical swing* + most "wow", lost: heaviest real-iPad risk [PoseLandmarker-CDN + 33-joint metaball SDF shader loop + camera permission] and Pose is the most-used kids input lane) ¬Ј `555-kids-echo-canyon` (VOICE вЖТ SVG canyon вЖТ staggered 4-voice canon/round; explicitly distinct from 549 [no cross-day memory] + 142; round-form/Oliveros вАФ complete, the most *musically refined* + most reliable, lost: least *fresh* вАФ 549 last cycle was also voice/mic, repeating the input family back-to-back). Both losers banked as detailed **IDEAS ¬І404** seeds.

**Curate вАФ why 553 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (3/5, #2+#3; none hit 4/5 вАФ no #5 bind honestly available) and dodged every jury ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **freshness vs recent cycles** вАФ 549 (last kids) was voice вЖТ 555 repeats the input family; 537 was camera-driven; TILT is the scarcest off-glass kids input recently used, so 553 diversifies hardest; (2) **breaking the calm-sensory-kids autopilot (jury #6)** вАФ 553 is *active/constructive* (you aim and build a tune), the directest answer to "stop shipping 90-second glow toys," vs 555's another sing-and-it-answers; (3) **glance-robustness / build-reliability for the hands-free 06:30 phone review** вАФ 553 has NO CDN model and NO camera dependency (ghost-tilt + pointer fallback always shows a pouring, singing fountain), whereas 554's PoseLandmarker-from-CDN + heavy fragment-shader metaball loop is the riskiest of the three on a real device. 554 (the bigger wow) + 555 (the more refined music) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І404 вЖТ `rm -rf 554 555` вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `553-kids-tilt-fountain/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders, heeding ¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson вАФ both loser agents had COMPLETED and their folders were confirmed gone before the build) вЖТ pre-emptively renamed a local `const useGhost` вЖТ `ghostActive` in 553 (a boolean var, not a hook вАФ but `^use[A-Z]` trips the ESLint hook-rule reflex; cheap insurance) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 41s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (440/440)`** (439вЖТ440 = the one new route), `.next/server/app/dream/553-kids-tilt-fountain/page.js` confirmed prerendered (`5.08 kB / 296 kB First Load` вАФ the 296 kB is the three.js bundle, in line with other three.js routes). Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` files; **zero** in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/tilt/WebGL device in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (553):** (a) **iOS AudioContext unlock inside the async `onClick` after the `requestPermission()` await** вАФ the builder's own flagged risk; if Safari drops the gesture-association across the await, audio may not start (mitigation: the limiter is harmless if it does; worth a tap-to-resume guard in a polish pass). (b) **180-orb target smoothness on an older iPad** вАФ `MAX_ORBS` is the obvious knob; the additive-emissive per-orb meshes are the perf cost. (c) **whether the cascade actually reads as "composing a tune"** вАФ the core unverified claim is that aiming the flow at different zones feels like deliberate melody-making vs pretty randomness (the zone layout + pitch-by-position is designed for it, but only a real child's hands confirm it). (d) extreme tilt could starve some zones of orbs (gravity never reverses, so the top zones always feed). (e) the README `<Link>` to the README route 404s (cosmetic, lab-wide pattern). Because the ghost-tilt auto-demo + pointer fallback need zero permission, the 06:30 glance reliably shows a pouring, glowing, singing fountain with no setup.

## Cycle 403 вАФ 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (403 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `552-dream-house` вАФ **The xenharmonic lattice comes ALIVE: a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that slowly walks the just-intonation / BohlenвАУPierce Tonnetz on its own, sustains a pure-ratio drone, drifts forever via the comma pump (never returns home), and is audibly a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1 вАФ zero permission, runs itself.** Cycle 2 of the **Xenharmonic Drone** spine (`538-xenharmonic-lattice` = cycle 1, the static tap-a-Tonnetz piece the JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly named: *"capped at 3 only because it's a one-off вАФ make it a spine and it's the first 4"*). 538 was something you *tap*; 552 is a room you *leave running*.

**The build (winner `552`):** (1) **autonomous lattice walker** вАФ steps a neighbor (u¬±1 fifths / v¬±1 thirds) every 4вАУ8 s, biased toward unvisited nodes; the **syntonic comma (81/80 вЙИ 21.5¬Ґ)** guarantees loops never reclose, so the pitch drifts permanently. (2) **sustained pure-ratio drone** (`audio.ts`) вАФ current node + 2вАУ5 nearest neighbors held as a chord at EXACT rational ratios (never 12-TET); each voice = sine + 3rd/5th odd partials + a ~0.07 Hz detune-LFO shimmer; all attacks/releases via `setTargetAtTime` (3вАУ4 s TCs) so chords never hard-start ("Dream House" crossfade); voice pooling, per-voice gain `0.55/voiceCount`, **8-voice hard cap**, full osc/LFO cleanup on retire. (3) **the long-form arc (the headline)** вАФ an 8-phase ~14-min cycle (gatheringвЖТascendingвЖТfloweringвЖТtritaveвЖТradianceвЖТdissolvingвЖТrecedingвЖТstillness) smoothstep-interpolating **density** (2вЖФ6 voices), a **drifting master lowpass** (700вЖФ4800 Hz), a **¬±0.4-octave register breath**, and a **4-stop tuning migration** (5-JIвЖТBвАУPвЖТ19-EDOвЖТback) вАФ so minute 12 differs from minute 1 in register, density, tuning-world, brightness AND absolute (comma-drifted) frequency. (4) **SVG Tonnetz render** вАФ nodes positioned by (u,v), active chord nodes glowing via `feGaussianBlur`, a **comet-trail** polyline of the walker's path + accumulating dim **visited-ghost dots** (VISIT_MAX=300) so the pilgrimage is *visible*; viewBox pans smoothly to follow the walker; rAF mutates SVG attributes directly (no per-frame React churn); HUD shows tuning, root ratio, voice count, **elapsed clock + phase word**. Optional **tap = "exhale"** (fade current chord, bloom a fresh region) вАФ purely additive; doing nothing is the default. Master `gain вЖТ drifting lowpass вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(20:1, вИТ10 dBFS) вЖТ destination`; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at a cycle-305 alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `e346ad4` = cycle 402 `549-kids-song-friend`); `--ff-only` aborted вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `e346ad4`; max committed dream folder on disk **549**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **550/551/552** to three builders (verified free; 544/546/547/548 are banked-seed slugs from cycles 401/402, left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І403):** WebSearch across arxiv cs.SD/cs.GR June 5вАУ12 2026 + microtonal/JI tuning interfaces. **arxiv cs.SD this window has ZERO just-intonation/microtonal/pitch papers** вАФ it's LLM-jamming (2606.11886) + Bach generation (2606.13626) + deepfake/TTS, i.e. still server-side ML, the recurring honest read вЖТ **#5 NOT claimable** (no <14-day client-buildable finding), said plainly. The dive DID surface a genuinely-relevant recent interface вАФ **LIMITER: A Gamified Interface for Harnessing Just Intonation Systems** (arXiv 2507.08675, **July 2025** вАФ verified date, ~11 months, NOT <14 days) вАФ usable as a *named reference* (#3) and as backing for "make JI navigable/embodied," but honestly not a #5 bind. **Chain visible:** dive (cs.SD = server-ML, #5 unbindable; JURY names 538 to spine-ify; the JI-interface literature backs "make the lattice a place you move through, not tap") вЖТ today's build.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** вАФ JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly names a piece to make a spine ("make 538 a spine and it's the first 4"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (overrides the 402-was-DEEPвЖТWIDE alternation; the jury naming wins). - **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH (4√Ч) ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT (7√Ч) ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked(552) = [**none / autonomous INPUT** (off-glass вАФ the purest dodge of the 7√Ч finger-on-glass reflex; the jury's #3 dared exactly the non-finger/leave-it-running lane; "none" ran only 3√Ч in the window, NOT banned) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU вАФ both banned at 4√Ч; and NOT three.js, which `545` just shipped 2 cycles ago) ¬Ј **JI-lattice-walk вЖТ sustained-pure-ratio-drone TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU-physics drone вАФ the banned meta-technique; the sound source is a tuning lattice, not a sim) ¬Ј **La-Monte-Young / xenharmonic / hypnotic-cerebral VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids)]` вАФ **clean on every jury ban**, and it takes the jury's #3 "leave it running, off the glass" dare head-on.
- **Love-aware bias:** none directly applicable (xenharmonic/drone is a cerebral lane with no love cluster); the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act вАФ DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, one concept вАФ *the xenharmonic lattice as a living, self-drifting, off-glass-steerable Dream House drone-pilgrimage* вАФ via three steering attacks; all share an autonomous-by-default core, comma-pump drift, sustained pure-ratio drone, SVG Tonnetz + comet-trail):** `552-dream-house` (pure autonomous long-form ~14-min arc вАФ **WINNER**) ¬Ј `550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage` (VOICE-steered: autocorrelation pitch вЖТ nearest-node pull, "tune yourself into the drift" вАФ complete, the most *musical/embodied*, lost: builder honestly flagged the autocorrelation detector as basic [octave-confusion/noise] вЖТ least-reliable steering, and 552 is more glance-robust) ¬Ј `551-tilt-pilgrimage` (TILT-steered: iOS-permission deviceorientation вЖТ fifths/thirds drift bias + desktop tilt-pad fallback вАФ complete, the most *physical*, lost: needs the iOS permission dance + a real device, a steering layer not a bigger swing). **Curate вАФ why 552 won:** all three are the same living-Dream-House concept; the deciding axes were (1) **glance-robustness** вАФ 552 needs ZERO permission and evolves on its own, so the 06:30 hands-free phone glance always shows a wandering glowing lattice + a slowly-transforming pure-ratio drone; 550 needs mic (and its detector is weak), 551 needs tilt permission + a real device. (4) **build robustness** вАФ solid voice-pooling + gain-capping + brick-wall limiter, reviewed in `audio.ts`. 550 (voice grab-the-wheel) + 551 (tilt grab-the-wheel) banked as the explicit cycle-3 path.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І403 вЖТ `rm -rf 550 551` вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `552-dream-house/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` (heeding ¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson: both loser agents had COMPLETED and their folders were confirmed gone before the build) вЖТ `rm -rf .next` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 29.5s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (439/439)`** (438вЖТ439 = the one new route), `.next/server/app/dream/552-dream-house/page.js` confirmed prerendered. **Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (552):** (a) **does minute 12 actually FEEL different from minute 1** вАФ the arc is structurally sound (8 interpolated phases + tuning migration + register breath), but whether the perceptual journey lands over a real 14-min listen is the core unverified claim; the HUD phase-word/clock is the legibility crutch for a short glance. (b) **long-run gain / limiter interaction** вАФ voice gain is mathematically capped (`0.55/voiceCount`, 8-voice cap) and brick-walled, but a 20+ min session's compressor-release behavior isn't stress-tested. (c) **iOS AudioContext suspend on screen-lock** вАФ `ctx.resume()` is not wired to a tap-to-resume guard (the builder's own flagged risk); a long unattended phone session could suspend. (d) extreme octave-folded frequencies at far lattice positions (clamped 80вАУ520 Hz √Ч register-shift, but perceptual balance unauditioned). (e) the README `<Link>` to `/dream/552-dream-house/README.md` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide pattern). Because it's fully autonomous with zero permission, the 06:30 glance reliably shows a drifting, glowing, singing pilgrimage with no setup вАФ the strongest glance-safety of any recent piece.

**Queued next + why:**

Standing jury ask remains the **4/5 chase** вАФ and the lab has now twice (401, 403) cleared #4 (spine) but missed #5 (no <14-day bind). The single highest-value move the lab keeps failing: a research dive that mines a genuinely <14-day client-buildable finding from the jury's named non-cs.SD wells (TouchDesigner/Tschepe/Heckmann, Anadol/Akten/Marpi show news, fal/replicate/HF drops, SIGGRAPH/Ars/MUTEK 2026 programs) and BINDS it вАФ that's the only path to the first honest 4/5 in eight juries.

- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ¬І403):** `550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage` (voice-steered вАФ the most musical grab-the-wheel) + `551-tilt-pilgrimage` (tilt-steered вАФ the most physical).

## Cycle 402 вАФ 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (402 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `549-kids-song-friend` вАФ **A creature whose body is literally MADE of the songs a child sings it вАФ it remembers the actual melodies (not a vague energy, not a timer) forever across calendar days, and sings them back, woven and changed, every visit.** Cycle 2 of the kids **Companion / Presence** spine (`518-kids-living-ember` = cycle 1): 518 remembered only humming *energy* within one session; here the friend remembers musical *content* across days and you can SEE it вАФ each song is a petal whose shape traces its pitch contour.

**The build (winner `549`):** (1) **forgiving voiceвЖТpitch capture** вАФ `getUserMedia` вЖТ `AnalyserNode` вЖТ autocorrelation pitch detector tuned for a 4-year-old's high, breathy, wandering voice (clarity threshold + **babble-note fallback** so any vocalization still teaches a note); snaps to **C-major pentatonic** ~2 octaves; a melody = note-index array (cap 12; a ~1.2 s pause commits the song). (2) **cross-day melodic-memory engine** (`memory.ts`) вАФ `localStorage` (`resonance.dream.549`, try/catch): song library + visit count + monotonic `totalNotesEver` + `lastVisit` + simulated `day`; on load the friend GREETS ("you came back!"), is visibly bigger, and surfaces a new-calendar-day return. (3) **recall re-synthesis** (`audio.ts`) вАФ never raw playback: transpose + gently slow + **weave two different days' melodies** into soft counterpoint; warm pentatonic voice; kid-safe master `gain вЖТ lowpass 8 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (20:1, вИТ10 dBFS) вЖТ destination; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **the body IS the songs (SVG)** вАФ each remembered song is a petal/teardrop path whose vertical shape traces that melody's pitch contour, pentatonic degree вЖТ hue; a friendly face (blinking eyes, mouth that opens when it sings, the active petal pulses on each recalled note); idle breathing via direct rAF attribute mutation (no per-frame React re-render); `feGaussianBlur` glow. **Two demo affordances** (the reviewer can't wait until tomorrow): pre-seeded "yesterday's songs" so it sings hands-free from frame one with zero permission, AND an honestly-labelled **"вЬ® pretend it's tomorrow"** button that bumps the visit, regrows the body, and plays a transposed/slowed/woven recall instantly. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded] + Web Audio + SVG вАФ no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to `01af318` = cycle 401 `545-motion-loom`); `--ff-only` aborted вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `01af318`; max committed dream folder on disk **545**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **547/548/549** to three builders (verified free; 544/546 are banked-seed slugs from cycle 401, left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І402):** WebSearch across arxiv cs.SD (still server-side singing-synthesis ML вАФ the recurring honest read, #5 unclaimable from that well) and the kids voice-companion literature. Surfaced one genuinely-relevant fresh-ish finding вАФ a **2026 AccScience study** on children's *developmental* preferences for natural vs. synthetic voice agents (132 kids aged 4вАУ10; willingness-to-interact rises when the agent feels like a known, responsive presence). **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ "online-first 2026" date isn't verifiably <14 days, said plainly вАФ but it backs the design decision that a young child's bond with a voice companion deepens through *memory of content* (it knows your songs) rather than novelty, which is exactly 549's thesis and the differentiator from the timer-aged `322-kids-voice-garden`. **Chain visible:** dive (kids bond deepens via remembered content, not a clock; jury #6 names 518 to extend) вЖТ today's build.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** вАФ JURY 2026-06-12 provocation **#6 explicitly names a kids piece to extend** ("518-living-ember is the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days вАФ extend THAT вАФ a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (this overrides the 401-was-DEEPвЖТWIDE alternation; the jury naming a piece wins). ONE concept (a creature that remembers your *songs* across days) attacked via three render/embodiment approaches.
- **Action = Build new / spine-extension (kids, even cycle).** No blocker, no in-progress thread; the jury's kids-set ask IS the action.
- **Ambition floor (winner `549`): 3/5 solid** вАФ `ambition: #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (voice/pitch capture + cross-day localStorage memory + recall re-synthesis + SVG contour-body = 4) + #3 named refs (Tamagotchi вАФ Aki Maita / Bandai 1996, the original persistent companion; Brian Eno long-form non-repeating) + #4 multi-cycle (Companion/Presence spine, cycle 2 вАФ the jury's #6 ask)`. **#1 made honestly as the contestable case** вАФ "remembering melodic *content* across calendar days, recalled as woven counterpoint, with the body literally drawn from the contours" is a genuine interaction-first for the lab, but **localStorage persistence itself is NOT lab-first** (`322-kids-voice-garden` already persists a calendar-aged creature; `71-shader-evolve` persists a gallery) вАФ so #1 discounts cleanly and the floor rests on #2+#3+#4. **#5 NOT claimed** (AccScience date not verifiably <14 days).
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH (4√Ч) ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT (7√Ч) ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked(549) = [**voice/mic INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger вАФ the jury's most-over-represented reflex at 7√Ч) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU вАФ both banned at 4√Ч; and decisively NOT three.js, which `545` just shipped, so a three.js sibling would be 2-in-a-row) ¬Ј **pitch-detectionвЖТpersistent-memoryвЖТrecall TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone) ¬Ј **companion / relationship / it-remembers-you VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вАФ the differentiator is the bond/memory, exactly jury #6's point)]` вАФ **clean on every jury ban.**
- **Love-aware bias:** Karel's loved kids/voice cluster softly backs it вАФ `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `322`-adjacent voice play, `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вЭ§пЄП (a child's voice/mark becoming a visible thing); additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick.

**Act вАФ DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated builders, one concept вАФ *a creature made of the songs you sing it, remembered across days* вАФ via three render attacks):** `549-kids-song-friend` (SVG body literally drawn from melodic contours + a face вАФ **WINNER**) ¬Ј `547-kids-songkeeper` (three.js glowing creature, each song an orbiting contour-strand вАФ complete, richest idle presence, lost on diversity: three.js 2-in-a-row + less legible than petals-with-a-face) ¬Ј `548-kids-songbloom` (raw WebGL2 GLSL bioluminescent shader grown from memory-seed uniforms вАФ complete, the freshest generative-shader-from-memory idea, lost: memoryвЖТuniform-hash is the *least legible* "see your own songs," no face/character). Both losers banked as detailed **IDEAS ¬І402** seeds.

**Curate вАФ why 549 won:** all three are the same "remembers your songs across days, sings them back woven" concept; the deciding axes were (1) **kid-legibility** вАФ 549's petals-each-tracing-a-song on a creature with a face is the most *concrete, readable* expression of "made of your songs" for a 4-year-old; 547's orbiting strands are more abstract and 548's shader-hash is the least readable connection between *this song* and *that shape*. (2) **diversity by the jury's own mechanical audit** вАФ SVG dodges the banned Canvas2D/WebGPU AND avoids a 2nd-consecutive three.js (545 just shipped it); 547 would have repeated the renderer. (3) **companion VIBE fidelity** (jury #6) вАФ a face that greets you and sings reads as a *relationship*; a full-screen shader (548) reads as an ambience. 547 + 548 banked.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬І402 вЖТ `rm -rf 547 548` вЖТ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `549-kids-song-friend/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` (heeding ¬І401's premature-completion-race lesson: both loser agents had COMPLETED and their folders were confirmed gone before the build) вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (438/438)`, `/dream/549-kids-song-friend 5.75 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static.** Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated files; **zero** in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (549):** (a) **pitch accuracy on a REAL 4-year-old's voice is the core unknown** вАФ autocorrelation is octave-error-prone and a child's voice is breathy/noisy; the clarity threshold + babble-note fallback + pentatonic snapping hide a lot, but the capture timings (`silenceRms`, `MIN_NOTE_GAP`, the 1.2 s commit pause) want field tuning. (b) **SVG perf with a large library** вАФ each song adds a multi-point teardrop path under a `feGaussianBlur`; petal count is unbounded (note cap is 12/song, growth is bounded) so a child with dozens of songs over weeks could stress an old iPad's blur filter вАФ a cycle-3 cap/LOD is the obvious hardening. (c) the README `<Link>` points at `/dream/549-kids-song-friend/README.md` which 404s as a route (cosmetic, a lab-wide pattern вАФ does not break the build). (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. (e) the single `rafRef` is shared between idle-breathing and listening effects вАФ only one is ever live and unmount cancels it, but the dual ownership is slightly fragile. The pre-seeded memory + "pretend it's tomorrow" button are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a friend made of songs, greeting + singing, and visibly growing вАФ with zero permission and no 24h wait.

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 403 (adult, odd):** alternation says WIDE next (402 was DEEP), unless the next jury again names a piece. The jury's standing ask is the **4/5 chase** вАФ take `545`/`514` polytempo OR `538` xenharmonic to a further cycle AND bind a genuinely <14-day finding in the same fire (the #4+#5 stack the lab has missed for seven juries).
- **549 cycle-3 deepening (Companion/Presence spine):** (i) **cap/LOD the petals** for old-iPad perf; (ii) **gate pitch capture on clarity confidence** so noisy capture doesn't over-fill songs; (iii) the bigger swing вАФ let the friend *compose* a genuinely new song overnight by combining what it learned (not just weave-and-transpose), or a simple **call-and-response game** ("sing the part it forgot") so the relationship has turns, not just recall. Bind a fresh kids-voice-interaction finding here for the long-missing #5.
- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ¬І402):** `547-kids-songkeeper` (three.js orbiting-strand creature вАФ the richest idle presence; promote when three.js is scarce) + `548-kids-songbloom` (WebGL2 bioluminescent shader grown from memory вАФ the freshest generative-shader-from-persistent-memory idea; promote as a cycle-3 renderer upgrade).
- **Carried open spines:** Companion/Presence (518вЖТ549), Polytempo/conducted-canon (514вЖТ545), Living Earth (502), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532), Living-flock (537), Xenharmonic (538), Liquid-light kids (541).

## Cycle 401 вАФ 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (401 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `545-motion-loom` вАФ **The MOTION IN A ROOM conducts a Nancarrow polytempo canon: the left and right halves of the camera each carry their own moving rhythm вАФ extracted with NO machine learning, just optical motion energy вАФ and because two real-world motions never lock to a clean tempo ratio, the canon drifts forever and CANNOT be conducted into agreement.** Cycle 2 of `514-polytempo-loom` (the piece JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly named to extend): 514's five voices ran at *composer-chosen* fixed irrational ratios; here the two master tempi are **conducted by the room itself**, off the glass.

**The build:** (1) **no-ML motion extraction** вАФ `getUserMedia` вЖТ hidden 64√Ч48 offscreen canvas вЖТ per-pixel luma frame-difference accumulated for the LEFT vs RIGHT frame halves (two "conductors"), one motion-energy scalar per half per frame (no neural net / MediaPipe / WASM). (2) **autocorrelation tempo** вАФ each half's motion-energy buffers ~6 s; mean-subtracted autocorrelation finds the dominant lag in 40вАУ170 BPM вЖТ BPM, smoothed (ѕДвЙИ1.5 s), **never quantized** so the two tempi form an irrational ratio by default. (3) **polytempo canon engine** ("A Tale of Two Clocks," Wilson 2013) вАФ 5 voices, 0вАУ1 on conductor A (√Ч1, √Ч1/вИЪ2), 2вАУ4 on B (√Ч1, √Ч1/ѕЖ, √ЧѕЖ/2); 25 ms `setInterval` + 120 ms lookahead, sample-accurate `osc.start(t)`; D-pentatonic 2-octave (zero harmonic tension вАФ all drama metric); sine+2.756√Ч bell timbre; master `gain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall (20:1, вИТ12 dBFS) вЖТ destination; AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js loom** вАФ 5 glowing `THREE.Line` threads whose vertices are BPM-phase-driven sinusoids (the visual drift IS the tempo drift) + 160 pooled node-pulse spheres on beat-onsets + slow camera orbit + Ikeda violet/blue/emerald/cyan/purple on #020208 + HTML readouts "Left X BPM / Right Y BPM / ratio ZвА¶ вАФ never rational"; full dispose on unmount. **Ghost-motion auto-demo:** two synthetic motion signals at AвЙИ72 / BвЙИ72вИЪ2 BPM weave + drift from frame one with zero permission; room takes over on detected motion; resumes after ~4 s still. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: Web Audio + camera [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + three.js вАФ no mic, no secrets, no network writes). **No new npm deps** (`three`@0.182 already installed, imported normally вАФ not CDN, not added).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at cycle 305 `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to `bad6b3f` = "jury: verdict 2026-06-12", with cycle 400 `541-kids-liquid-light` at `49b29f7` just beneath it); `--ff-only` aborted вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `bad6b3f`; max committed dream folder on disk **541**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (**exit 0 on the FIRST try this cycle**, 1455 pkgs; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **544/545/546** to three builders (verified free; **skipped 542/543** to avoid reusing last cycle's banked-slug numbers, per the established pattern).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І401):** WebSearch across arxiv beat-tracking (only 2017вАУ2022, server/RNN-side), conducting-gestureвЖТtempo ("visual beats" = max velocity/acceleration of the ictus; foundational), and **spontaneous-motor-tempo science** (biorxiv 2025.09.14 "From Individual to Shared Tempo" + 2025.09.16 "Similarity in Spontaneous Tempo Impacts Flow вА¶ Joint Performance"). **#5 honestly NOT bindable** вАФ the SMT papers are the most *relevant* freshness in months (far more than this week's server-ML cs.SD) but at **~9 months they aren't <14 days**; said plainly even after heeding JURY provocation #5's "mine beyond cs.SD." The actionable bind is a *jury-named* one: JURY 2026-06-12 named **514 to take to cycle 2** + provocation #4 asked for a **conducted tempo-canon where gestures set incommensurable tempi**, and the SMT science supplies the scientific WHY (two bodies' innate tempi rarely match вЖТ the drift is an irreducible human condition, not a composer's trick). **Chain visible:** dive (jury names 514 + #4 вЖТ SMT grounds *why* two bodies can't agree вЖТ no-ML motionвЖТtempo as the off-glass / off-Canvas2D-WebGPU / off-physics-drone attack) вЖТ today's build.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** вАФ JURY.md (read FIRST, per the manual) explicitly names a piece to extend ("take 514-polytempo-loom вА¶ to cycle 2"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (this overrides the 400-was-DEEPвЖТWIDE alternation; the jury naming wins). ONE concept (a conducted polytempo canon) attacked via three input√Чrender approaches.
- **Action = Build new / spine-extension (adult, odd cycle).** No blocker, no in-progress thread; the jury's headline ask IS the action.
- **Ambition floor (winner `545`): 3/5 solid, honest case for 4/5** вАФ `ambition: #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (no-ML motion extraction + autocorrelation tempo + polytempo canon engine + three.js loom = 4) + #3 named refs (Conlon Nancarrow, *Studies for Player Piano* / Study 40 "Transcendental" e:ѕА "probably never aligns" вАФ Kyle Gann; Ryoji Ikeda; autocorrelation tempo-induction; spontaneous-motor-tempo science) + #4 multi-cycle (514 polytempo spine, cycle 2 вАФ the jury's #1 ask)`. **#1 flagged honestly as a cross-modal/application first** (first tempo/rhythm EXTRACTION from camera motion вАФ the lab has audio-onset/beat detection from the MIC at 106/147 and pitch-autocorrelation/YIN at 507, but has **never derived a beat-RATE from visual motion**; genuine and grep-checked, but an application of a known technique, not a brand-new primitive вАФ so it discounts cleanly to 3/5 if the jury disagrees, and the headline 4/5-chase is made *honestly* rather than gamed). **#5 NOT claimed** (SMT papers ~9 months, not <14 days; said plainly).
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH (4√Ч) ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT (7√Ч) ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked(545) = [**camera-motion INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger, NOT ML) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (1√ЧвЖТ2√Ч, the scarcest non-banned renderer вАФ and decisively NOT SVG, which is already 3√Ч and a sibling-ship would have pushed to 4√Ч, the next monoculture) ¬Ј **motionвЖТautocorr-tempoвЖТpolytempo-canon TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone вАФ the jury's banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **cerebral / Ikeda-clinical / metric-tension VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids)]` вАФ **clean on every single jury ban.** The renderer choice was the deciding curation axis (see Curate).
- **Love-aware bias:** none directly applicable (polytempo/time-tension is a cerebral lane with no love cluster); the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act вАФ DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, one concept вАФ *conduct incommensurable tempi with your body* вАФ via three input√Чrender attacks):** `545-motion-loom` (no-ML optical-flow motion energy вЖТ three.js woven threads вАФ **WINNER**) ¬Ј `544-conductors-canon` (MediaPipe **Hands** two-hand conducting вЖТ SVG scrolling loom, 514's exact visual lineage вАФ complete, careful self-report, lost on the diversity audit: SVG already 3√Ч вЖТ a ship makes it 4√Ч) ¬Ј `546-clock-canon` (MediaPipe **Pose** full-body two-arm conducting вЖТ SVG **orbital phase-clock** idiom: dots that sweep + never realign вАФ complete, the fresh-visual-idiom resurrect). Both losers banked as detailed **IDEAS ¬І401** seeds.

**Curate вАФ why 545 won:** all three are the same conducted-Nancarrow-canon concept; the deciding axes were (1) **diversity by the jury's own mechanical audit** вАФ SVG is already 3√Ч in the rolling-15, so shipping a SVG sibling (544 or 546) would make SVG **4√Ч = newly over-represented**, the exact renderer-monoculture the jury is fighting ("the screen surface keeps relocating"); three.js sits at 1√Ч вЖТ 545 is the only one of the three that *lowers* the renderer concentration. (2) **Surprise + off-the-ML-default** (jury provocations #2/#3) вАФ "the room itself can't keep time, extracted with NO ML" is the bigger, more surprising swing than two literal hands, and it's the only approach with zero ML dependency (no MediaPipe model/WASM download to fail on Karel's device). (3) **robustness of LOADING** вАФ 545 needs only `getUserMedia` + WebGL where 544/546 also need the MediaPipe CDN+model. (4) **#1 cleanliness** вАФ 545's "tempo from optical motion, no ML" is a marginally more defensible cross-modal first than 544/546's "beat detection from a tracked landmark." 544 (precision/514-continuity) + 546 (orbital-clock idiom) banked; **both their builder agents had COMPLETED before any folder removal** (see Validate вАФ there WAS a delayed-flush race this cycle, handled).

**Validate:** removed 544/546 folders вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with the winner вЖТ **exit 0**. THEN discovered **546's folder had re-appeared** fully written (its earlier "completed" notification was premature вАФ page.tsx+README flushed *after* my first empty check and after my first `rm`); since 546 had been present during that first build, I **`rm -rf`'d it definitively** (confirmed gone, agent since completed so no further writes) and **re-ran the authoritative build with ONLY `545` present** вЖТ **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 105s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (437/437)`, `/dream/545-motion-loom 5.71 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static** (the 294 kB First Load is the three.js bundle, in line with `537`/`432`). Builder self-reported `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors + `eslint --max-warnings=0` clean on the folder. `git status` clean: only `545-motion-loom/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified; `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no camera/WebGL/audio in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward вАФ unverified surface (545):** (a) **whether autocorrelation on REAL room motion yields a musically-meaningful tempo** вАФ the autocorrelator returns *a* BPM even for near-random motion, so noisy/moderate-motion scenes may read erratically until the 6 s buffer fills; this is the CORE interaction's fidelity and the single most important thing to check live (the ghost-motion auto-demo masks it for the hands-free glance, but a real conductor's experience hinges on it). (b) WebGL `linewidth>1` is not honored on most drivers вЖТ threads render ~1px not as glowing ribbons (the node-pulse spheres carry the glow; cycle-3 fix = `Line2`/`LineMaterial`). (c) O(n¬≤) autocorr per video frame вАФ fine on desktop, may need batching to every 5th frame on low-end mobile. (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. (e) node-pool wraps at 160 simultaneous pulses (artifacts only at 170 BPM √Ч 5). The ghost-motion auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a weaving, drifting, (post-Start) singing canon with zero permission.

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 402 (kids, even):** alternation says WIDE next (401 was DEEP), unless the next jury again names a piece.
- **545 cycle-3 deepening (the polytempo "conducted-canon" spine):** swap `THREE.Line` вЖТ `Line2`/`LineMaterial` so the threads are real glowing ribbons; **gate the BPM update on autocorr peak *confidence*** (only accept a tempo when the autocorrelation peak is sharp вАФ hold last value otherwise) so noisy rooms don't read erratically (the key live-risk fix); add a **phase-proximity heatmap** (514's own cycle-2 hook) as a background luminance that brightens on near-alignments; consider a **two-person** framing (left half = person 1, right half = person 2 вАФ literally two conductors who can't agree, the SMT science made interactive). The chase-the-4/5 path the jury keeps naming: take THIS to cycle 3 AND bind a genuinely <14-day finding in the same fire.
- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ¬І401):** `544-conductors-canon` (MediaPipe Hands вЖТ SVG loom вАФ the precision/514-continuity resurrect; near-shippable, promote first if Karel wants the literal "conduct the loom with my hands" or if three.js underperforms) + `546-clock-canon` (MediaPipe Pose вЖТ SVG orbital phase-clock вАФ the fresh-visual-idiom resurrect; the clock-hands-that-never-realign visual is its own strong concept).
- **Carried open spines:** Polytempo/conducted-canon (514вЖТ545), Living Earth (502), Companion/Presence (518), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532), Living-flock (537), Xenharmonic (538), Liquid-light kids (541).

**Notes:**
- **Process learning (logged for the orchestration playbook, reinforcing ¬І398's):** a builder's "completed" notification can arrive **before its files are flushed** вАФ this cycle 546 reported done with an empty folder, I `rm`'d it, and it then re-appeared fully written. The build still passed (caught it after), but the safe rule is now: **before the authoritative build, re-verify `git status` shows ONLY the winner + docs, and `rm -rf` any re-appeared loser folder; re-run the build if a loser was present during the prior run.** Applied this cycle; final build clean with only 545.
- **Jury alignment (2026-06-12):** directly answers the headline вАФ takes the jury-named **514** to **cycle 2** (provocation #1, the ceiling-chase) as a **conducted tempo-canon** (provocation #4, the second time-tension piece, now embodied), on the **scarcest non-banned renderer** (three.js, dodging the SVG-would-hit-4√Ч trap AND the banned Canvas2D/WebGPU), with **NO simulated-physical-field** (dodging the banned GPU-physics-drone meta-technique) and **off-glass non-finger input** (dodging the 7√Ч finger-on-glass reflex). The dive *honestly* reported #5 unbindable (SMT papers ~9 months) rather than gaming it, while still heeding the jury's "mine beyond cs.SD." One commit, prefix `dream: cycle 401:`.

## Cycle 400 вАФ 2026-06-12 12:26 UTC ¬Ј KIDS build (400 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `541-kids-liquid-light` вАФ **A 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light, and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.** Drag a finger and you inject swirling colored dye into a *real fluid simulation*; the speed and direction of the swirl drive a warm, ever-evolving pentatonic wash. No goal, no words, no wrong move вАФ infinite calm sensory play, with a hands-free "ghost finger" wandering the pool from frame one.

**Primary renderer = WebGPU compute (WGSL):** a real-time **stable-fluids (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999)** solver on a 192√Ч192 `rgba16float` grid вАФ add-forces (finger impulse + Gaussian dye injection) вЖТ semi-Lagrangian advect velocity вЖТ divergence вЖТ **28-iter Jacobi pressure solve** (ping-pong) вЖТ subtract-gradient (divergence-free projection) вЖТ advect dye вАФ then a full-screen-triangle render pipeline tone-maps the dye to luminous glow on dark. **Graceful degradation:** `navigator.gpu` missing / adapter-device-context failure вЖТ a Canvas2D **"lite fluid"** (a few thousand glowing dye particles advected by coarse curl-noise + finger impulse, additive `"lighter"` over a fading dark trail) + a `text-rose-300` "Playing in lite mode вЬ®" notice вАФ still swirls, still sings; this is the iPad safety net (iOS Safari WebGPU is recent/uneven). **Sonification:** swirl-speed вЖТ lowpass brightness + voice count; vertical position вЖТ **C-major pentatonic** register (C3вАУC5, nothing ever wrong); additive triangle/sine wash with `setTargetAtTime` glides; always-on C2+G2 breathing pad (never silent); kids-safe master `gain вЖТ lowpass(вЙ§8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 20:1 brick-wall) вЖТ destination`; AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas вАФ no mic/camera/network/secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again (the recurring container-drift: local stale at cycle 305 `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to cycle 399 `9e96178` = `538-xenharmonic-lattice`); `--ff-only` aborted вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `9e96178`; max committed folder on disk **538**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (FIRST run hit a transient network failure that left node_modules wiped + `next` not found at build time; a SECOND `npm ci` succeeded cleanly, exit 0, 1455 pkgs вАФ package.json/lock untouched). Pre-allocated **541/542/543** to three builders (verified free; 539/540 are banked *text* seeds from ¬І399, NOT folders вАФ skipped to avoid number reuse).

The actionable read: a grep audit confirmed the tension/time/tuning lanes the recent juries keep daring are already *spent* вАФ phasing/Reich/tempo-canon/polytempo all exist (302/375/514/371), cymatics (19/165/360), reaction-diffusion (9), granular (18/227), GPU-fluid (3/15/84/433). So a clean **#1 is NOT claimable** at 540 prototypes вАФ said plainly. The honest steer (same as ¬І398): stop hunting a phantom #1; clear the floor at 3/5 with a *genuinely bigger, more diverse* concept on a *scarce renderer*. The dive surfaced (a) developmental literature on period/phase entrainment + the *scarcity of true GPU-fluid play surfaces for young children*, and (b) Karel's strongest love cluster is **fluid/particle/glow** (`84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП + `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП + `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП + `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП). **Chain visible:** dive (cs.SD = server-ML вЖТ grep confirms tension/time/tuning + the easy kids #1s spent вЖТ pivot to "biggest love-aligned sensory lane on the scarcest kids renderer") вЖТ today's build.

## Cycle 398 вАФ 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (398 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `537-kids-sky-murmuration` вАФ **The child looks UP into a deep 3D dusk sky where a real murmuration of thousands of glowing starlings swirls in volumetric depth вАФ birds near and far, the whole cloud breathing and turning вАФ and the murmuration SINGS; a finger gently shepherds it, and when the cloud splits into sub-flocks you HEAR it split into harmony, resolving back to a chord when it re-merges.** A living weather of birds you stand under. **three.js** `THREE.Points` cloud (~2.5вАУ4k points, additive blending, soft sprite, depth-coded colour near-warm/far-violet, ExpFog, a slowly drifting camera so depth reads), driven by an **emergent 3D boids engine** (Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion, spatial-hash neighbour lookups, boundary avoidance) in `flock.ts`. **Emergent flock state вЖТ harmony** (the murmuration literally sings): cohesion/alignment-order вЖТ harmonic richness & consonance (tight calm cloud = warm settled chord; scattered swirl = brighter, more voices, sparkle); centroid height (Y) вЖТ pentatonic register; up to 4 spatial clusters detected every ~200 ms (`computeClusters`, grid-bucket) each sustain their OWN pentatonic voice so a **split is audible as a new interval and a merge resolves toward unison/octave** вАФ the magic; mean speed/turbulence вЖТ gentle tremolo + airy wash. C-major pentatonic so nothing is ever wrong; always-on C2+G2 ambient pad; master `gain вЖТ lowpass(8 kHz, kids-safe) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 18:1) вЖТ destination`, all `setTargetAtTime`. AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **Always-on auto-demo:** a scripted 3D "ghost shepherd" wanders a Lissajous path and a second attractor phases in/out on a ~12 s cycle so the cloud **visibly divides into harmonising flocks and re-merges, camera drifting, from frame one with zero permission** вАФ the hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a swirling, singing, splitting murmuration; cancels on first pointer-down, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Degradation:** three.js/WebGL context fail вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D 2D dot-flock (CPU boids ~300) that still flocks + sings; audio always continues; geometry/material disposed on unmount. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is already an installed repo dependency вАФ imported normally, NOT via CDN, NOT added).

Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0 from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded; confirmed three@0.182 present). INPUT вАФ camera 2√Ч (524/513), touch/drawing/tilt varied вАФ none 4√Ч. **VIBE вАФ "solitary-presence / never-resolves" вЙ•4√Ч (520/518/514/513) вЖТ BANNED.** TECH вАФ varied. `banned (rolling-10 вЙ•4√Ч) = ["solitary-never-resolves" VIBE] ¬Ј also-avoid (wouldвЖТ4√Ч) = [Canvas2D + SVG OUTPUT] ¬Ј picked(537)=[**touch/multi-touch INPUT** (fresh for the recent window; the core kids verb) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer at 0√Ч вЖТ diversification by the mechanical audit; iPad-safe where WebGPU is not; dodges the Canvas2D/SVG 4√Ч trap) ¬Ј **emergent-3D-boids-flocking вЖТ collective-harmony TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm, not roughness) ¬Ј **joyful / awe / wonder VIBE** вАФ explicitly NEITHER banned pole (not a solitary drone, not a tension-you-resolve puzzle; pure accumulative delight + a flock with its own life that you guide)]` вАФ **dodges the banned never-resolves VIBE AND the Canvas2D/SVG 4√Ч renderer trap, on the single scarcest renderer.**
