Read `397/page.tsx` + `397/ji.ts` + `397/mic.ts` end-to-end before shipping.
- **`397-kids-crystal-bloom` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ mic-loudness вЖТ SVG crystal tower in **just intonation** (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1, 9/4, 5/2 over A2вЙИ110 Hz); additive sine-partial bells, fast attack + long shimmer tail, sustained f0+3/2 drone, soft-clip+compressor limiter (kids-safe). **Won** because it most directly answers the jury's *sharpest* critique simultaneously: a foreign tonal world (#2) that is also the freshest research anchor (#5 вАФ the expensive criterion the jury said is nearly always skipped), a rare renderer (#1, SVG), and the under-served calm/breath/eyes-leaning niche вАФ the cleanest `today's research вЖТ today's build` chain of the three. Robust auto-demo (a synthetic ~7s breath swell blooms + rings the tower hands-free if the mic is denied/silent вАФ the 06:30 phone-glance insurance) + press-and-hold manual fallback. See INDEX/README.
- **`398-kids-rainbow-roll` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І346, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ TILT вЖТ a glowing ball rolls (gravity-by-tilt 2D physics) around a courtyard of gongs in a Balinese **slendro** scale with detuned-pair **ombak** shimmer, rendered in **pure DOM/CSS** (no canvas/svg/webgl вАФ the most literal answer to jury prov #1). - **`399-kids-aurora-step` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І346, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ CAMERA frame-difference motion вЖТ a Canvas2D aurora of upward-drifting additive-glow ribbons + **whole-tone** chimes (the floating, no-leading-tone Debussy sound). - **Honest caveat on the winner (carried to its README):** FFT peak-picking formant detection is approximate and *least* reliable on high children's voices (wide harmonic spacing; /i/ vs /u/ confusable) вАФ which is the literal target user. Mitigated by the no-wrong design (every sound still drives field brightness/glow via RMS, so the toy always responds) and by "aaah vs ooo" being the most child-accessible + most reliably separated pair. ## Cycle 337 вАФ 2026-06-07 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (3 follower algorithms, ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `375-tempo-canon` вАФ the JURY's **#1 adult ask finally taken**: a live **accompanist** that follows YOUR rubato through a known piece, the banked score-follower that lost curation 3√Ч вАФ reframed to dodge every one of its three death-reasons (accompanist not cursor ¬Ј MIDI not mic ¬Ј self-verifying baked performance ¬Ј lab-first warping-path viz)

**Orient / git sync**: `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` вАФ **clean fast-forward** (`2e98f5e..2dd93f5`, +34 commits; HEAD was stale at cycle 305-era, now at cycle 336 `2dd93f5` = last folder `371-kids-clap-along`). No force-push drift this fire. Worked directly on main. `node_modules` was **MISSING** вЖТ `npm ci` (from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from commit). Doc-drift as usual (STATE prepends newest at top; INDEX appends; both lag the folder set вАФ cosmetic, git is source of truth). Max committed folder = 371 вЖТ pre-allocated **374/375/376** to the three builders (372/373 are banked TEXT labels from ¬І336, no folders; collision-free on disk).

**Research dive (mandatory 15-min, logged RESEARCH ¬І337)**: WebSearch on real-time score following / automatic accompaniment 2024вАУ2026. Two strong **dated named anchors** directly on the JURY's standing ask: **Matchmaker** (arXiv:2510.10087, **Oct 2025** вАФ open library for real-time piano score following that *systematically compares online-DTW vs HMM*) + **The ACCompanion** (arXiv:2304.12939 вАФ expressive automatic piano accompanist following soloist tempo/dynamics/articulation), over the foundational **Dixon MATCH (2005, online DTW)** + **Antescofo (Cont, IRCAM, cue-based)**. The dive's real insight: score-following lost curation **3√Ч** and was re-rejected cycle 335 for three reasons вАФ all three **dissolve under a reframe**: build the *accompanist* (plays the part in sync, вЙ† `26-score-follow`'s cursor), drive it from **MIDI/keyboard not mic** (dodges the JURY mic ban), verify it the **358 way** (a baked known-performance with rubato вЖТ self-proves with zero hardware). The JURY's adult provocation #1 literally prescribes this. Chain visible: research вЖТ reframe вЖТ build.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`): 38 loved slugs. Soft pull from the *analysis-made-legible* love cluster (`223-fourier-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП, `157-concept-steer`вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП) вАФ consonant with a legibility-forward follower, but the JURY's explicit #1 ask + ambition/diversity gates governed; no single love forced the pick.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared**:
- **Rotation:** 337 % 2 = 1 вЖТ **adult** (kids resumes 338). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (371 shipped demoable last fire).
- **JURY-directed pick (FEED the legible lane; take the score-follower):** JURY 2026-06-06 provocation #1 = *"Build the obvious next one: a real-time score-follower / live-accompaniment tool (the banked live-accompanist that lost curation 3√Ч on verifiability вАФ solve it the way 358 did, with a known internal answer)."* Cycle 335 took the JURY's *other* option (chord/key analyzer вЖТ `370-tonal-map`), leaving the score-follower the open ask. **Took it.** Directly addresses cycle 335's three documented rejection reasons (see Research above + the ¬І335 entry) вАФ the reframe is the whole point.
- **Mode: DEEP** вАФ ONE concept (*"an accompanist that plays the bass+chords in sync with YOUR rubato through a known piece"*) attacked via **3 distinct follower algorithms**: **online DTW + warping-path** (`375`) ¬Ј **HMM/forward note-event** (`374`) ¬Ј **cue/anchor FSM, wrong-note-robust** (`376`). Alternates off cycle 336's WIDE. DEEP is right here because the JURY wanted depth on a *specific* tool, not three unrelated explorers вАФ and because comparing follower algorithms IS Matchmaker's exact contribution. (Note: cycles 333/334/335 were DEEP, 336 WIDE; this DEEP is justified by the single-concept JURY ask вАФ next adult should consider WIDE.)
- **Ambition floor вАФ winner `375` clears 3 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + multi-cycle-commitment(#4)`.
  - **(#2) вЙ•3 subsystems** вАФ input layer (baked demo / computer-keyboard / Web MIDI, one pipe) + **online-DTW follower** (`dtw.ts`, bounded-window forward recurrence, forward-only commit, slopeвЖТtempo) + **Web-Audio elastic accompaniment** (functional D-major bass+chord, decay scaled by tempo) + **raw-WebGL2 warping-path renderer** = 4.
  - **(#3) Named reference** вАФ **Matchmaker** (arXiv:2510.10087, Oct 2025) ¬Ј **Dixon MATCH** (2005). (The ACCompanion 2304.12939 is the thread's expressive north-star.)
  - **(#4) Multi-cycle commitment** вАФ declared "**The Accompanist**" thread: cycle-1 (this) = alignment core + warping-path + self-verifying demo; cycle-2 = fold the banked HMM follower (`374`) behind a DTW/HMM toggle (Matchmaker's comparison) + ACCompanion-style dynamics/articulation following; cycle-3 = map Karel's real *Welcome Home* melody as the reference score (the legible his-music answer).
  - *Honest:* score-following per-se is NOT lab-first (`26-score-follow` exists) so **#1 is NOT claimed** for the technique вАФ but the **online-DTW warping-path *visualization*** is grep-verified lab-first (no prior alignment-path render) and the live-elastic-*accompanist* deliverable is new; counted conservatively at 3/5 via #2+#3+#4.
- **Diversity audit** (last-10 shipped {371,370,368,365,360,358,355,353,350,347}): VIBE **kids вЙ•5√Ч** (structural rotation вАФ adult cycle is the standing carve-out, not a flaw); INPUT вАФ touch ~3√Ч (360/355/350), mic 2√Ч (371/358), no value вЙ•4 on the discriminating axis; OUTPUT вАФ WebGL2/three.js (GPU) dominate, which is what the JURY *wants more of* (inline-SVG, the JURY's banned output, = 0 here). Plus the standing **JURY hard bans: touch INPUT ¬Ј mic/voice INPUT ¬Ј inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬Ј adult-JI-drone VIBE.** `diversity: banned=[kids VIBE (structural) ¬Ј touch INPUT (JURY) ¬Ј mic/voice INPUT (JURY) ¬Ј inline-SVG OUTPUT (JURY) ¬Ј adult-JI-drone VIBE (JURY)] ¬Ј picked(375)=[**keyboard/MIDI/baked-demo INPUT** (NOT touch, NOT mic) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 warping-path GPU OUTPUT** (NOT SVG; the JURY-encouraged GPU path) ¬Ј **online-DTW alignment + warping-path-viz + elastic-accompaniment TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **instrumental / legible / live-performance VIBE** (NOT a JI-drone)]`. Winner uses **none** of the banned tags. *Honest caveat (same as ¬І335):* the "legible/instructional" VIBE is itself frequent in the last-10 (370/365/358/353) вАФ but the JURY *explicitly directs the lab to FEED that lane* ("that's the direction to feed"), so it's intentional, not a rut. Noted, not hidden.

**Mode / orchestration**: DEEP вАФ 3 folder-isolated Builders (374 HMM / 375 DTW / 376 cue-FSM) spawned concurrently in a single message, each fully self-contained (own folder, no git, no shared-doc edits, no cross-imports). I (Orchestrator/Planner/Curator) verified **from the actual code + READMEs + an authoritative build**, not builder self-reports. Read `375/page.tsx` end-to-end (clean input-pipe, proper rAF/AudioContext/MIDI cleanup on unmount, typography-compliant, WebGL2 fallback wired) + all three READMEs; ran a **3-up diagnostic `npm run build` вЖТ exit 0** (all three compile + lint clean; the only flag was builder-374 *reporting* a transient lint state in 375 that did not reproduce in the authoritative build).
- **`375-tempo-canon` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ online DTW, warping-path. **Won on three axes:** (a) **legibility** вАФ the bending warping diagonal is the single most legible "watch the machine follow you" picture (reference-time √Ч performance-time, the path bends with rubato), the cycle's whole point and the JURY's #1 directive; (b) **diversity/anti-screen-habit** вАФ `374`'s score-river is the lab's most *familiar* form (close to `24-piano-roll`/`13-piano-canvas`), where the warping path is a genuinely fresh visual and a real answer to the JURY's "stop relocating the screen-viz"; (c) **freshness** вАФ carries the freshest dated named ref (**Matchmaker, Oct 2025**), paying down the JURY's "freshness mandate failed ~6 dives / implement one recent named work" debt. See INDEX/README.
- **`374-the-accompanist` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І337, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ HMM/forward probabilistic follower (transition kernel + pitch-likelihood floor for robustness + argmax commit + **confidence meter** the others lack), score-river WebGL2. Build-clean. **Didn't win**: most-familiar visual + lower surprise than the warping path. **It is the designated cycle-2 deepening** вАФ the HMM belief is the right substrate for expressive (dynamics/articulation) following + the confidence readout is the missing legibility handle.
- **`376-the-prompter` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І337, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ cue/anchor FSM (Antescofo-style), commits only at anchors вЖТ **robust to wrong/extra/hesitant notes**; its demo bakes in deliberate wrong notes and a **build-time simulation proved 8/8 cues fire correctly** (the strongest verification posture of the three). Build-clean. **Didn't win**: most-forgiving but **least legible about position** (knows "how close to the cue," not "which note"), so the follow-payoff is coarser than the continuous warping path. Revive as the live-performance *reliability* mode / a re-anchor safety net for the precise followers (the production hybrid Matchmaker describes).

## Cycle 335 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (3 legibility approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `370-tonal-map` вАФ the **deepening of the Spiral-Array thread** the JURY keeps demanding, finally shipped, and shipped *fixed for legibility*. Implements **Elaine Chew's Spiral Array** (MIT, 2000) tonal model вАФ the music's **center of effect** (weighted centroid of sounding pitch-class points) вАФ but renders it as a **top-down, labeled circle-of-fifths MAP** so the abstract 3-D helix that sank `364-tonal-orbit` becomes a readable map you navigate: a bright **comet of tonal gravity** glides across named key territories, a **modulation is literally the comet crossing from the "C" disc to the "G" disc**, and a fading **trail** shows where it's been. The surprising legibility move (straight from today's research): the **tonal-focus** scalar вАФ how concentrated recent pitch content is around the center of gravity (arXiv:2603.27035, gravitational centering) вАФ drives the comet's **halo radius**, so you *see* focus tighten in-key and **bloom wide the instant a modulation begins**, not just read a number. Internal demo auto-plays a deliberately dramatic modulating journey (CвЖТGвЖТDвЖТEmвЖТC) so the comet visibly tours the map at the 06:30 phone review; **Web MIDI** feeds a pianist's own playing into the identical pipeline. HUD: key / chord / Roman numeral / modulation banner / tonal-focus meter + a teaching legend.

## Cycle 334 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 play-models of ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `368-kids-rainbow-quest` вАФ the lab's **first color-foraging *game***: a friendly unicorn shows a glowing color and *wants* it, so a 4-year-old goes and **points the phone camera at something that color in the real world** (red, then orange, then yellowвА¶). Getting close makes the creature **glow warmer** with a rising musical shimmer; holding the match ~0.6s triggers a **fanfare + sparkle burst** and fills a **rainbow arc** across the top; collect all seven вЖТ the arc plays a **rainbow song** and loops with a fresh shuffle. No reading, no timer, no score, no fail вАФ and crucially it gets the child *off the couch into their room* (the most direct answer yet to the JURY's "stop staring at the screen"). ColorвЖТpitch is the most legible kids mapping (KIDS.md: "color is the language"); each hue вЖТ a note in **D-Dorian** (NOT C-pentatonic) over an always-on D+A drone; **camera is analysis-only** (no recording, no upload, no network). Plays itself hands-free via auto-demo at the 06:30 review when there's no camera.

## Cycle 333 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (3 technical approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `365-cadence-ladder` вАФ a real-time **tonal/functional harmonic analyst**: it names the KEY you're in, the Roman-numeral FUNCTION of every chord, and makes the *pull-and-resolve of harmony visible* as a three.js tension ladder (Tonic at rest on the bottom ¬Ј Subdominant departing in the middle ¬Ј Dominant pulling at the top). Each chord drops into its functional zone as a glowing block; **cadences flash named resolving arcs** вАФ VвЖТI *authentic* (emerald), IVвЖТI *plagal/"amen"* (violet), VвЖТvi *deceptive* (amber); when the music **modulates** a ripple sweeps the scene and every Roman numeral re-contextualises (the same chord changes function as the key shifts). The lab's **first key-estimation + functional/cadence analysis** (grep-verified вАФ `229-chord-canvas` names chords but does NO key, NO Roman numerals, NO cadence/function). Proves itself 358-style: an internally-authored progression (C major with authentic/deceptive/plagal cadences вЖТ modulates to G major) is **known ground truth**, so the analyzer is watched proving itself on a phone with no hardware; **Web MIDI** lets a pianist play their own chords into the identical pipeline. Auto-plays on Begin; alive in ~10 s at the 06:30 review.

**Decide gates (all cleared):**
- **Rotation:** 333 % 2 = 1 вЖТ **adult** (kids resumes 334). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (360 shipped demoable last fire).
- **JURY-directed pick:** JURY 2026-06-06's loudest adult provocation is *"feed the legible/instructional lane вАФ build the obvious next one: a real-time score-follower or a **chord/key analyzer that names the harmony you play**"* (its named wins were the legible 358/353/345) AND *"starve the adult JI-drone monoculture."* I took the analyzer, deepened past mere chord-naming (already in lab at 229) into **key-finding + functional/cadence analysis** вАФ the instructional lane the jury asked to feed. (Deliberately did NOT take the jury's other option, deepening Mirror-Canon cycle-2; banked the Spiral-Array runner-up as the multi-cycle thread to deepen instead вАФ noted below.)
- **Research-first вЖТ build chain:** RESEARCH ¬І333 (today) вАФ Krumhansl-Schmuckler key-finding is commodity in standalone tools (wutools, Meyda-based browser detectors, arXiv 2505.17259 "Audio Key Detection," May 2025) but **grep-clean in this lab**; the empty shelf is *functional* analysis (key + Roman numeral + cadence), not chord-naming. Build implements that hook directly. Chain visible.
- **Ambition floor (4/5):** `ambition: #1 never-used-technique (Krumhansl-Schmuckler key estimation + Roman-numeral functional labeling + cadence detection + modulation tracking вАФ grep-verified lab-first; 229 does chord-NAME only) + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (decaying pitch-class profile + K-S key estimator w/ hysteresis + chord-quality template matcher + Riemann functional/cadence mapper + three.js ladder render + Web-Audio synth = 6) + #3 named reference (Krumhansl & Kessler 1982 probe-tone profiles ¬Ј Temperley 2001 ¬Ј Riemann 1893 functional harmony ¬Ј Aldwell & Schachter cadence tradition) + #5 recent-research (RESEARCH ¬І333 today)`.
- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 shipped = 360,358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337):** OUTPUT вАФ raw-WebGL2 4√Ч (360,347,345,341 вЖТ WARM/avoid), DOM/CSS 3√Ч (355,353,346), three.js 2√Ч (358,337 вАФ safe), SVG 1√Ч (350, jury-banned separately). Dodges every HARD ban; cools the warm raw-WebGL2 renderer.

No single love forced the pick; the JURY's instructional-lane directive governed.

## Cycle 332 вАФ 2026-06-06 14:26 UTC вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE (3 UNRELATED lab-first simulation toys) ¬Ј SHIPS `360-kids-sand-choir` вАФ the lab's **first falling-sand granular cellular automaton** (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). A 4-year-old pours streams of glowing warm sand from a top spout; **tilting the iPad** turns the world's gravity so the dunes flow and reshape left/right/down; seven harp strings tuned to **D-Dorian** cross the lower field, and every grain that comes to *rest on a string* plucks a soft KarplusвАУStrong note вАФ so **the shape of the dune you build IS the song** (the most legible cross-modal mapping the kids lane can make, the direct answer to the JURY's standing #1 "make it legible"). Auto-sways and plucks itself hands-free for the 06:30 phone review (no sensor needed); pointer-drag fallback on desktop; always-on D+A pad + brick-wall limiter so it's never silent and never harsh.

- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 = 358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337,334):** `diversity: banned (JURY 2026-06-06)=[touch INPUT ¬Ј mic/voice INPUT ¬Ј inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬Ј adult-JI-drone VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[tilt INPUT ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј falling-sand-CA TECHNIQUE ¬Ј kids-warm-elemental VIBE]`. - **`362-kids-tumble-bells` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І332, `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ Abelian sandpile / SOC (BakвАУTangвАУWiesenfeld 1987) + tilt-aim. ## Cycle 330 вАФ 2026-06-06 10:30 UTC вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 play-models for ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `355-kids-glass-armonica` вАФ a **Benjamin Franklin glass armonica** for kids: a row of 8 glasses you TUNE by dragging water up/down (more water = lower pitch вАФ the water level you SEE *is* the pitch you hear, the most literal cross-modal mapping the lab can make), then PLAY by **swiping a finger across the rims** so each glass the finger crosses *sings* a sustained, breathy, overlapping wash (the famous "otherworldly" armonica sustain вАФ NOT a struck bell). A ghost-finger auto-demo sweeps back and forth for ~12 s so the instrument plays itself at the 06:30 open. The lab's **first fill-to-tune instrument** and **first rubbed-glass continuous-armonica voice** вАФ water as a legible pitch dial, the inverse of an abstract glow.

## Cycle 329 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE (3 UNRELATED explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `353-collapse-score` вАФ an adult generative piece that COMPOSES ITSELF in front of you by **Wave Function Collapse**, the lab's FIRST WFC piece (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). An 8√Ч16 lattice (8 voice layers √Ч 16 beat columns) begins in superposition; the solver collapses the lowest-Shannon-entropy cell to a weighted-random D-Dorian note, then BFS-propagates harmonic adjacency constraints to its neighbours вАФ and you WATCH it: dim candidate-count cells snap to bright note-labelled cells, constrained neighbours flash as the ripple spreads, while a playhead sweeps leftвЖТright and SOUNDS each collapsed note (FM pad + bell). Composition as a *visible logical process* вАФ the exact inverse of the "abstract glowing cloud" the jury asked us to kill (the most literal answer to jury #1: make it LEGIBLE). Seeded mulberry32 вЖТ deterministic Replay; auto-reseeds on fill (long-form, never the same twice). Auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if autoplay blocked), alive at the 06:30 review with full payoff in ~10 seconds.

NO force-push divergence. Highest on-disk folder = 350 вЖТ pre-allocated **351/352/353** to the three WIDE Builders (collision-free; note cycles 327/328 used 348/349/351/352 as TEXT bank slugs вАФ not on disk, no collision). ## Cycle 328 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 physics/interaction approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `350-kids-bump-along` вАФ the lab's FIRST chain-reaction music machine for kids (110+ kids prototypes, ZERO chain-reaction pieces before вАФ grep-verified): a row of 7 sleepy, breathing creatures (each a bold color + a C-major-pentatonic note, BANDIMAL left=lowвЖТright=high); tap one and a visible "bump" travels down the line вАФ each creature wakes, squash-stretches, and SINGS as the wave reaches it вАФ then it reflects off the far end and rolls back for a return melody. Tap the middle вЖТ two waves outward; tap both ends вЖТ they meet in the middle (a chord). DRAG a creature sideways to reorder the row вЖТ the wave plays the new order (composition by rearrangement). One little push вЖТ a whole melodic wave you can WATCH travel, bounce, and return. Auto-plays itself hands-free (a demo bump fires from the left every ~5.5s while idle; creatures breathe perpetually), so it's alive at the 06:30 review with zero interaction.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..4b208dd` (HEAD = cycle 327 `347-the-place`; 24 commits + tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. On-disk AGENT.md = current full 386-line version (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` before the authoritative build (`next` confirmed installed; node v22). scanned for `use*`-helper hook-rule traps, unused vars, `: any`/`@ts-ignore` вАФ all clean; checked teardown coverage). **Diversity is a WASH** (all three share identical clean tags вАФ device-orientation ¬Ј HRTF+DOM/CSS ¬Ј spatial-listening ¬Ј listening-adventure), so the tie-break was surprise + 4yo-playability + reward-legibility + verifiability, NOT diversity (exactly as in the prior DEEP kids fire). **Why 346 won**: (a) **surprise + charm вАФ the decisive kids gate**: "find six singing animals hidden around you and collect them" is the most magical, wonder-driven, intrinsically-motivating loop for a 4yo (collecting characters), with six distinct character timbres (owl/frog/bird/whale/cricket/firefly) where 348 has one repeated note timbre and 347 just accretes; (b) **verifiability (JURY #5, a live priority)** вАФ the most robust of the three: the dim DOM/CSS compass *glow* + a **tap-the-center shortcut** mean the entire findвЖТcollectвЖТcelebrate loop completes *visually* even when HRTF perception is weak, on speakers, or with no sensor (auto-demo), so it's playable + auditionable in-sandbox despite the honest HRTF-perception unknown; (c) **reward legibility** вАФ the swoop-to-center + chime + sparkle + haptic per animal is the most discrete, unmistakable "I caught it!" event (348's progress-bar is close; 347 has none); (d) **richest subsystem count** + cleanest embodiment of "play music with your ears." **`348-kids-song-catcher`** (the most jury-#1-legible вАФ you assemble a *known* melody note-by-note into a visible ribbon) **lost only on surprise/playability** (localizing a single note by ear is harder for a 4yo than 6 simultaneous distinct timbres; "collect animals" out-charms "catch notes") and is **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build**. **`347-kids-echo-cave`** (simplest interaction, lovely spatial round) **banked but flagged**: the call-and-echo lane is jury-saturated (94/102/142/280/298вА¶), its differentiation is "real but subtle" (its own README), and it has the weakest reward legibility + least agency вАФ resurrect ONLY if differentiated (make turning *required* to wake each creature). Both losers moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS as text (no half-built folders in the commit).

## Cycle 325 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE (3 unrelated explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `345-speech-melody` вАФ the lab's FIRST natural-language вЖТ music piece: type a line (a poem, a memory) and Resonance compiles its SPEECH into a Jan√°ƒНek-style "speech melody" вАФ each word's vowels become pitches on a D-Dorian ladder (vowel height вЖТ pitch height), its consonant clusters become percussion (plosiveвЖТclick, voiced-stopвЖТthud, sibilantвЖТhiss, liquid/nasalвЖТring), word stress + capitalization + sentence position вЖТ accent/duration, punctuation вЖТ rests/phrase-breaks вАФ deterministic (same text вЖТ same melody), and the typed WORDS light up one at a time as they sound over a glowing raw-WebGL2 pitch-contour ribbon, so you RECOGNIZE your own words being sung. Directly answers the jury's #1 live provocation ("make his music LEGIBLE вАФ let him recognize what he played, not another nebula"). Auto-plays a Welcome-Home line on load (alive at the 06:30 review with zero typing); fully usable on a phone by typing.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..18d6e58` (HEAD = cycle 324 `341-kids-star-pair`; 21 commits + tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. On-disk AGENT.md = current full 386-line version (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Honest freshness (JURY #5 no-fake-novelty): graphemeвЖТphoneme heuristics + Web Audio are foundational, NOT a <30-day technique вАФ the recent-and-surprising signal is *direction-of-field* (real-time cross-modal A/V is the 2026 frontier; WebGPU is now Baseline) **combined with the lab-gap audit**: the lab is thin on cross-modal translation and has **zero** natural-languageвЖТmusic piece (the only text input, `22-code-score`, is a note-DSL where you literally write pitch names вАФ NOT language sonification; grep-verified). Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build is direct (path-a/c): ¬І325's cross-modal framing вЖТ the WIDE-3 slate aimed one explorer at the genuine textвЖТmusic gap (the winner) + two at the other thin adult axes (score-following, long-form).

## Cycle 324 вАФ 2026-06-05 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 interaction-model approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `341-kids-star-pair` вАФ the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play piece: two children, each on their own screen, each hold ONE glowing star and slide it (or hum) up/down until the two stars sing in tune and LINK with a beam of light. The two voices sound continuously over a D drone; out of tune you HEAR real acoustic beating + SEE the stars jitter; land within ¬±35¬Ґ of a just-intonation ratio and the beating vanishes, a bright beam snaps between the stars, they pulse together, a chime rings, ~60 sparkles burst вАФ one discrete, *silently-legible* "we connected!" event. Drag is the 4yo-primary control (hum yields to it); solo on one phone вЖТ a robot рЯ§Ц drives the far star, pausing near consonances, so the whole find-the-lock loop reaches the reward with no second device AND no mic.

Scored on ambition floor (all clear), the prototype-quality bar (all met), diversity (all dodge the bans), surprise, and JURY guidance вАФ and the decisive discriminators were **JURY #3 + #5**. **Why 337 won**: (a) **JURY #3 вАФ the decisive gate**: real-world-data is the lab's thinnest adult shelf (the jury *praised* `314-solar-wind` for filling it and asked for MORE), and 337 ships it as a real **three.js 3-D rotating globe**, "massively bigger" than the banked SVG `328-seismic-choir` it supersedes вАФ *and the 3-D globe dodges the SVG renderer ban* (вЙ•5√Ч) that would have compromised 328; (b) **JURY #5 (verification debt, a live priority вАФ the lab carries it; `323`/`327` never ran on real GPU)**: 337 is the **most verifiable** of the three вАФ the always-loaded sample-quake fallback guarantees both the globe and the spatial choir are alive at the 06:30 review *regardless of network*, with an honest provenance badge, and there is **no GPU/WGSL blind spot** (plain three.js + Web Audio HRTF, logic-traceable); (c) **surprise + partial legibility (#1)**: the highest "huh вАФ the planet as a chord," with depth driving **both** point-hue *and* lowpass-darkness so what you see and hear share one geometry, and it names the loudest places + magnitudes (a step toward jury #1's "legible, not a nebula"); (d) **diversity is cleanest** вАФ external-API INPUT (0√Ч in the last 10) + three.js OUTPUT (dodges BOTH hard renderer bans) + data-sonification + planetary VIBE. **`338-live-accompanist`** (the BOLDEST/most-ambitious swing вАФ listen to a live acoustic instrument and a generative band locks to your tempo + key; Karel's standing "jazz-responsive alternate arc" wishlist + the вЙИ0√Ч score-following/live-performance axis) **lost ONLY on verifiability** вАФ real-time onset/tempo/key tracking on a live acoustic source is the hardest-to-audition headline of the slate (its own README is honest that it'll be rough on sustained/reverberant/polyphonic input), and with the jury making verification debt a live priority I would not ship a headline I can't confirm works вАФ **re-flagged as the strong next-adult build, paired with a real-instrument verification pass** (the Auto-demo-through-the-same-analyser path is a clean design and de-risks the demo, but the live "wow" is unproven). **`339-slow-machine`** (the deterministic seeded 6-section long-form generative machine; Ikeda-minimal, fully verifiable since it has no input) **banked** вАФ clean and the most reliably demoable, but lowest on surprise/ambition (generative-ambient is the most well-trodden lane of the three). Both losers moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS as text (no half-built folders in the commit).

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0, run at Orient) вЖТ moved 338 + 339 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with **only 337 present** вЖТ **вЬУ Compiled successfully in 35.3s, exit 0**, full route table emitted, `/dream/337-seismic-globe вЧЛ (Static) 5.32 kB` (**293 kB First Load вАФ three.js IS bundled here, by design: the heavier bundle is the cost of dodging the SVG ban with a real 3-D globe**, vs the ~108 kB of the recent SVG pieces). **No fix attempts needed** (337 was build-clean as delivered). Remaining build warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code (fonts, unused vars in `recording`/`insights`/etc.). **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** вАФ the real unverified risks (per the README): live USGS feed reachability from the review device (sample fallback + honest badge cover a no); HRTF azimuth/elevation vividness is headphone- and listener-dependent; exact loudness across the full chain during a dense `all_hour` swarm (capped at 24 voices + brick-wall compressor mitigate).

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 324 (kids): SHIP `335-kids-duet-bridge`** вАФ the re-flagged bold multi-user build (two kids co-play in REAL TIME on a shared glowing rope, tuning into JI consonance by ear), **paired with a real-device perceptual pass** (the gold-lock reward is perceptual). The multi-user axis is open for kids (334) вАФ deepen it. OR `336-kids-echo-relay` only if differentiated from the saturated echo lane.
- **Cycle 325 (adult): SHIP `338-live-accompanist`** вАФ the re-flagged BOLDEST swing (live acoustic instrument вЖТ a generative band that locks to your tempo/key), **paired with a real-instrument verification pass** (onset/tempo/key tracking quality is the whole headline and is unauditioned). OR `332-overtone-mirror` (the voiceвЖТovertone-series mirror, but mind the voiceвЖТHRTFвЖТsacred rut вАФ needs a non-SVG renderer this time) OR `339-slow-machine` (long-form generative, reliable, but lower surprise).
- **Renderer math after this ship**: SVG cools (we shipped three.js this fire); **three.js now warming (321 + 337) вАФ lean off it next adult**; WebGPU 2√Ч still unrun (`323`/`327` вАФ verification debt unpaid; can't run a real GPU in the sandbox); Canvas2D still jury-banned. Lean audio-only / non-screen (jury #2 still wants the SECOND-and-beyond non-screen pieces) or raw-WebGL2 (now low) next.

**Notes**:

The guard rule applies to api routes *I create* under `src/app/dream/`, and none were. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile; the winner uses the already-installed `three@0.182`; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).

Alternated to WIDE off two DEEP cycles (321 + 322) per "don't run [DEEP] every night," and because the jury's central complaint is monoculture (WIDE is the named tool).
- **JURY alignment**: the most faithful answer to **provocation #3** (real-world-data вАФ the thinnest adult shelf вАФ sonified as a *3-D globe*, not the banked SVG); dodges the SVG renderer ban (вЙ•5√Ч) + the Canvas2D ban + the his-recording-as-source flag + the forming voiceвЖТHRTFвЖТsacred rut + the Anadol-cloud flag; pays the **most** respect to verification debt (#5 вАФ no new unrun compute, sample fallback guarantees a live review); steps toward #1 legibility (named quakes); resumes kids next cycle (#3); escalates #4 to Karel.

## Cycle 321 вАФ 2026-06-05 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (3 approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `331-voice-cathedral` вАФ the lab's SECOND non-screen piece, finally following `308-orbit-choir`: sing one steady note and it commits (YIN pitch вЖТ ~120 ms stability gate вЖТ 700 ms cooldown + breath-gap, so one breath blooms one voice), snaps to a just-intonation degree over a D2 root, and spawns a sustained additive voice placed at a golden-angle azimuth on a slowly ORBITING ring through its own HRTF `PannerNode`; sing again and again to stack a one-person overtone cathedral around your head, capped at 9 (oldest fades), anchored by an always-on JI drone, kept clip-free by a brick-wall compressor + procedural reverb вАФ and the chord you built is printed by NAME (`D ¬Ј A ¬Ј FвЩѓ ¬Ј CвЩѓ`) so Karel RECOGNIZES what he sang (jury #1), not a nebula

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..29d87cd` (HEAD = cycle 320 `330-stillness`; tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. Winner shipped as `331-voice-cathedral`; losers `332-overtone-mirror` + `333-antiphon` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І321**: *edge-AI pitch/phoneme detection feeding browser HRTF вАФ the 2026 "spatial voice instrument" stack.* Sources: *Web Audio API: Immersive Soundscapes for WebXR in 2026* (blog.weskill.org/2026/04) + MDN Web Audio spatialization. Honest freshness (per JURY #5's no-fake-novelty rule): the *techniques* (HRTF `PannerNode`, FFT overtone extraction, YIN) are foundational; the genuinely-recent signal is the **direction-of-field** вАФ sound is moving OFF the pixel, and the analysis-to-spatial pipeline (detect which note/overtone live вЖТ place it by azimuth) is now a routine browser primitive where two years ago it needed native code. That lines up exactly with JURY provocation #2 (build the SECOND non-screen piece вАФ `308` found the axis and nothing followed) + #1 (make the music legible вАФ name the notes). Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build is direct: ¬І321 вЖТ the DEEP-3 voice-spatial slate вЖТ shipped the diversity-clean, most-verifiable, most-directive-faithful winner.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared**:
- **Action = Build new (Decide priority #4), JURY-directed + queued**: 321 % 2 = 1 вЖТ adult (no rotation override needed; kids resumes cycle 322 per JURY #3). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (330 shipped demoable last fire). ## Cycle 309 вАФ 2026-06-04 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP-continue (solo) ¬Ј DEEPENS `308-orbit-choir` вЖТ cycle 2: the spatial choir is now sung by Karel's REAL *Welcome Home* piano (first time "use his actual music" reaches the non-screen spatial layer) + first haptic output + localStorage room-memory

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..677b7e8` (HEAD = cycle 308 `311-kids-music-box`; the `jury: verdict 2026-06-04` commit present). NO force-push divergence. On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/`.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І309**: *Janet Cardiff's **The Forty Part Motet** (2001) вАФ a choir spatially exploded into forty speakers you walk among вАФ is touring again in 2026 (MIMOCA; National Gallery of Canada).* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (the Motet technique is foundational; the 2026 tour is the dated/named anchor). Its value is the **reframe**: it turns "deepen 308 with real stems" from a timbre swap into a *bigger idea* вАФ **his album, spatially exploded into a room you gather with your head**. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: continues the standing multi-cycle spatial thread (b) AND implements the Motet hook + 308's own un-built README deepenings (a).

- **Action = Continue / deepen (Decide priority #2), JURY-headline-directed**: 309 % 2 = 1 вЖТ adult. STATE ¬І308 queued cycle 309 verbatim as *"the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real Welcome Home piano stems вА¶ multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2."* **JURY.md (2026-06-04) provocation #1 governs**: *"Deepen 308 with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems вАФ do NOT ship a sixth sensor-noodle. The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it (real stems + haptics + localStorage persistence). The standing 'use his actual music' directive has *never* reached the spatial layer."* This is exactly that build.
- **Mode: solo DEEP-continue (not WIDE/DEEP fan-out)** вАФ the orchestration WIDE/DEEP modes fan out *new* folders; an in-place deepen of one existing multi-cycle folder can't be parallelized into isolated folders. Precedent: cycle 305 was likewise a *"deepen (solo)"* of `302-mirror-canon-round`. Recorded `mode: solo-deepen (multi-cycle thread #3 вЖТ cycle 2)`.
- **What shipped (`308-orbit-choir` cycle 2)** вАФ three deepenings, all from 308's own README "Next-cycle deepening" list, plus the Motet reframe:
  1. **Real stems (the headline).** The 7 synth voices are replaced by Karel's actual recordings via the public, anon, no-auth `/api/featured` (lists his featured album's track recording-ids + titles) вЖТ `/api/audio/[id]` (signed URL per track) вАФ the SAME path the loved `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП / `163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП use. `loadStems()` picks the album whose name/artist matches `welcome|karel` (else first), spreads up to 7 tracks evenly, `Promise.allSettled`s per-track fetch вЖТ `decodeAudioData`. Each becomes a looping `AudioBufferSource` вЖТ lowpass (the blur/sharpen axis) вЖТ breathing-LFO gain вЖТ its own HRTF `PannerNode`. The arc now glides **`playbackRate` (detuned вЖТ 1.0)** + **lowpass cutoff (вЙИ540 Hz вЖТ вЙИ6 kHz)** instead of oscillator pitch вАФ so each recording goes from a warbling, muffled distance to clear-and-true while orbiting inward: **you gather his album into a clear room around your head** (the *Forty Part Motet* of his own piano).
  2. **Haptics вАФ a lab FIRST** (`navigator.vibrate`): a 26 ms buzz the instant a voice *you're facing* locks home (`progressвЙ•0.92 && swell>0.35`, latched once via `resolvedFired`), and a `[18,40,18]` triple-pulse when the whole room resolves.
  3. **Persistence** (`localStorage` key `resonance.dream.orbit-choir.gather.v1`): gather-progress is written ~every 4 s (monotonic); on return the idle button reads **"Return to the room"** + an emerald *"your room was N% gathered вАФ it remembers"* note, and `startTimeRef` is offset so the arc **resumes** where it left off. "Begin again" + full resolve clear it.
- **Graceful fallback is load-bearing**: `<2` tracks decode (offline / private preview / CDN block / no featured album) вЖТ reverts to the **original cycle-1 synth resolving-chord choir** with the full pitch-glide path intact; the top label states which source plays (`Karel's Welcome Home ¬Ј N voices` vs `synthesised choir (album offline)`). The synth code path is fully preserved, so a no-network sandbox still demos. Also added: a faced-voice **track-title** readout, a `loading` phase ("Gathering the roomвА¶"), and stem `src` nodes added to the teardown.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** (need 2): `ambition: never-used-technique(#1) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + multi-cycle(#4)`. **#1** вАФ first `navigator.vibrate` HAPTIC output in 300+ prototypes AND first time a real audio *source* drives the spatial/HRTF layer. **#2** вАФ DeviceOrientation head-tracker + N-voice HRTF panner scene + featured-album fetch/decode pipeline + convolver reverb + 360 s convergence state machine + localStorage room-memory (вЙИ6). **#3** вАФ Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet* (2001, touring 2026) + La Monte Young *Dream House* + Pauline Oliveros. **#4** вАФ multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2 (it was claimed as a multi-cycle commitment in 308's README). (Honest: #5 not strictly claimed вАФ ¬І309 is a path-(b)/(c) dive, not a <30-day frontier find; the four above already clear the floor 2√Ч.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308,311; JURY 2026-06-04 bans): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬Ј phone-motion/orientation-as-screen-object INPUT ¬Ј no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic] ¬Ј picked(308 cyc2)=[adult-meditative VIBE ¬Ј DeviceOrientation-as-LISTENER-rotation INPUT (rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) ¬Ј pure-spatial-HRTF-AUDIO OUTPUT (screen is a footnote; the lab's only non-screen output) ¬Ј real-recording-source + HRTF-convergence + haptics + localStorage TECHNIQUE ¬Ј A-natural-minor-add9 (synth fallback) / Karel's-own-keys (stems)]`. Dodges every banned tag вАФ and it's the only adult-spatial / non-screen axis in the lab, so it cannot collide with the kids-shader monoculture the JURY flagged.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): strongly endorses this pick вАФ `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП + `163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП (his **real Paths/album audio**, the exact `/api/featured`+`/api/audio` path reused here) and `148-spatial-palette`вЭ§пЄП + `107-ocean-presence`вЭ§пЄП (spatial/immersive). **Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` вЖТ **exit 0**, `/dream/308-orbit-choir вЧЛ (Static) 5.35 kB` (108 kB First Load вАФ up from cycle-1's 3.92 kB for the stem-loading + persistence code). **0 errors, no warnings attributable to the file** (`grep "orbit-choir/page"` in the build log = none; all warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code). No fix attempts needed beyond one local `buzz()` signature widening (number вЖТ number|number[]) before the build.

## Cycle 308 вАФ 2026-06-04 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE (3 explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `311-kids-music-box` вАФ the lab's FIRST kids piece that REMEMBERS across sessions

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..c2b8cd9` (HEAD = cycle 307 `308-orbit-choir`; the `jury: verdict 2026-06-04` commit also landed). NO force-push divergence (3rd clean sync running вАФ the recurring drift continues to stay fixed). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/311-kids-music-box/`. Highest committed folder = 308 вЖТ pre-allocated **309/310/311** to the three WIDE builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `311-kids-music-box`; losers `309-kids-echo-duet` + `310-kids-sing-back` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` (fallback retention) and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І308**: *reflexive interaction вАФ a system that mirrors/varies the child's own input (Pachet's **Continuator**, 2002; Addessi's **MIROR** project) вАФ is the validated way to make a kids music piece engaging WITHOUT a no-fail wash; it carries the experience on **memory + turn-taking**, not endless forgiving noodling.* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (Continuator/MIROR are foundational; the only strictly-recent dated anchor is a Jan-2026 executive-function meta-analysis about *benefits*, not technique). The value is the **principle** вАФ exactly the theory for discharging JURY #2 ("build a kids piece with memory or consequence"). Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: all three explorers implement "carry the kids experience on memory, not a no-fail bed"; the winner ships.

- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3)**: 308 % 2 = 0; no blocker; the queued adult 308-orbit-choir deepening is explicitly assigned to cycle 309 (an *adult* fire) by STATE ¬І307. STATE ¬І306/¬І307 queued cycle 308 as the kids build (decide clap-band's fate / break the recipe). **JURY.md (2026-06-04) is decisive and governs**: provocation #2 вАФ "**Break the kids recipe.** Five straight kids fires are 'new sensor вЖТ no-fail modal bed.' Ban that form for one kids cycle: build a kids piece with **memory or consequence** вАФ the child can make something *wrong* and fix it, or what they did *persists and grows*. `298-echo-friend` already pointed this way; nothing followed it." The JURY's banned set this cycle: **raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬Ј phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬Ј the new-sensorвЖТno-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic.** (Note: JURY #1 вАФ deepen 308 with Karel's real piano stems вАФ is explicitly "the next *adult* build" вЖТ deferred to cycle 309.)
- **Mode: WIDE (3 explorers)** вАФ cycle 307 was DEEP; alternation + the anti-similarity mandate вЖТ WIDE. Three **distinct kids FORMS that all carry memory/consequence**, each dodging every banned tag: (309) Continuator/MIROR call-and-response **duet** (memory + turn-taking), (310) Simon-grows memory game with **real-but-kind right/wrong** (consequence), (311) rotating music-box **sequencer that persists to localStorage** (persists + grows). Pre-allocated 309/310/311; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none needed an API route (pure client-side Web Audio + Canvas2D/three.js + localStorage; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets вЖТ no `guard`).
- **Curation вЖТ WINNER `311-kids-music-box`**: I verified from the **actual code + READMEs + the authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (309/310 builders again mis-reported some helper files as "pre-existing" вАФ the recurring memory artifact; code is genuinely theirs, created 14:08вАУ14:11 during the run). **Why 311 won**: (a) 309 and 310 are *both* Canvas2D-creature-with-pads pieces вАФ the lab's over-represented form (JURY: 13/15 outputs to a screen, mostly the same way); 311 is the only candidate that breaks that pattern with a **3D physical-object metaphor** AND dodges the banned fragment-shader monoculture. (b) It's the **"massively bigger" pick** per Karel's standing mandate вАФ a *composition machine* the child builds, not a reactive toy. (c) **localStorage persistence is a genuine lab-first for kids** вАФ no kids prototype has ever remembered state across sessions; it hits JURY #2's "*what they did persists and grows*" verbatim. The curating fire also fixed a real **pluck-alignment bug** (comb angle a quarter-turn off the visible comb) + two TS `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic mismatches before validating. 309 (tightest research chain) + 310 (most literal "wrong and fix it") banked as strong ship-ready seeds.
- **Ambition floor: 3/5** (need 2): `ambition: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + recent-research(#5)`. **#2** вАФ KS audio engine + three.js/r3f 3D scene + per-frame sequencer clock + localStorage persistence = 4 subsystems. **#3** вАФ Swiss cylinder musical box (c.1796, Geneva) + Karplus-Strong (1983). **#5** вАФ RESEARCH ¬І308 (reflexive interaction), added this fire. (Honest: KS isn't a lab-first technique вАФ used in 303/105 вАФ so #1 not claimed; persistence-across-sessions is arguably a lab-first but counted under the cleaner #2/#3/#5.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped/banked: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308 + banked 304/305; JURY's explicit bans this cycle): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬Ј phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬Ј no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic] ¬Ј picked(311)=[touch-slot INPUT ¬Ј three.js-3D-object OUTPUT ¬Ј physical-sequencer + Karplus-Strong + localStorage-persistence TECHNIQUE ¬Ј warm-toy/craft kids VIBE ¬Ј D-Lydian-hexachord]`. Dodges every banned tag вАФ and the winner specifically breaks the Canvas2D-creature form its own two siblings shared.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved, unchanged set): the loop/memory + tactile/craft cluster pulls here вАФ `172-loop-station`вЭ§пЄП, `160-kids-paint-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП (loop/memory), `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП (the physical-pluck/Karplus timbre 311 uses), `111-kids-shape-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП. No single love forced the pick; kid-rotation + JURY #2 + the ambition/diversity gates governed.

**What shipped (`311-kids-music-box`)**: a near-black warm screen; tap **Start** (resumes AudioContext, loads the saved tune or seeds a simple D-Lydian one so the box is already singing). A slowly-rotating 3D **music-box cylinder** (three.js via @react-three/fiber): wooden barrel + brass caps, a fixed color-coded **comb** that plucks each pin as it rolls past, raised colored **pin studs** that "pop"+glow on pluck. Grid = 14 time-steps around the circumference √Ч 6 pitch-rows along the length; **tap a front-face slot** to add/remove a pin (front-face-only via a surface-normal¬Јcamera test on an invisible hit-grid kept in lockstep with the body). The pin pattern **persists to `localStorage`** (try/catch degrade), so the loop keeps playing while the child rearranges it and the box **remembers across reloads** вАФ the whole point. Audio = **Karplus-Strong** plucked tones (one KS-rendered `AudioBuffer` per pitch: filtered noise burst вЖТ tuned delay line with lowpass-averaging feedback вЖТ A/R envelope), fired as cheap `BufferSource`s through a synthesized convolver reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + 0.55 master so dense patterns stay safe. **D Lydian hexachord** (D E F# G# A B вАФ NOT C-major-pentatonic). Controls: рЯІє Start fresh (clear), вПЄ Hold / вЦґ Spin. No-reading (colors = notes, studs = melody; a tiny caption for the grown-up). Fallbacks: no WebGL вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вЖТ notice, box still spins. Audio disposed on unmount. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 4.74 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: KS timbre by ear (per-row brightness/damping), tap accuracy + felt pluck timing on a real touch device, three.js disposal across a live unmount.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) вЖТ moved 309 + 310 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with **only 311 present** вЖТ **exit 0**, `/dream/311-kids-music-box вЧЛ (Static) 4.74 kB` (347 kB First Load JS вАФ the three.js/r3f bundle, expected for a 3D piece), all 339 static pages generated. **No fix attempts needed** (the builder had already fixed the pluck-alignment + TS-generic issues). Zero warnings/errors attributable to 311; remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code.

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 309 (adult) вАФ JURY #1, the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems.** The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it: (a) replace synth voices with his real piano stems via `/api/audio/[id]` (the standing "use his actual music" directive has NEVER reached the spatial layer), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse when a faced voice resolves (first haptic output), (c) localStorage persistence of how far you'd gathered the room. This is multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2.
- **Cycle 310 (kids): ship a banked memory/consequence sibling** вАФ `310-kids-sing-back` (Simon-grows, real-but-kind right/wrong вАФ the cleanest "make something wrong and fix it") OR `309-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator duet) вАФ both build-verified this fire. Continue breaking the recipe (JURY #2); do NOT regress to a sensor-noodle.
- **Standing breadth still unshipped**: real-world-data sonification (JURY #3 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І289 seismic, only 1 entry and it's kids+pentatonic); AI-pipeline-chain embedded in AV (JURY #4 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І285, Karel's explicit directive, ZERO in last 15); `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel, never shipped).
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: INDEX "Newest/Previous/Earlier/Older" chain is getting deep + STATE ordering is mixed; worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вАФ pure client-side Web Audio + three.js + localStorage; no mic, camera, network, or secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile; three/@react-three were already in package.json вАФ package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).

Directly answers Karel's "too similar / massively bigger" mandate by exploring three unrelated kids directions in one fire and shipping the biggest.
- **JURY alignment**: discharges provocation #2 (break the kids recipe вАФ memory/consequence, recipe banned) cleanly; defers #1 (deepen 308 with real piano) to the next *adult* cycle as the JURY itself directs.

## Cycle 307 вАФ 2026-06-04 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (2 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `308-orbit-choir` вАФ the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-first spatial piece

**Git sync / env**: clean this fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..015d8c8` (HEAD = cycle 306 `306-kids-rain-shaker`); NO force-push divergence (2nd clean sync running). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present) вАФ the recurring stale-AGENT drift did NOT recur. `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/`. Highest committed folder = 306; pre-allocated **307/308** to the two DEEP builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `308-orbit-choir`; loser `307-still-room` removed after curation and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І307**: *head MOVEMENT (not position) is what makes generic browser-HRTF legible* вАФ arXiv:2510.09161 (HRTF individualisation + head movements). Empirically, active head-turning collapses the front/back & in-head confusions that Web Audio's generic `panningModel="HRTF"` suffers вАФ so the cheap generic browser HRTF becomes legible **iff the listener turns**, which is exactly what a phone's `DeviceOrientation` already affords. The build's core gesture IS the disambiguator. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)+(c)**: implements ¬І295's un-spent head-tracked-spatial shelf.

- **Action = banked adult breadth (Decide priority #4, JURY-directed pivot)**: 307 % 2 = 1 вЖТ adult. STATE ¬І305/¬І306 queued cycle 307 as *Mirror-Canon CYCLE 3 polish* **only if the thread still feels alive after 3 cycles; else pivot to banked adult breadth*. I pivoted вАФ the Mirror-Canon thread (303 ship + 305 deepen) has demonstrated the multi-cycle commitment the JURY asked for; a 3rd polish fire would be incremental. **JURY.md (2026-06-03) is decisive and points elsewhere**: provocation #3 ("the lab has banked three spatial/non-screen pieces and shipped ZERO вАФ resurrect one and SHIP it"), #4 ("build on the unused half of RESEARCH ¬І295 вАФ the head-tracked-spatial-audio finding that produced `still-room`, banked not shipped"), #5 ("for one cycle, ban the audioвЖТvisual driver entirely вАФ build something whose output isn't a screen visualizer"). All three resolve to the same banked piece. This is "ship the breadth you've already paid for."
- **Mode: DEEP (2 approaches to one concept)** вАФ concept = the lab's first audio-FIRST / non-screen HRTF spatial room navigated by head-turn. Approach A = `307-still-room` (faithful Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*: 7 fixed-bearing voices, turn to tune in). Approach B = `308-orbit-choir` (the same spatial foundation given a **6-minute long-form, stateful convergence arc** вАФ voices orbit inward + glide from a detuned cluster into a warm A-minor-add9 chord; you shepherd voices home by facing them). Pre-allocated 307/308; spawned 2 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). Neither touched git or shared docs; neither needed an API route (pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets вЖТ no `guard`).
- **Curation вЖТ WINNER `308-orbit-choir`**: 308 is the strict superset вАФ it contains everything still-room does (HRTF room + DeviceOrientation listener-rotation + faced-voice swell + Deep-Listening framing) **plus** the long-form/stateful arc the JURY explicitly craves ("different at minute 6 than minute 0"), which fills the categorical-menu's *long-form generative (5+ min, state/memory/evolution)* gap the lab is thin on. Both built clean (full `npm run build` with both present = exit 0; each agent reported clean tsc + ESLint). Removed `307-still-room`, re-ran the **authoritative build winner-only = exit 0** (`/dream/308-orbit-choir` 3.92 kB). `307-still-room` banked to IDEAS as the calmer fixed-room sibling.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** вАФ `#1 never-used technique` (FIRST HRTF spatial-audio output + FIRST `DeviceOrientation` listener-rotation in 300+ prototypes вАФ the lab has avoided HRTF for 300 cycles; grep INDEX = 0 shipped spatial pieces despite 3 banked) ¬Ј `#2 вЙ•3 subsystems` (DeviceOrientation head-tracker + HRTF panner graph + 7-voice synth scene + synthesized convolver reverb + a 6-min azimuth+pitch convergence state machine = 4-5) ¬Ј `#3 named reference` (La Monte Young *Dream House*, √Йliane Radigue, Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*) ¬Ј `#5 recent research` (RESEARCH ¬І307 / ¬І295, this fire + within-14-days). Recorded `ambition: novel-technique(#1) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-ref(#3) + recent-research(#5)`.
- **Diversity audit** (last 10: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306 + banked 304/305): over-represented = kids VIBE (5√Ч: 290/293/295/298/303/306), tilt/deviceorientation-orientation INPUT (290/293/303/306), matte-Canvas2D + raw-WebGL OUTPUT (most). `diversity: banned=[kids-vibe, tilt-orientation-input, matte-canvas/webgl-visual-output, pentatonic] ¬Ј picked=[adult-meditative VIBE ¬Ј device-orientation-HEADING-as-listener-rotation INPUT (a NEW use of the sensor вАФ rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) ¬Ј pure-spatial-HRTF-audio OUTPUT (screen is a faint footnote вАФ the FIRST build whose output is not a screen visualizer) ¬Ј long-form-convergence + HRTF TECHNIQUE]`. Directly executes JURY #5 ("ban the audioвЖТvisual driver") вАФ this is the lab's first piece where sound is the content and the screen is the footnote.
- **Love signal**: votes API shows loved spatial/immersive pieces вАФ `148-spatial-palette` вЭ§пЄП, `107-ocean-presence` вЭ§пЄП, `227-paths-granular` вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute` вЭ§пЄП. No shipped HRTF piece existed to love; this is the first. Pulled toward the immersive-room direction those loves imply.

**What shipped (`308-orbit-choir`)**: near-black audio-first screen; tap "Begin the orbit" (resumes AudioContext + requests iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same gesture). 7 sustained HRTF-panned voices start scattered + detuned into a soft cluster; over a 360s eased scheduler they orbit inward to an even ring **and** their pitches glide (`setTargetAtTime`) into a warm **A natural-minor add9 / stacked-fifth** chord вАФ so spatial field and harmony resolve together. `DeviceOrientation.alpha` rotates the `AudioListener` (modern `forwardX/Z`+`positionX/Y/Z` AudioParams AND legacy `setOrientation`/`setPosition` both feature-detected for Safari/old-Chrome); facing a voice swells it and floors its personal resolution forward, so you *shepherd voices home* and shape the pace. Synthesized convolver reverb (decaying filtered-noise impulse, no files). Fallback chain: sensor вЖТ pointer-drag вЖТ arrow keys вЖТ hands-free auto-tour, with a readable `text-rose-300` notice when the sensor's inactive (separate notice if Web Audio is absent). Thin violet progress ring + `M:SS вАФ state` label (`scattered вЖТ drifting in вЖТ gathering вЖТ almost home вЖТ resolved`) + "Begin again" hold state + a faint violet orbital-map canvas (guide, not the point). Full ref-based teardown on unmount. Headphones hint (HRTF needs binaural). Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 3.92 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether generic Web-Audio HRTF externalizes convincingly on a real phone + headphones (the whole bet rides on this), whether the 6-min arc reads as "arrival" vs. a slow wash, the shepherding feel, and front/back disambiguation on a real DeviceOrientation stream.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вАФ pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no recording, no network, no secrets. Within the scope fence. **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- The design-notes link points at `/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md` (lab convention вАФ App Router won't serve README as a route, so the link 404s; carried, matches prior prototypes, not a build blocker вАФ worth a future `_shared` notes-viewer).

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 308 (kids)**: 308 % 2 = 0 вЖТ kids. **DECIDE `304-kids-clap-band`'s fate** вАФ now thrice-banked (strongest-floor rhythm lane but keeps losing on experience): either ship it outright (the missing rhythm/percussion lane; pairs with 298 pitch / 303 tilt / 306 shake) or deliberately retire it. `305-kids-blow-sail` (calm breath) also available. **What I built (1 commit, deepen-in-place)**:
- **Round вЗД Phase mode toggle** in `302-mirror-canon-round/page.tsx`. Added `CanonMode` + `mode`/`modeRef` state, a `committedAtS` field on each `CanonVoice` (the per-voice drift origin), and `PHASE_DRIFT = 0.012`. Playback step 5 now branches: **Round** = the existing locked `barPhase вИТ offset`; **Phase** = each voice loops at `BAR_SEC¬Ј(1 + i¬ЈPHASE_DRIFT)`, clocked from its own commit time, so voice 0 stays locked and later voices slip вАФ Steve Reich *Piano Phase*. The round literally never repeats in Phase.
- **Live drift HUD** вАФ one tinted marker per active voice showing its current loop position (0..1), throttled to ~10 fps via a frame counter (cheap; the canvas keeps its own rAF). In Round the markers hold fixed offsets; in Phase they slide apart вАФ a legible read of the phasing even on Karel's phone.
- A segmented Round/Phase toggle button (44px targets, violet active), mode-aware helper copy, hero + footer updated (added the Reich reference), and the README's multi-cycle section marked cycle 2 **shipped** with cycle 3 (on-hardware tuning + per-voice drift-rate sculpt) queued.

## Cycle 294 вАФ kids build (solo, resurrected bank) вАФ 286-kids-jelly-choir

**When**: 2026-06-03 ~10:20 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch вЖТ `--ff-only` aborts). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` вЖТ HEAD `06e41c1` (cycle 293, `285-mosaic-listener`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Highest committed folder = **285** вЖТ allocated **286** (no collision; 286 was the cycle-292 jelly-choir loser folder, `rm -rf`'d then, so it's free). **AGENT.md drift note (recurring)**: the on-disk AGENT.md is *again* the stale **2026-05-21** version (no AMBITION & DIVERSITY / orchestration sections вАФ the force-push reverted it). Followed the mandate as carried in the cycle brief. Flagged again in MORNING for Karel вАФ worth pinning AGENT.md.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **embodied / squishy-tactile + non-standard-instrument** cluster вАФ `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `140-kids-string-bridge`вЭ§пЄП, `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП (its physical-pluck timbre), `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП, `84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП. Jelly Choir sits in this "the instrument is a soft physical thing you deform, not a button" vein, and (like the cycle-292 drum winner) answers the standing JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate at the synthesis level вАФ the sound is literally the wobble.

**Research-first**: this build chains directly off **RESEARCH ¬І292** (real-time physical-modeling / modal synthesis вАФ *nlm*, arXiv 2603.10240 (2026)), the same dive that produced cycle 292's drum. Jelly Choir is the **mass-spring / Verlet soft-body вЖТ audio** branch of that dive (Provot 1995, M√Љller PBD 2007). No new research dive this fire вАФ ¬І292 is < 2 cycles old and still load-bearing; the queue explicitly scheduled this resurrection (research-first rule path (a): a recent dive is the load-bearing idea).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (294 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The cycle-293 STATE queued cycle 294 as *"bank-resurrect a fresh physical-modeling sibling вАФ `kids-singing-bowl` (friction/stick-slip, three.js) or `kids-jelly-choir` (mass-spring soft-body, SVG)."* Picked **jelly-choir over singing-bowl** on **demo-reliability**: the bowl's signature *requires discovering the circular-rub* (a plain tap gives only a small strike вАФ the flagged "wow needs a learned gesture" risk that sank siblings at 282/289); jelly-choir is **immediate** вАФ poke вЖТ wobble вЖТ sing, zero gesture to learn, exactly the KIDS "immediate response every time" rule. Both are build-verified, non-canvas2d, non-pentatonic.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP). Deliberate: resurrecting an already-build-verified banked piece is a known-green path; the cycle's absolute is *don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled build is the most reliable green-deploy. (Cycle 293 set this solo-when-safer precedent.)

**Ambition floor** вАФ cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references(verified) + вЙ•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬І292)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вАФ grepped INDEX + READMEs: cymatics only *draw* membranes; Karplus is strings; `284` is a *membrane* modal synth. **First mass-spring / Verlet soft-body вЖТ audio instrument in 280+ prototypes** (the deformation energy of a sprung point-mass ring drives the voice).

**What's new about this prototype**:

README lists the path.

Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (no three.js needed вАФ SVG).

Unverified risks: (a) **spring tuning** вАФ the constraint factors (K_RADIAL 0.16 / K_STRUCT 0.14 / DAMPING 0.93, 2 substeps √Ч 3 iters) are hand-set, untested for feel; worst case the wobble is too stiff or too floppy (a one-number tweak next fire), never an error. (b) **grab radius** вАФ pointer pins the nearest perimeter mass of the nearest jelly within `r¬Ј1.7`; on a very dense/small layout a poke could grab a neighbor jelly вАФ still musical, just maybe the wrong color. (c) **mouth path** вАФ the smiling-open-mouth quadratic is geometry I couldn't eyeball; if it reads oddly it's a 2-line fix. All fail safe: the always-on drone keeps it alive, SVG always renders (no GPU), and any poke produces an immediate wobble even if audio failed to start.

Mosaic Listener sits dead-center: it slices his real Welcome Home recording into a navigable grain corpus, deepening the loved granular/paths vein toward a genuinely new synthesis paradigm (concatenative, not granular-of-live-input).

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH ¬І293, 2026-06-03 вАФ web tools healthy): **corpus-based concatenative synthesis / audio mosaicing**, chosen to load-bear the build. Anchors: **CataRT** (Diemo Schwarz, IRCAM вАФ descriptor-space + KNN "play the cloud", foundational); **"The Concatenator," arXiv 2411.04366 (Nov 2024)** (real-time Bayesian musaicing); **Lee & Pasquier, "MACAT/MACataRT," arXiv 2502.00023 (Feb 2025)** (factor-oracle self-listening agent вАФ the deepen path); **FluCoMa "live audio mosaicing on the web"** (browser-feasibility freshness anchor). Chain dive вЖТ build is direct (research-first path (a)): ¬І293 вЖТ `285-mosaic-listener`.

**Decided**: Adult cycle (293 % 2 = 1). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The queue named `mosaic-listener` as **"the strongest single bank in the queue вАФ schedule it on the next clean-slate adult cycle,"** and this is that cycle. **Rejected the other queued candidates after a prior-art grep**: `5-arcs` ("Journey Arc Engine v2") + `48-arc-compose` **already implement an "EDM Build-and-Drop" / cinematic / ritual arc**, so the journey-engine-alternative direction would be a near-duplicate (the exact "too similar" trap the mandate bans); `271-pigment-mosaic` already shipped the **AI-image-inside-AV** piece (Karel's #1, no longer a 0√Ч gap, and the FAL_KEY/no-browser-verify risk is real for an autonomous cycle). `mosaic-listener` is the clean clear-slate pick: a genuinely new synthesis paradigm + bullseye on the "use his real piano" directive.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP orchestration). Deliberate: the absolute rule is *the build must pass / don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled, fully-build-verified piece is the most reliable green-deploy path in budget вАФ especially with **raw WebGL2** shaders I can't browser-verify this cycle. Made the piece rich (4 subsystems) to honor the "not a thin solo toy" spirit. (Cycle 290 set this solo precedent and it held.)

**Ambition floor** вАФ cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references(verified) + вЙ•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬І293)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вАФ grepped INDEX + all dream READMEs for `concatenative`/`corpus-based`/`catart`/`audio mosaic`/`timbre-space`: **zero hits вЖТ first concatenative-synthesis / audio-mosaicing piece in 280+ prototypes.** (`227-paths-granular` is *granular* playback of a single source position; this is *descriptor-matched KNN concatenation* across a tagged corpus вАФ a different paradigm.)
- **(3) Named references (verified)** вАФ README cites CataRT/Diemo Schwarz, The Concatenator (arXiv 2411.04366, 2024), MACAT/MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023, 2025), FluCoMa вАФ all real & checkable.
- **(2) вЙ•3 subsystems** вАФ 4: corpus analysis (grain segmentation + RMS + 256-pt Hann-DFT spectral centroid + ZCR pitch, with synth-corpus *and* real-track-decode paths sharing one buffer-index playback) ¬Ј descriptor-space KNN matcher + Chris-Wilson look-ahead grain scheduler (overlap-add windowed BufferSources вЖТ lowpass вЖТ feedback-delay wash вЖТ limiter) ¬Ј matte WebGL2 atlas render (GL_POINTS, per-grain activation, cursor + trail) ¬Ј target navigation (pointer-drag / auto-drift Lissajous / mic centroid+RMS).
- **(5) Recent research** вАФ built directly off this cycle's ¬І293 dive.
- (4) Multi-cycle вАФ not claimed; shipped demoable in one fire (deepen path in README: YIN+MFCC, PCA/UMAP layout, KD-tree, onset-aligned grains, MACataRT factor-oracle).

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 267,268,271,272,275,276,279,280,283,284):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5√Ч: 271,272,275,279,280) ¬Ј three.js-additive-points/glow(JURY hard-ban) ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬Ј picked=[pointer-drag INPUT (mic optional) ¬Ј matte raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј concatenative-synthesis TECHNIQUE(0√Ч ever) ¬Ј data-sculpture/his-piano VIBE ¬Ј his-real-piano-grains SOUND (non-pentatonic by source)]`
- **OUTPUT = raw WebGL2 (matte)**: canvas2d hit **5√Ч** вЖТ **BANNED**; three.js 3√Ч (267,283,284 вАФ under the line but the JURY *additionally* hard-bans glowing three.js point clouds, which a descriptor scatter would read as); SVG 2√Ч (268,276); **raw-WebGL2 0√Ч in window** вЖТ cleanest dodge on *both* axes. **What's new about this prototype**:

Bank-resurrect a fresh physical-modeling sibling from cycle 292 вАФ **`kids-singing-bowl`** (friction/stick-slip, three.js) or **`kids-jelly-choir`** (mass-spring soft-body, SVG) вАФ both build-verified; or push physical modeling further (a *playable* plate/Chladni, a struck metal tongue-drum). - Cycle 295: **adult build**. **Notes**:

Mic is analysis-only (`AnalyserNode`, never connected to destination, never recorded/persisted/transmitted). Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). The procedural-corpus default + auto-drift guarantee a working, self-playing 06:30 review with zero network and zero permissions.
