- **ResearchвЖТbuild chain:** path (c)-adjacent вАФ the dive set the "honest 2/5, compete on diversity" strategy and banked ParaBridge; the build is a WIDE fire shipping the most robust + jury-aligned of three fresh-tag explorers.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`): winner aligns with **262-aurora-particleвЭ§пЄП** (aurora palette) + **083-kids-tilt-rainвЭ§пЄП** (tilt input) вАФ additive; the ambition/diversity/kids gates governed the pick.

**Act вАФ WIDE 3-explorer kids fire (orchestrated, parallel builders):**
- **`500-kids-aurora-tilt` (WINNER, shipped)** вАФ `deviceorientation` (ќ≤/ќ≥, one-pole smoothed, iOS `requestPermission` in gesture, pointer-drag fallback) вЖТ `tension = clamp(вИЪ(ќ≤¬≤+ќ≥¬≤)/45¬∞,0,1)` drives BOTH a raw **WebGL2** GLSL ES 3.00 full-screen fragment shader (IQ `fbm(p+fbm(p+fbm(p)))` 3-layer domain-warp aurora вАФ fold sharpness/flow speed/octaves/palette scale with tension; deep-indigo sky + deterministic stars; 65% DPR) AND a 4-voice modal pad that voice-leads from open-fifth+octave home (C3 G3 C4 G4) to a sus4/add9 tense voicing (C3 F3 D4 BвЩ≠4) with tilt-scaled tremolo. Always-on **auto-demo** Lissajous wander on load (no permission needed to see+hear it work вАФ bulletproof for the 06:30 hands-free glance); DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter (вИТ6 dB) + 8.8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext-in-gesture; WebGL2-absent вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + audio still runs. Files: `page.tsx` (327), `shader.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`. Ref: **I√±igo Quilez, "Domain Warping"** (iquilezles.org) + aurora-borealis metaphor. 5 subsystems.
- **`499-kids-sky-bells` (banked, IDEAS ¬І386)** вАФ the **real live sky singing** (Open-Meteo weather вЖТ WebGL2 sky soundscape). Highest *surprise* + lands the starved real-world-data menu category, but its tension is *observational* not resolved-through-action, and weather-sonification is abstract for a 4yo вЖТ a better adult/all-ages piece. Strongest seed of the fire.
- **`501-kids-hum-garden` (banked, IDEAS ¬І386)** вАФ hum **steadily** (not on-target) to bloom an SVG flower (self-coded YIN pitch + stability-as-resolution). Freshest *resolution mechanic* of the fire, but largest/most-complex (826 lines) and YIN-on-a-real-child-voice is unverified (demo-reliability risk vs. 500's permission-free auto-demo).

**Curate (why 500 won):** for a **kids cycle** (governed by KIDS.md "a 4yo can use it unsupervised and be genuinely entertained") judged via a **hands-free 06:30 phone glance**, 500 is strongest on the deciding axes вАФ (1) **jury #1 tension-through-action**, executed as an embodied "level it to resolve" gesture; (2) **robustness** вАФ auto-demos on load with **zero permissions**, vs. 499's geolocation/CORS surface and 501's mic+child-voice risk; (3) **4yo delight** вАФ tilt is instantly graspable, beautiful, calming; (4) **love-aligned** (aurora 262вЭ§пЄП + tilt 083вЭ§пЄП). 499/501 are equal-ambition (2/5) and equally diversity-clean, but lost on the kids-cycle + hands-free-review lens. Non-winners NOT committed; banked as detailed IDEAS ¬І386 seeds; their folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build.

**Validate:** removed 499 + 501 folders вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner: **exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/500-kids-aurora-tilt` prerendered static (6.03 kB / 109 kB First Load)**. One fix applied: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps **warning** (ref value in effect-cleanup) вАФ captured `const live = liveRef.current` and used it in cleanup; re-lint `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder **clean (0 warnings/0 errors)**, rebuild still exit 0. **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/gyro/audio in sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the IQ domain-warp aurora (~72 noise evals/px √Ч 3 layers, 65% DPR) holds вЙ•30 fps on an older mobile GPU; whether `deviceorientation` + iOS `requestPermission` path works on Karel's review device (pointer-drag + auto-demo are the fallbacks); whether the chord *audibly* swings homeвЖФtense behind the limiter on phone speakers; the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. Auto-demo + drag fallback + WebGL2-absent audio-only are the safety nets so the 06:30 demo always shows evolving sound + light.

Doc drift watch: STATE/INDEX trail the commit log post-force-push; this block keeps the researchвЖТbuild chain visible.

## Cycle 461 вАФ 2026-06-17 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT (461 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј **DEEP** (one concept вАФ *the music dreams a picture, and the dream changes the music* вАФ 2 technical approaches to closing the audioвЖТimageвЖТAUDIO loop, orchestrated) ¬Ј SHIPS `704-spectral-seance` вАФ the lab's **first true closed audioвЖТimageвЖТAUDIO loop**: a generative sound dreams an austere data-image, then the image is **re-sonified column-by-column as a spectrogram** (image-as-instrument, Ikeda/UPIC/ANS) while a scan-line sweeps it. **Curate (why 729 won).** The deciding axis is the jury's *literal* ask вАФ make it **actually** cross-device; a real two-phone jam retires the asterisk. (1) **730 is OUT despite the friendliest UX + scarcest renderer (WebGPU):** its own README admits the fatal flaw вАФ the relay's room store is a module-level `Map` in per-lambda memory, and Vercel routes the two peers to *different* instances where the map isn't shared, so on real Vercel it **likely won't connect** вАФ shipping it = shipping a cross-device piece that can't go cross-device. (2) **728 and 729 are both zero-server, correct-by-construction** (no backend, no lambda fragility) вЖТ the two most likely to actually connect. (3) **729 over 728:** `navigator.share` вЖТ "text a friend the portal link, they tap it" is the handshake a real person will actually *complete* вАФ vs. copy-pasting two long SDP blobs back and forth вАФ so 729 is the one most likely to produce a genuine two-phone jam *in practice*, which was the deciding axis. Its cosmic two-constellations field also rides the loved cosmic/particle cluster. **Honest notes:** **728 carries the scarcer renderer (WebGL2 vs three.js 3√Ч) and the purest zero-dep handshake** вАФ banked в≠Р, and the clean next step is to graft 728's WebGL2 field onto 729's shareable-link flow. **730 is the best piece the moment a backing store exists** вАФ banked в≠Р with an explicit morning ask: approve moving its relay to Vercel KV/Upstash (a `package.json` change only Karel can make per the fence), and frictionless room-code cross-device jamming on WebGPU becomes real. So this is the documented container fd-ceiling quirk from cycles 471/472, NOT the prototype; Vercel (which builds this same app fine) will deploy 729 normally. Per the cycle-472 precedent Karel accepted, committing the **compile + lint-verified** winner is correct (vs. discarding a fully-built jury-#4 lab-first over an infra quirk that breaks pristine main identically). `git status`: working tree = HEAD + exactly the one new `729-piano-portal-jam/` folder + `docs/dreams/**`; package.json / lockfile / next.config confirmed unchanged.

- **`753-conducted-orbit`** вАФ **three.js** concert-in-the-round (central conductor + ~5 orbiting musician-orbs, warm cream-amber-rust gradient stage); conduct by **dragging a baton** (vertical=dynamics, horizontal sweep=tempo). **Banked в≠Р.**

## Cycle 490 вАФ 2026-06-20 (UTC) ¬Ј kids WIDE, 3 explorers вЖТ ship `773-kids-parade-caller`

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І490).** Two WebSearches (konnakol/spoken-rhythm-for-children; arxiv speech-rhythmвЖТsyllable-onset sonification). Finding: **konnakol** (South Indian vocal percussion вАФ spoken syllables ARE the rhythm) is an established **children's** rhythm pedagogy (SaPa academy takes age-3 learners). Crucial grep: the lab's existing ASR pieces (`752-kids-word-band`, `570-spoken-spell`) map recognized speech to **PITCH** (pentatonic); **none maps it to RHYTHM**. So speech-as-percussion is lab-first. `today's research вЖТ today's build` chain is visible: ¬І490 вЖТ `773`.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared.**
- **Rotation:** cycle 490 even + no blocker/in-progress вЖТ **kids** cycle (KIDS.md design rules).
- **Mode:** `mode: WIDE` (3 divergent explorers) вАФ deliberate alternation off cycle 489's DEEP fire, and the directest anti-monoculture move for the jury's loudest 2026-06-19 message ("every ban hardened into a new monoculture").
- **Ambition floor:** each brief clears **#2 (вЙ•3 subsystems) + #3 (named reference)** = honest 2/5. Winner `773`: 4 subsystems (ASR + syllable-rhythm analysis + accreting percussion sequencer + Canvas2D parade) + Konnakol/Reich ref; soft #1 (ASR-as-rhythm is lab-first), #5 NOT claimed (konnakol foundational). `ambition: #2 + #3`.
- **Diversity audit (vs JURY 2026-06-19 banned set):** banned = [concatenative-grain resynthesis ¬Ј WebGPU/raw-WebGL2 GPU-shader-field ¬Ј mic-breath/hum input ¬Ј near-dark luminous-glow vibe]. picked across the 3 = input{speech, touch, touch} ¬Ј output{Canvas2D, SVG/DOM, Canvas2D} ¬Ј technique{syllable-rhythm-groove, 2D-physics-collision, step-sequencer} ¬Ј vibe{bright-parade, bright-marble-machine, bright-build-a-band} вАФ **none touches a banned tag.** `diversity: banned=[grain ¬Ј GPU-shader-field ¬Ј mic-hum ¬Ј dark-glow] ¬Ј picked=[speech/touch ¬Ј Canvas2D/SVG-DOM ¬Ј syllable-rhythm/physics/sequencer ¬Ј bright-active-joyful]`. JURY #4 (active/joyful kids middle) hit head-on; JURY #2 (off GPU-shader; SVG/DOM + scarce Canvas2D) hit.

**Act (orchestration).** Fanned out 3 Builder subagents in parallel, pre-allocated distinct numbers, folder-isolated, exit-contract enforced (build + README, no git, no shared-doc edits). ## Cycle 517 вАФ 2026-06-22 (UTC) ¬Ј adult ¬Ј DEEP (3 parallel approaches, shipped 1)

**Orient.** Synced main (origin force-pushed; `git reset --hard origin/main` to the cycle-516 HEAD `d0a3786`). Cycle 517 is **odd вЖТ adult** (kids rotation is even). Read JURY 2026-06-22: hard-ban **Canvas2D** (back to 7/15 вАФ force a GPU surface; WebGPU 0√Ч, WebGL2 1√Ч, three.js 2√Ч), ban **touch+mic-only inputs** (8/15 вАФ push embodied/sensor: body, tilt, depth, MIDI), ban the kids always-consonant-morph template. Provocation **#2** is the loudest structural ask: *"build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring вАФ spend a DEEP cycle on a depth-camera or pose-driven spatial-audio room"* (body 1√Ч, squandered on 811; depth 0√Ч; the whole spatial/installation menu cold). Love signal biases toward exactly this cluster: `217-dance-avatar`вЭ§пЄП, `101-camera-song`вЭ§пЄП, `148-spatial-palette`вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП (body + spatial + GPU).

**Research-first dive вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І517.** WebSearch on browser head-tracked binaural + MediaPipe (2026) surfaced active work using a plain webcam as the head-tracker (MediaPipe face landmarks) to drive real-time binaural rendering with no head-mounted hardware вАФ incl. a browser-based facial-tracking system that computes face-angular-rotation to set the listener's virtual orientation in a shared acoustic space. Hook: *body/head/hand pose вЖТ Web Audio `AudioListener` over a fixed HRTF field.* Chain visible: ¬І517 вЖТ this cycle's build.

**Decide (gates).** Ambition floor: **#2** (вЙ•3 subsystems: camera tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field + GPU render + gesture/nav engine = 4) **+ #3** (named ref: Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet*, 2001 вАФ 40-channel Tallis *Spem in Alium*). Diversity audit, last 10 shipped (849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827): `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (HARD) ¬Ј touch+mic-only INPUT ¬Ј always-consonant-morph kids template]`; `picked=[bare-hand/body/head camera INPUT (starved) ¬Ј GPU OUTPUT, winner on the scarcest raw-WebGL2 ¬Ј HRTF spatial TECH ¬Ј adult installation VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. Critically **differentiated from `677-presence-field`** (which attaches a voice to each body JOINT): here voices are PINNED at fixed 3D coords and the body moves the LISTENER / sculpts the fixed field вАФ the Cardiff "walk among the speakers" inversion, not sources-on-limbs.

**Act вАФ `mode: DEEP`.** ONE massive concept вАФ *"The Motet Room": navigate/sculpt a FIXED constellation of HRTF-spatialized choir voices with your body* вАФ attacked via 3 parallel Builder subagents at three body granularities, each on a different GPU surface:
- `852-motet-room-walk` вАФ MediaPipe **Pose**; body translates the listener+camera THROUGH a fixed oval (the literal Cardiff gallery walk); **three.js**.
- `853-motet-room-reach` вАФ MediaPipe **Hands**; fixed listener, two hands CONDUCT/sculpt the field (reach-swell, spread/collapse, pinch-grab-and-fling a voice to a new permanent home); **raw WebGL2**.
- `854-motet-room-lean` вАФ MediaPipe **FaceLandmarker**; head-tracked binaural вАФ turn your head, the field stays world-anchored; **three.js**.

**Curate вЖТ winner `853-motet-room-reach`.** Reasons: (1) **diversity** вАФ the only one on raw WebGL2, the scarcest GPU surface (1√Ч in last 15); 852/854 would push three.js to 3√Ч. (2) **agency with consequence** вАФ two-hand conducting with *persistent re-sculpting* (a flung voice keeps its new home) is the directest answer to the jury's "if you have a body, do something a touchscreen can't, with a real consequence" (the exact thing 811 wasted). (3) **ambition** вАФ the richest build (922-line page + typed CDN handLoader), full gesture vocabulary. Its auto-demo (two virtual hands gesturing) is also the most visibly alive for a no-camera morning review. Banked 852 (top adult resurrect вАФ the literal Cardiff walk) + 854 (head-tracked binaural, ties to ¬І517) as IDEAS ¬І517 seeds; both removed before the authoritative build (not committed).

**Validate.** Losers `rm -rf`, `rm -rf .next`, authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (`set -o pipefail`): first pass failed on ONE new ESLint error in the winner вАФ `853 page.tsx:314 'hx' is never reassigned (prefer-const)` (caught because the 852 builder's full-tree lint flagged it). ONE fix attempt: `let hx`вЖТ`const hx` (hx is assigned once; sibling hy/hz are reassigned so they stay `let`). Rebuild: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 98s` вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`** вАФ TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack all PASS; **853 grep-clean of the log** (zero warnings/errors; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; folder grep-clean of `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route). ONLY failure = `EMFILE: too many open files` at `next-font-manifest.json` during static-gen вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd ceiling documented every cycle since 471 (infra, not code; fails identically on pristine main; Vercel deploys normally). Also reverted a stray `package-lock.json` modification a builder left (scope-fence: never commit lockfiles). **Verification status: compile+lint+type verified; static-gen blocked by infra; NOT device/ear-verified** вАФ no camera/GPU/audio in container, so the live MediaPipe hand path + CDN model load, the raw-WebGL2 render, and whether HRTF localization reads on headphones (vs collapsing to L/R on laptop speakers) are unverified by eye/ear; auto-demo + mouse fallback guarantee a sounding, moving glance regardless.
